definition.en: Christ as you know him represented the inner self. The twelve, therefore, plus Christ as you know him (the one figure composed of the three) represented an individual earthly personality -- the inner self -- and twelve main characteristics connected with the egotistical self.
definition.zh: 你们所知的基督代表了内在自己。因此，十二门徒加上你们所知的基督（由三者组成的一个形象）代表了一个个体尘世人格——内在自己——以及十二个与自我本我相关的主要特征。

definition.en: The inner self is a developing entity, not a finished product.
definition.zh: 内在自己是一个正在发展的实体，不是一个成品。

definition.en: The inner self is not entirely dependent on them for its entire data by any means. The mind can bypass the senses, and receive its data in a more direct manner, translating what it perceives as automatically as it translates sensual data.
definition.zh: 内在自己绝不完全依赖感官来获取其全部数据。心智可以绕过感官，以更直接的方式接收数据，并像自动翻译感官数据一样自动翻译它所感知到的东西。

definition.en: The inner self, which is the source of your present being, speaks through your impulses. They provide in-built spiritual and biological impetuses toward your most ideal development.
definition.zh: 作为你当前存在之源的内在自己，通过你的冲动来说话。它们提供了朝向你最理想发展的内在灵性与生物性驱动力。

definition.en: Mental acts have an electromagnetic reality which directly affects the inner self, which directly forms the constantly changing nature of the inner self. For the inner self is, after all, composed of mental actions, and the entity itself is ever-changing.
definition.zh: 心智行为具有一种电磁实相，它直接影响着内在自己，并直接形成内在自己不断变化的本质。因为内在自己毕竟是由心智行为组成的，而实体本身也在不断变化。

explanation: 内在自我是人格的核心本源，它并非与外在自我（小我）对立，而是包容并超越后者。小我由内在自我创造，用于在物质现实中体验角色，但小我常误以为自己是独立的，从而切断与内在自我的联系。内在自我本质上是一个不断发展的精神实体，它通过多世生命、多重角色来探索和扩展自身意识。它不依赖物理感官，能直接获取知识，并利用物质体验作为反馈来学习。内在自我通过冲动和直觉向小我传达智慧，因此压抑小我或否定欲望并非正道，而是应信任当下的自我，因为内在自我正是通过你此刻的冲动和渴望来指引你走向最理想的发展。简言之，内在自我是永恒、多面的意识核心，它既创造了物质人格，又通过物质体验来丰富自身。

quotes.text: Each of the twelve represented qualities of personality that belong to one individual, and Christ as you know him represented the inner self. The twelve, therefore, plus Christ as you know him (the one figure composed of the three) represented an individual earthly personality -- the inner self -- and twelve main characteristics connected with the egotistical self. As Christ was surrounded by the disciples, so the inner self is surrounded by these physically oriented characteristics, each drawn outward toward daily reality on the one hand, and yet orbiting the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这十二个代表属于同一个体的个性特质，而你们所知的基督则代表内在自体。因此，这十二个加上你们所知的基督（由三者组成的一个形象）代表了一个个体的人格——内在自体——以及与自我相关的十二个主要特质。正如基督被门徒环绕，内在自体也被这些面向肉体的特质所环绕，每个特质一方面向外延伸至日常现实，另一方面又围绕内在自体运行。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This electrical pattern the personality, with all the experiences of its earthly time. It then can join or partake of the inner self. In other words, though the ego was adopted originally by the inner self, and was a product of physical heredity and environment, it does not die; but its existence is changed from physical reality into electrical reality. It is still individual. No individuality is lost, but it becomes a part of the inner self, and its experiences are added to the total experience of the many personalities that have composed the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这个电性模式就是人格，包含其所有尘世时间的经验。然后它可以加入或参与内在自体。换句话说，虽然自我最初由内在自体所采用，并且是肉体遗传和环境的产物，但它不会消亡；而是其存在从物质实相转变为电性实相。它仍然是个体化的。没有任何个体性会丧失，但它成为内在自体的一部分，其经验被添加到构成内在自体的众多人格的总经验中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: So far in our discussion, then, we have an inner self, dwelling primarily in a mental or psychic dimension, dreaming itself into physical form, and finally forming a body consciousness. To that body consciousness the inner self gives "its own body of physical knowledge," the vast reservoir of physical achievement that it has triumphantly produced. (Pause.) The body consciousness is not "unconscious," but for working purposes in your terms, [the body] possesses its own system of consciousness that to some extent, now (underlined), is separated from what you think of as your own normal consciousness. The body's consciousness is hardly to be considered less than your own, or as inferior to that of your inner self, since it represents knowledge from the inner self, and is a part of the inner self's own consciousness--the part delegated to the body.
quotes.translation: 到目前为止，在我们的讨论中，我们有一个内在自体，主要居住在心智或心理维度中，将自己梦想成物质形态，并最终形成身体意识。内在自体将"它自己的物质知识身体"赋予那个身体意识，那是它胜利产生的大量物质成就的宝库。（停顿）身体意识并非"无意识"，但就你们术语中的运作目的而言，[身体]拥有自己的意识系统，在某种程度上，现在（强调）与你们认为的正常意识是分离的。身体意识绝不亚于你们自己的意识，也不低于你们内在自体的意识，因为它代表了来自内在自体的知识，并且是内在自体自身意识的一部分——被委派给身体的那部分。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Beneath this, pure and simple, undistorted, there for the searching, absolutely free for the asking, is the knowledge inherent in the inner self pertaining to the inner universe as a whole, its laws and principles, its composition. Here you will find, undistorted, uncamouflaged, the innate knowledge of the creation of the camouflage universe, the mechanics involved, much of the material that I have given you, the method and ways by which the inner self as a basic inhabitant of the inner universe, existing in the climate of psychological reality, helps create the various planes of existence, constructs outer senses to project and perceive the various apparent realities or camouflages, how the inner self reincarnates on the various planes. Here you will find your answers as to how the inner self transforms energy for his own purposes, changes his form, adopts other apparent realities, and all this free for the investigation.
quotes.translation: 在此之下，纯粹而简单，未经扭曲，等待探索，绝对免费索取，是内在自体固有的知识，涉及整个内在宇宙及其法则、原理和构成。在这里，你们会发现未经扭曲、未经伪装的内在知识，关于伪装宇宙的创造、所涉及的机制、我给予你们的许多资料、内在自体作为内在宇宙的基本居民存在于心理实相气候中的方法和途径，如何帮助创造各种存在层面，构建外在感官以投射和感知各种表面实相或伪装，以及内在自体如何在各个层面转世。在这里，你们会找到关于内在自体如何为自己的目的转化能量、改变形态、采用其他表面实相的所有答案，所有这些都免费供研究。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I have told you that through many existences you don egos for the purposes set by the inner self. It is necessary of course that you believe in your role. The difficulty is that you must believe in your role, and yet also realize that it is a role that you, the inner self, have chosen. Otherwise your connections with the inner self are nearly forgotten. The ego forgets that it is only a part of a much more complete personality structure, and therefore cuts itself off from abilities and insights that are necessary, even for its own comfort and stability.
quotes.translation: 我告诉过你们，通过许多存在，你们穿上自我，以服务于内在自体设定的目的。当然，你们必须相信自己的角色。困难在于你们必须相信自己的角色，同时又意识到这是你们作为内在自体所选择的角色。否则你们与内在自体的联系几乎会被遗忘。自我忘记它只是一个更完整人格结构的一部分，因此切断了与必要的能力和洞见的联系，这些能力和洞见甚至对其自身的舒适和稳定都是必需的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego feared for its position, frightened that it would dissolve back into the inner self from which it came. Yet in its emergence it provided the inner self with a new kind of feedback, a different view not only of itself; but through this, the inner self was able to glimpse possibilities of development of which it had not previously been aware. In your terms, by the time of Christ, the ego was sure enough of its position so that the projected picture of God could begin to change.
quotes.translation: 自我担心自己的地位，害怕它会消融回它所来自的内在自体。然而，在其出现过程中，它为内在自体提供了一种新的反馈，一种不仅关于自身的不同视角；而且通过这一点，内在自体得以瞥见其先前未曾意识到的可能性发展。用你们的术语来说，到基督时代，自我对其地位已经足够确定，以至于投射出的上帝形象可以开始改变。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In other systems this is not necessarily the case. The time system within them is entirely different than your own. In these the inner self is aware of itself as more than one ego. (Pause.) The inner self can play more than one role at once, consciously in other words. Simply as an analogy, it would be as if within physical reality you lived, say, the life of a rich man of great talent, the life of a poor man with entirely different talents, and the life of a mother and career woman. You would be aware of yourself in each of these three roles, and find qualities being developed in each of the separate lives.
quotes.translation: 在其他系统中情况未必如此。它们内部的时间体系与你们截然不同。在这些系统中，内在自我意识到自身不止是一个自我。（停顿。）换言之，内在自我可以有意识地同时扮演多个角色。打个比方，就像在物质实相中你同时过着三种人生：一位才华横溢的富翁、一位天赋迥异的穷人、一位兼顾母亲与职业女性的生活。你会意识到自己在这三个角色中的存在，并发现每个独立生命都在发展不同的特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner self is acquainting itself with reality as it exists there. In many cases it is emerging into a new world. Since the learning process is involved, there are errors. Any faulty constructions however are used by the inner self in a feedback system and as a part of the learning process. Your system is not the most elementary, but it is one of the most elementary, and it is a way that the inner self acquaints itself with certain basic facts.
quotes.translation: 内在自我正在认识存在于那里的实相。在许多情况下它正进入一个新世界。由于涉及学习过程，错误在所难免。然而任何有缺陷的建构都会被内在自我用于反馈系统，作为学习过程的一部分。你们的系统并非最基础的，但属于最基础的之一，是内在自我认识某些基本事实的途径。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Hypnosis is one method of examining dreams. Our method is perhaps the best one. The inner self constantly changes its focus. I have said that consciousness is merely the direction in which the inner self focuses at any particular time. In order to examine the reality of dreams it is necessary to change the focus of the inner self to those directions in which the inner self moves, when the ego does not limit its scope to camouflage reality only.
quotes.translation: 催眠是检视梦境的方法之一。我们的方法或许是最佳选择。内在自我不断改变其焦点。我曾说过，意识不过是内在自我在特定时刻聚焦的方向。要检视梦境的实相，必须将内在自我的焦点转向那些当自我不再将其视野局限于伪装实相时，内在自我所移动的方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Sensual data is not basically--underlined--dependent upon the physical body. The individual can receive sensual data in other ways. The senses are indeed often used by the inner self as a constant method of acquainting it with circumstances pertinent to the survival and interests of the physical body, but the inner self is not entirely dependent on them for its entire data by any means. The mind can bypass the senses, and receive its data in a more direct manner, translating what it perceives as automatically as it translates sensual data.
quotes.translation: 感官数据本质上——强调——并不依赖物质身体。个体可以通过其他方式接收感官数据。感官确实常被内在自我用作持续了解与肉体生存和利益相关情况的工具，但内在自我绝非完全依赖它们获取全部数据。心智可以绕过感官，以更直接的方式接收数据，并像自动翻译感官数据那样自动翻译它所感知的内容。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner self is embarked upon an exciting endeavor, in which it learns how to translate its reality into physical terms. The conscious mind is brilliantly attuned to physical reality, then, and often so dazzled by what it perceives that it is tempted to think physical phenomena is a cause, rather than a result. Deeper portions of the self always serve to remind it that this is not the case. When the conscious mind accepts too many false beliefs, particularly if it sees that inner self as a danger, then it closes out these constant reminders. When this situation arises the conscious mind feels itself assailed by a reality that seems greater than itself, over which it has no control. The deep feeling of security in which it should be anchored is lost.
quotes.translation: 内在自我正投身于一项激动人心的事业，学习如何将其实相转化为物质形式。意识心因此与物质实相高度协调，常常被其感知所迷惑，以至于倾向于认为物质现象是原因而非结果。自我的更深层部分始终提醒它事实并非如此。当意识心接受太多错误信念，特别是将内在自我视为危险时，它就会屏蔽这些持续不断的提醒。当这种情况发生时，意识心会感到被一个似乎比自身更强大、无法控制的实相所侵袭。它本应扎根的深层安全感就此丧失。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: These are unfoldings, as the inner self materializes what is already latent into physical actuality. Now there may be areas in which the inner self is simply not interested. There may be areas in which it is simply less proficient. The inner self is a developing entity, not a finished product. The whole idea of physical reality, individually speaking, is the emergence of experience within your particular system.
quotes.translation: 这些是展开过程，内在自我将已然潜伏的事物物质化为物理实相。现在，可能存在内在自我根本不感兴趣的领域，也可能存在它不太擅长的领域。内在自我是一个发展中的实体，而非成品。就个体而言，物质实相的整体概念，就是在你们特定系统内经验的涌现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Some correspondents write: "I realize that I am too egotistical." There are many schools for spiritual advancement that teach you to "get rid of the clutter of your impulses and desires," to shove aside the self that you are in search of a greater idealized version. First of all, the self that you are is ever-changing and never static. There is an inner self in the terms of those definitions, but that inner self, which is the source of your present being, speaks through your impulses. They provide in-built spiritual and biological impetuses toward your most ideal development (underlined). You must trust the self that you are, now.
quotes.translation: 有些来信者写道："我意识到自己太自我中心了。"有许多灵性提升的学派教导你"摆脱冲动与欲望的杂乱"，推开你当下的自我，去追寻一个更伟大的理想化版本。首先，你当下的自我是不断变化、永不静止的。按照这些定义，确实存在一个内在自我，但这个作为你当前存在之源的内在自我，正是通过你的冲动来说话的。它们为你最理想的发展提供了与生俱来的灵性与生物性驱动力（下划线标注）。你必须信任你当下所是的这个自我。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 872, AUGUST 8, 1979
9:15 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Two main possibilities come to mind. One, a continued lack of acceptance of the inner self could lead to worldwide catastrophe, as the ego runs wild. Two, the inner self, restrained and denied for too long a period, could explosively overwhelm the ego so that existence in the physical field was made most difficult, since the ego is equipped to handle such manipulation. ego domination must indeed be halted, but it must be replaced with a balance between the outer and inner selves. Other matters briefly mentioned this evening will be more thoroughly discussed then also.
quotes.translation: 我想到两种主要可能性。其一，持续缺乏对内在自我的接纳可能导致全球性灾难，因为自我意识会失控。其二，被长期压抑和否定的内在自我可能以爆炸性方式压倒自我意识，使得在物质领域的存在变得极为困难，因为自我意识本就是为了处理这种操控而配备的。自我意识的支配确实必须被制止，但必须以内外自我的平衡来取代它。今晚简要提及的其他事项，届时也将进行更深入的讨论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The resulting thoughts and images in turn are expressed and affect others, and not only symbolically. As you should know, mental acts have an electromagnetic reality which directly affects the inner self, which directly forms the constantly changing nature of the inner self. For the inner self is, after all, composed of mental actions, and the entity itself is ever-changing.
quotes.translation: 由此产生的思想和意象反过来会被表达并影响他人，而且这不仅是象征性的。如你所知，心智活动具有电磁实相，这种实相直接影响内在自我，并直接塑造内在自我不断变化的本质。因为内在自我终究是由心智活动构成的，而存有本身也在不断变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In physical existence a certain portion of the inner self 's electromagnetic properties are used by the physical structure of the body. Subtle changes occur in the body when the inner self projects. This projection is not dependent upon physical life--that is, the survival of the human personality also is then not dependent upon physical survival, nor need it be supported by physical life. The electromagnetic properties simply revert to their original source with the inner self, and are no longer utilized in the construction of a corporeal image.
quotes.translation: 在物质存在中，内在自我电磁属性的特定部分被身体的物质结构所运用。当内在自我投射时，身体会发生微妙变化。这种投射并不依赖于物质生命——也就是说，人类人格的存续也不依赖于物质生存，更无需物质生命来支撑。电磁属性只是回归到内在自我这个原始源头，不再用于构建物质形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When you start out by trying to be practical in cold terms you rarely succeed, because you close yourself away from what does not seem to be practical in your terms. But your terms are not the only terms that apply. The inner self, and I will make these differentiations for you clearly either now or later, the inner self is nourished by many springs. To cut off one is a danger. To cut off many is disastrous, and prevents any sort of practicality, since half of your abilities will not be used.
quotes.translation: 当你一开始就试图以冷酷务实的方式行事时，很少能成功，因为你将自己封闭起来，拒绝那些在你看来不切实际的事物。但你的标准并非唯一适用的标准。内在自我——我现在或稍后会为你明确区分这些概念——是由众多源泉滋养的。切断一个源泉是危险的，切断多个则会导致灾难，并阻碍任何形式的务实性，因为你一半的能力将无法得到运用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Basically there are no real divisions to the self, but for the sake of explanation we must speak of them in those terms. First of all you had the inner self, the creative dreaming self--composed, again, of units of consciousness, awareized energy that forms your identity, and that formed the identities of the earliest earth inhabitants. These inner selves formed their own dream bodies about them, as previously explained, but the dream bodies did not have to have physical reactions. They were free of gravity and space, and of time.
quotes.translation: 根本上，自我并无真正的分割，但为了解释的方便，我们必须以这些术语来讨论。首先，你拥有内在自我，这个具有创造力的做梦自我——它同样由意识单元构成，即形成你身份认同的觉知能量，这些能量也形成了最早地球居民的身份认同。如先前所述，这些内在自我在自身周围形成了它们的梦境身体，但梦境身体无需具备物质反应。它们不受重力、空间和时间的束缚。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. The inner self exists in quite a different fashion than that seen by Dunne. For the inner self can indeed perceive events that will occur after physical death. It is not, and never was, imprisoned by ego time. Its perceptions of other times are merely inhibited by the ego. The inner self can perceive events that will occur to itself after physical death, and it also can see events that will occur in which it is not involved.
quotes.translation: 现在。内在自体存在的模式与邓恩所见的截然不同。因为内在自体确实能感知肉体死亡后会发生的事件。它从未被自我时间所禁锢，也永远不会被禁锢。它对其他时间的感知只是被自我所抑制。内在自体既能感知自身在肉体死亡后将要经历的事件，也能看到那些它并未参与其中却即将发生的事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Yet the inner self offers so many answers, for the inner self is a portion of each individual; and yet it operates outside of physical systems of reference. It is of itself free of all distorted effects peculiar to the physical system. The study of dreams--your scientists consider such work beneath them. Why has no one suspected that dream locations, for example, have not only a psychological reality, but a definite actuality?
quotes.translation: 然而内在自体提供了如此多的答案，因为内在自体是每个个体的一部分；但它却在物质参考系之外运作。它本身不受物质系统特有的所有扭曲效应影响。对梦境的研究——你们的科学家认为这类工作有失身份。为何无人怀疑过，比如梦境地点不仅具有心理真实性，还具有确凿的实在性？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You can feel what you cannot necessarily describe verbally, for you are more than the physical brain that you have now. I am no poet, but as in one of Ruburt's poems, think of the brain as a web you form about the inner self. This webwork helps you manipulate in a world of space and time, and is as nebulous, precarious and delicate as any spider's web -- and in as precarious a balance. You form this and then perceive the world, but your viewpoint is very small and the garden you perceive very intimate. You have, however, far greater abilities of perception. I want you to understand the nature of your inner self, or soul, for it is a focal point of reality from which other realities spring. It is not imprisoned in tiny boxes of days or weeks or months, or even of centuries.
quotes.translation: 你能感受到那些未必能用言语描述的东西，因为你远胜于你此刻拥有的物质大脑。我并非诗人，但正如鲁柏某首诗中所言，将大脑视为你围绕内在自体编织的网。这张网助你在时空世界中运作，它像任何蜘蛛网一样虚无缥缈、岌岌可危且精巧脆弱——同样处于危险的平衡中。你编织了它，然后感知世界，但你的视角极其狭小，你所感知的花园也极为私密。然而你拥有远为强大的感知能力。我希望你理解内在自体或灵魂的本质，因为它是其他实相从中涌现的实相焦点。它并非被囚禁在日、周、月甚至世纪这些微小的盒子里。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This sense of division within the self forces you to think that there is a remote, spiritual, wise, intuitive inner self, and a bewildered, put-upon, spiritually ignorant, inferior physical self, which happens to be the one you identify with. Many of you believe, moreover, that the physical self's very nature is evil, that its impulses, left alone, will run in direct opposition to the good of the physical world and society, and fly in the face of the deeper spiritual truths of inner reality. The inner self then becomes so idealized and so remote that by contrast the physical self seems only the more ignorant and flawed. In the face of such beliefs the ideal of psychic development, or astral travel, or spiritual knowledge, or even of sane living, seems so remote as to be impossible. You must, therefore, begin to celebrate your own beings, to look to your own impulses as being the natural connectors between the physical and the nonphysical self. Children trusting their impulses learn to walk, and trusting your impulses, you can find yourselves again.
quotes.translation: 自体内部的这种分裂感迫使你认为存在一个遥远、灵性、智慧、直觉的内在自体，以及一个困惑、受欺、灵性无知、低劣的物质自体，而你恰好认同于后者。此外，你们许多人相信物质自体的本质就是邪恶的，其冲动若不加约束，将直接违背物质世界与社会的福祉，并与内在实相的深层灵性真理背道而驰。于是内在自体被过度理想化、变得遥不可及，相形之下物质自体似乎更显无知与缺陷。面对这样的信念，心灵发展、星光体出游、灵性知识乃至健全生活的理想都显得遥不可及，甚至不可能实现。因此，你必须开始庆祝自身的存在，将你的冲动视为物质自体与非物质自体之间的自然连接器。信任自己冲动的孩子学会了走路，而信任你的冲动，你就能重新找到自己。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 872, AUGUST 8, 1979
9:15 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You must become more aware of your inner selves.... They are not all that horrible. You still fear, as our Lady of Venice, that there is a cellar door... a cellar door to your mind--to your inner self. And, if you open it, all sorts of demons will emerge. And if there are any angels, the demons will gobble them up before you get to see them. Instead, I tell you, as I have told you before, you are more than you know. And it is up to you to find your own reality. I cannot give it to you. I can point you in the direction... but the experience is personal and the experience is subjective and the journey is one that you must make and that you must make alone. I cannot make it for you. I have my own journeys to make... and detours here. And any problems that you have I have had them... so look at me and know how indestructible you are!
quotes.translation: 你必须更加觉察你的内在自体……它们并非那么可怕。你仍像我们的威尼斯女士一样，害怕存在一扇地窖门……通往你心灵——通往你内在自体的地窖门。一旦打开，各种恶魔就会涌现。即便有天使，恶魔也会在你见到它们之前将其吞噬。相反，我告诉你，正如我先前告诉你的，你比你所知的更伟大。而找到你自己的实相取决于你。我无法将它赐予你。我可以为你指明方向……但体验是私人的，体验是主观的，这段旅程必须由你亲自完成，且必须独自完成。我无法代你完成。我有自己的旅程要走……在此处还有绕行。你遇到的任何问题我都曾经历过……所以看着我，明白你是多么不可摧毁！
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There are many other natural and spontaneous kinds of comprehension that can also result from the waking and sleeping rhythms that I have suggested. The unconscious, the color black, and death all have strongly negative connotations in which the inner self is feared; the dream state is mistrusted and often suggests thoughts of both death and/or evil. But changed wake-sleep habits can, again, bring about a transformation in which it is obvious that dreams contain great wisdom and creativity, that the unconscious is indeed quite conscious, and that in fact the individual sense of identity can be retained in the dream state. The fear of self-annihilation, symbolically thought of as death, can then no longer apply as it did before.
quotes.translation: 还有许多其他自然且自发的理解方式，也能从我建议的清醒与睡眠节奏中产生。无意识、黑色与死亡在内在自体被恐惧时都具有强烈的负面含义；梦境状态不被信任，常令人联想到死亡和/或邪恶。但改变清醒-睡眠习惯同样能带来转变，使梦境显然蕴含巨大智慧与创造力，无意识确实相当有意识，并且个体身份感在梦境状态中也能得以保留。对自我湮灭的恐惧——象征性地被视为死亡——便不再能像从前那样发挥作用。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In other words, portions of the inner self have joined the strictly egotistical functions. The ego in such cases is so attuned that it becomes almost something else. We are coming here toward a definition of illumination in psychic terms. The ego is not, underlined, banished. It joins with portions of the inner self previously unconscious, and illuminates the whole personality. It is no longer primarily physically oriented. Therefore it is no longer an ego in the terms usually meant.
quotes.translation: 换言之，内在自我的部分已与严格自我中心的功能结合。在此类情况下，自我如此协调，以至于几乎变成了别的东西。我们正接近以心灵术语定义"开悟"。自我并非被划掉或驱逐。它与先前无意识的内在自我部分结合，照亮了整个个性。它不再主要面向物质世界。因此，它不再是通常意义上的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The confident inner self will let the ego manipulate in the physical world, but will not allow it to become fiercely overprotective. Your work contains the strength of your inner self in many ways. Your particular ego's function is to show this work to the world as you know it. I hesitate, and I mean this, to offer practical advice to one who tries to be so practical. But my dear Joseph, there is no true practicality in smothering your abilities by working in a position where you cannot use your abilities. You will not be paid for abilities you cannot use, since I know you must think in financial terms. Your ego's job is to help you trade your true abilities for your daily bread.
quotes.translation: 自信的内在自我会让自我在物质世界中运作，但不会允许它变得过度保护。你的作品在许多方面蕴含着内在自我的力量。你特定自我的功能，是将这作品展现给你所认知的世界。我犹豫着——且我是认真的——不愿向如此务实的人提供实际建议。但亲爱的约瑟夫，若你屈就于无法发挥才能的职位而窒息自身能力，这绝非真正的务实。既然我知道你不得不考虑财务问题，那么无法运用的才能自然无法带来报酬。你自我的职责，是助你用真实才能换取每日的面包。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: For this is a non interval to the inner self. This material is extremely important. One portion of you leaves the inner self to explore in depth a particular non interval. To the inner self no time passes. You experience of course physical time. This non interval however creates its own interval points that you also explore, in your dreams and waking projections that escape your ordinary consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因为这对内在自我而言是一个"非间隔"。这份资料极其重要。你的一部分离开内在自我，深入探索某个特定的非间隔。对内在自我而言，时间并未流逝。你当然会经历物质时间。然而，这个非间隔创造了它自身的间隔点，你也在梦境与脱离寻常意识的清醒投射中探索这些点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It then does not reincarnate again upon that plane. However because of its own extraordinary nature, it itself forms with the inner self in an added gestalt, adding to the energy and ability of the inner self; and in a manner which I cannot yet explain to you, it voluntarily may give up its ego identification to a large degree for the purpose of giving its full energies to the store of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 它随后不再于该层面转世。然而，因其非凡本质，它自身与内在自我形成一种叠加完形，增强了内在自我的能量与能力；并且以我尚无法向你解释的方式，它可能自愿在很大程度上放弃自我认同，以便将其全部能量贡献给内在自我的库存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (All with emphatic rhythm:) The inner self was too aware of its own multidimensionality, so in your terms it gave psychological birth to itself through the body in space and time. It knew itself as a physical creature. That portion of the self is the portion you recognize as your usual conscious self, alive within the scheme of seasons, aware within the designs of time, caught transfixed in moments of brilliant awareness, with civilizations that seem to come and go. That is the self that is alert in the dear preciseness of the moments, whose physical senses are bound to light and darkness, sound and touch. That is the self that lives the life of the body.
quotes.translation: （全部以强调的节奏说出：）内在自我太清楚自身的多维性，因此用你们的说法，它通过时空中的身体，在心理上诞生了自身。它将自己认知为物质生物。自我的这一部分，便是你认知为平常意识自我的部分，活在季节的框架中，在时间的格局里保持觉知，被璀璨觉知的瞬间所凝固，伴随着看似来去匆匆的文明。那是在珍贵时刻的精确性中保持警觉的自我，其物质感官与光明黑暗、声音触觉紧密相连。那是活出身体生命的自我。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It does originate in the inner self that exists in your world, but is not of your world. The inner self-conscious ego as I have said--and this is for Philip's edification--the inner self-conscious ego can be compared to another face, looking out upon a different world. And yet it is the driving personality and force in your world, and you use its energy as you construct your camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 它确实源自存在于你们世界、却不属于你们世界的内在自我。内在自我意识——正如我所说，这是为了菲利普的启发——内在自我意识可以比作另一张面孔，正望向不同的世界。然而，它是你们世界中的驱动人格与力量，当你们构建伪装模式时，你们运用它的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In each dimension the inner self begins to handle further aspects of reality. The primary personality must therefore deal with a much larger number of perceptions, while still maintaining its identity. It manipulates in a larger number of dimensions, until it is able you see to handle many, not just one, of its own egos at any given "time"--and you may put time in quotes--while still maintaining its own inner stability and individuality. It takes on more roles, you see, and the psychological structure becomes more complicated as the inner self becomes sure enough of itself to admit ever more stimuli, while still retaining its own core.
quotes.translation: 在每一维度中，内在自体开始处理实相的进一步面向。因此，主要人格必须处理远为大量的感知，同时仍维持其身份。它在更多维度中运作，直到它——你看——能够在任何给定的"时间"（你可以给时间加上引号）处理多个（而非仅一个）自己的自我，同时仍维持自身的内在稳定与个体性。它承担更多角色，你看，随着内在自体对自己足够确信，能够接纳越来越多的刺激，同时仍保留其核心，心理结构也变得更加复杂。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Once before, in the first and 18th envelope experiments, an object was used that was similar but not identical by any means. In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: This book is Seth's way of demonstrating that human personality is multidimensional, that we exist in many realities at once, that the soul or inner self is not something apart from us, but the very medium in which we exist. He emphasizes that "truth" is not found by going from teacher to teacher, church to church, or discipline to discipline, but by looking within the self. The intimate knowledge of consciousness, the "secrets of the universe," are not esoteric truths to be hidden from the people, then. Such information is as natural to man as air, and as available to those who honestly seek it by looking to the source within.
quotes.translation: 这本书是赛斯展示人类人格是多维度的方式，我们同时存在于许多实相中，灵魂或内在自体并非与我们分离之物，而是我们存在的媒介本身。他强调"真理"并非通过从一个老师到另一个老师、从一个教堂到另一个教堂、或从一个法门到另一个法门而找到，而是通过向内审视自体而获得。那么，对意识的亲密知识、"宇宙的奥秘"，并非要隐藏于人们的深奥真理。这样的信息对人类而言如同空气般自然，并且对那些通过向内寻求源头而诚实寻找的人而言，同样可得。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: Consciousness cannot be separated from mobility. It is true that you focus within the physical system mainly, yet the inner self is highly mobile and embarks simultaneously upon a variety of projections. The closest example in your experience of this mobility is the dream situation. These dreams make little impression upon the waking consciousness unless you train it and take it with you as far as it can go. It is then able to translate the dream reality at least in part. In the psychedelic experience the ego can be trained to act in the same manner. Later it can serve as an interpreter.
quotes.translation: 意识无法与流动性分离。诚然，你主要聚焦于物质系统之内，然而内在自体高度流动，并同时展开各种投射。在你经验中最接近这种流动性的例子是梦境情境。这些梦境对醒时意识几乎不留下印象，除非你训练它，并尽可能带它同行。它随后至少能部分翻译梦境实相。在迷幻体验中，自我可以被训练以同样方式运作。之后它可以充当翻译者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner self chooses from its available potential personalities the one that it finds most adequate. Sometimes it simply makes an error, for the inner self is not a perfected thing, any more than the ego is. But identity does exist, and the ego is but a pseudo identity formed for utilitarian reasons, and as such it is of course a part of the basic identity from which it springs.
quotes.translation: 内在自体从其可用的潜在人格中选择它认为最合适的一个。有时它只是犯了个错误，因为内在自体并非完美之物，正如自我也不是。但身份确实存在，而自我不过是为实用目的而形成的伪身份，因此它当然是从其所源出的基本身份的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There is an involvement that would seem, would seem, intense. The ego appears to be extremely intense, but to a large degree this is a deception, for the intenseness is caused by the attempt of the ego not to become involved with action, unless the ego can dominate action. There is no basic trust of the inner self. The personality does not basically recognize or trust the ability of the inner self, and this results in an intense inhibited fear.
quotes.translation: 有一种参与，看起来，看起来，很强烈。自我显得极其强烈，但在很大程度上这是一种欺骗，因为这种强烈是由自我试图不参与行动（除非自我能主导行动）所导致的。对内在自体没有基本的信任。人格基本上不承认或不信任内在自体的能力，这导致了一种强烈的抑制性恐惧。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The dramas themselves do express certain inner realities, and they serve as surface reminders to those who do not trust direct experience with the inner self. They will take the symbols as reality. When they discover that this is not so, they feel betrayed. Christ spoke in terms of the father and son because in your terms, at that time, this was the method used -- the story he told to explain the relationship between the inner self and the physically-alive individual. No new religion really startles anyone, for the drama has already been played subjectively.
quotes.translation: 这些戏剧本身确实表达了某些内在实相，它们作为表面的提醒，给那些不信任与内在自体直接经验的人。他们会把象征当作实相。当他们发现并非如此时，便感到被背叛。基督以父与子的方式说话，因为在你们那个时代，这是所用的方法——他讲述的故事，用以解释内在自体与肉身存活个体之间的关系。没有新宗教真正震惊任何人，因为那戏剧早已在主观上被演出过了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You are meant to understand the nature of your inner self, and to manifest it outward. As this is done, the exterior circumstances should change for the better as the inner self becomes more aware of its own nature and capabilities. Theoretically, then, in each life you would become stronger, healthier, wealthier, and wiser, but it does not work that way, for many reasons. As mentioned earlier, many personalities adopt different kinds of experiences, focusing upon development in certain specific areas, and ignoring others perhaps for a series of lives.
quotes.translation: 你本应理解内在自我的本质，并将其向外彰显。随着内在自我逐渐意识到自身的本质与能力，外在环境理应随之改善。理论上，每一世生命你都会变得更强健、更健康、更富足、更智慧，但实际运作并非如此，原因众多。如前所述，许多人格会采用不同种类的体验，专注于某些特定领域的发展，而可能连续数世忽略其他领域。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Looked at merely as an example of unconscious production, however, Seth's book clearly shows that organization, discrimination, and reasoning are certainly not qualities of the conscious mind alone, and demonstrates the range and activity of which the inner self is capable. I do not believe that I could get the equivalent of Seth's book on my own. The best I could do would be to hit certain high points, perhaps in isolated poems or essays, and they would lack the overall unity, continuity, and organization that Seth has here provided automatically.
quotes.translation: 然而，仅作为无意识产物的范例来看，赛斯的著作清楚显示：组织、辨别与推理绝非意识心独有的特质，并展现了内在自我所能达到的范围与活动力。我不认为自己能凭一己之力写出赛斯这样的书。我最多只能触及某些高点，或许在零散的诗文里，但它们会缺乏赛斯在此自动提供的整体统一性、连贯性与组织性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: So should man's ego be. When man's ego turns instead into a shell, when instead of interpreting outside conditions it reacts too violently against them, then it hardens, becomes an imprisoning form that begins to snuff out important data, and to keep enlarging information from the inner self. The purpose of the ego is protective. It is also a device to enable the inner self to inhabit the physical plane. It is in other words a camouflage.
quotes.translation: 人类的自我也应如此。当人类的自我反而变成硬壳，当它非但不诠释外界状况，反而过度激烈地对抗它们时，它就会硬化，成为禁锢的形式，开始扼杀重要资料，并持续阻隔来自内在自我的信息。自我的目的是保护性的。它也是让内在自我得以栖身物质层面的装置。换言之，它是一种伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It has its own possibilities of development and achievement. This should not be forgotten, and all potential egos have, also, their own possibilities. The inner self or identity must express itself through its ego in order to manipulate within physical reality. The inner self is composed of all the potential egos that compose it, but it is more than the sum of these.
quotes.translation: 它自有其发展与成就的可能性。这点不应被遗忘，所有潜在的自我也各自拥有其可能性。内在自我或本体必须通过其自我来表达自己，以便在物质实相中运作。内在自我由构成它的所有潜在自我组成，但它大于这些自我的总和。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Still, to the unconscious the problem has been set and given. In the following deep protected areas of sleep, the higher centers of the inner self are allowed to function and come to the aid of the three-dimensionally oriented portion of the personality. This more liberated self sees the situation much more clearly, suggests a given line of action (but does not order it), and informs the dreaming self. The dreaming self then manufactures a group of dreams in which the solution is stated within a symbolic dream situation.
quotes.translation: 尽管如此，问题已被设定并交付给无意识。在睡眠的深层保护区中，内在自我的较高中心得以运作，并前来协助人格中面向三维的部分。这个更解放的自我能更清晰地看清情境，建议（而非命令）特定的行动路线，并告知做梦的自我。做梦的自我随后制造出一组梦境，在其中，解决方案被陈述于象征性的梦境情境里。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have also explained how energy is transformed, and changes, adapting itself to the particular camouflage pattern of any given plane. Now in these tests you will reach the inner self. The results will be, then, valid in physical terms. The emotions are the outer extensions of the inner senses, and it is therefore through the intuitions and traveling, the traveling of the pathways of the emotions, that you will come in contact with the inner self, and therefore be able to carry back this information in the same manner.
quotes.translation: 我也解释过能量如何转化与改变，以适应任何特定层面的伪装模式。现在，在这些测试中，你将触及内在自我。其结果在物质层面上也将是有效的。情绪是内在感官的外向延伸，因此，正是通过直觉与情感路径的旅行，你才会与内在自我接触，从而能够以同样的方式带回这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As you know the subconscious is an extension into your field of the inner self, and with those so talented the subconscious, when correctly referred to, will lead to hard facts of the inner universe, with which every inner self is thoroughly acquainted. You at least do not swaddle and suffocate what I say in veils of pseudo religion, and for this I am thankful.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，潜意识是内在自我向你们场域的延伸，对那些天赋异禀者而言，当潜意识被正确引导时，将引向内在宇宙的坚实真相——每个内在自我对此都了如指掌。至少你没有用伪宗教的面纱包裹并窒息我所说的话，对此我深表感激。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner self is in a state of constant growth. The inner portion of each man, therefore, projected this knowledge outward. The need, the psychological and spiritual need of the species, demanded both interior and exterior alterations of great import. Qualities of mercy and understanding that had been buried could now surface. Not only privately but en masse they surged up, adding a new impetus and giving a natural "new" direction -- beginning to call all portions of the self, as it knew itself, together.
quotes.translation: 内在自我处于持续成长的状态。因此每个人的内在部分将这种知识向外投射。该物种的心理与灵性需求，要求内外兼具的重大变革。曾被埋藏的慈悲与理解的特质如今得以浮现。它们不仅私下涌现，更集体喷薄而出，注入新动力并赋予自然的"新"方向——开始召唤自我认知中的各个部分重新聚合。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is the physical materialization of the inner self, but it is not meant to snuff out the inner self. If for example our tree bark grew fearful of the stormy weather and began to harden itself against the elements, in a well-meaning but distorted protective spirit, then the tree would die. The sunlight and so forth could never penetrate. The sap could not move upward for the trunk would solidify through and through, trying all the while to protect, and killing the tree with its obsessive kindness.
quotes.translation: 它是内在自我的物质显化，但并非要扼杀内在自我。举例而言，若树皮因畏惧暴风雨而开始硬化自身以对抗自然力，出于善意却扭曲的保护本能，这棵树终将死亡。阳光等能量将永远无法穿透。树液无法向上输送，因为树干会彻底固化，始终试图保护，却以执着的善意杀死这棵树。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now, if you will follow me closely you will obtain a hint at least of the structure of the inner self. It is composed, that is, each inner self is composed, structurally of a particular range of electrical intensities with which various personalities have their identities insured, since their identity is composed of particular intensities within the range.
quotes.translation: 现在，若你紧随我的思路，至少能窥见内在自我的结构。每个内在自我在结构上由特定范围的电磁强度构成，各种人格的身份由此得到保障——因为其身份正是由该范围内的特定强度所组成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am sure you see the many places that this can lead us. For one thing, psychological time is so much a part of inner reality that even though your inner self is still connected to the physical body, you are in the dream framework free of some very important physical effects. Now as your dreams seem to involve you in duration that is independent of your clock time, and I have much more to say here, so can you achieve the actual experience of duration as far as your inner visions are concerned.
quotes.translation: 我确信你已看到这能引领我们走向的诸多方向。首先，心理时间如此深刻地属于内在实相，以至于即便你的内在自我仍与肉体相连，在梦境架构中你已摆脱某些重要物理效应的影响。正如你的梦境似乎让你经历独立于时钟时间的持续状态（对此我还有很多要阐述），就内在视野而言，你同样能获得持续性的真实体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Egos concept of itself as a rock of unchanging identity is highly ludicrous, since its perceptions constantly change it from what it was. It is not a thing proceeding, by any means. This is not to deny the human aspects of the ego, for the ego is also somewhat like a light carried in front of the inner self, a light that gives meaning to the physical universe and to its objects. It enables the inner self to manipulate within physical reality. It translates outer data to the inner personality.
quotes.translation: 自我将自身视为永恒不变的身份基石，这种认知极其荒谬，因为它的感知不断将其从原有状态改变。它绝非持续前进的实体。这并非否定自我的人性面向——自我也像内在自我前方擎起的一盏明灯，为物质宇宙及其物体赋予意义。它使内在自我得以在物质实相中运作，将外在数据转译给内在人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I have explained to you how the inner self is connected to the present personality, and how the emotions at your end change through the layers of the subconscious, begin in your plane as parts of the personality, and as part of your force field, and then are transformed and become the innersense connective that connects the outer ego to the inner self.
quotes.translation: 我曾向你们解释过，内在自我如何与当前人格相连，以及你们这一端的情绪如何通过潜意识各层发生变化，在你们层面作为人格的一部分和你们力场的一部分开始，然后被转化，成为连接外在自我与内在自我的内在感官连接。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: An occurrence only remotely approaching this can be disastrous. Not because it is basically undesirable, for such an experience has the greatest potentials for development of the self. Such experiences can be disastrous simply because the self structure is not yet strong enough to assimilate and contain the intensity of the experience. In many cases dream experiences, as I have mentioned, are much more vivid and intense than waking experience. You do not even remember the majority of these. But the inner self is more flexible, you see, than the ego, and it can therefore contain greater intensities without undue alarm.
quotes.translation: 任何勉强接近这种体验的情况都可能是灾难性的。并非因为它本质上不可取，因为这样的体验对自我发展具有最大的潜力。这种体验之所以可能是灾难性的，仅仅是因为自我结构还不够强大，无法吸收和容纳这种体验的强度。正如我所提到的，在许多情况下，梦境体验比清醒体验更加生动和强烈。你们甚至不记得其中大部分。但内在自我比自我更具灵活性，你们看，因此它能容纳更大的强度而不会过度惊慌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Such developments would mean the releasing and availability of added energy into your field, that would have endless possibilities in all directions. Ideas and concepts are nonphysical actualities that attract unaligned energy, direct and concentrate it. The dream world exists more closely in that spacious present of which the inner self is so aware. It is not as involved with camouflage constructions as your own universe, and its actions are somewhat limited within its own framework.
quotes.translation: 这样的发展将意味着释放额外的能量并使其进入你们的场域，这将在各个方向上拥有无限的可能性。思想和概念是非物质的实相，它们吸引未对齐的能量，引导并集中它。梦境世界更贴近于那个内在自我如此熟悉的广阔当下。它不像你们自己的宇宙那样涉及伪装建构，其行动在其自身框架内也受到一定限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Incidentally, if it is not now known by your scientists, it will be shortly discovered that the physical organism does not age in sleep at the same rate at which it ages in the waking state. Aging, therefore, is not a primary. Again, this does not mean that secondary conditions such as aging and gravity and clock time, do not have effects within your system, obviously. It is only that these must be recognized as secondary conditions that do not therefore basically （underlined） affect the inner self, which is to a large degree independent of your system.
quotes.translation: 顺便说一句，如果你们的科学家现在还不知道，那么很快就会发现，身体有机体在睡眠中的老化速度与清醒状态不同。因此，老化并非首要条件。再次强调，这并不意味着次要条件，如老化、重力和时钟时间，在你们系统内没有影响，这显然是有影响的。只是必须认识到这些是次要条件，因此它们基本上（划线强调）不影响内在自我，而内在自我在很大程度上独立于你们的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The inner self or the whole personality consists of many such egos, as you know, but the inner self is also aware of itself as something more than the sum of its parts. Now this something more than the sum of its parts is a curious phrase, but within it lies a key that can give you some small understanding of what God may be.
quotes.translation: 内在自我或完整人格由许多这样的自我组成，如你们所知，但内在自我也意识到自己不仅仅是其各部分的总和。现在，这个“不仅仅是其各部分的总和”是一个奇特的短语，但其中蕴含着一把钥匙，能让你们对神可能是什么有一些微小的理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: To begin with, Augustus was brought up to believe that the inner self was dangerous, that individuals reacted because of inner conflicts over which they had little conscious control. (Gesturing:) He believed that the individual personality was relatively powerless to understand itself and that it stood precariously alone and undefended, with a chasm of evil beneath and with an unattainable, cold, just, but not compassionate Good (with a capital "G") above.
quotes.translation: 首先，奥古斯都从小被教导认为内在自我是危险的，个体之所以有反应，是因为内在冲突，而他们对这些冲突几乎没有意识控制。（做手势：）他相信个体人格相对无力理解自己，并且它危险地孤立无援，下方是邪恶的深渊，上方是一个不可企及、冷酷、公正但无慈悲的善（大写“G”）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The inner self is intimately connected with each reality, though you are not aware of it, and the inner self can trace its own connections through the network of any existence, and still keep its identity. When we speak then of the beginnings of your system, we speak only in consideration of your own ideas of time.
quotes.translation: 内在自体与每一个实相都紧密相连，尽管你并未察觉，而内在自体能通过任何存在的网络追溯自身的联系，同时仍保持其身份。因此当我们谈论你们系统的起源时，我们只是就你们自己的时间观念而言。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now you have indeed been doing well. And I do congratulate you. You are too impatient both with your own development and the development of others. You want your destination now and you want to get to that destination as quickly as possible, 8595 miles a minute, you see. You have given yourself several traffic tickets. Now, you have learned a good deal, and I know that you have tried. It does no good to understand issues intellectually, however, or even to understand them intuitively unless you understand them so thoroughly that they become a part of your daily life. Much that you know you have made a part of your life, but you still wish to use your knowledge for your own conscious purposes. You are still not willing to say let me develop as I should develop. You are still saying let me develop as I think I should develop. The I being a highly egotistical I. You are still saying, let me develop as I want to develop. You are still saying I want this person or I want that person or that thing. Therefore shall I use this ability and this knowledge to gai，，n it. And that is why you have given yourself a traffic ticket now and then。What you are learning is a technique for self development. You cannot use it, therefore, to attain those things that do not pertain to your own self development and the techniques will not help you get something that you were not meant to have nor that you have before decided as an entity that you should not have. I will leave specifics for later. Nevertheless, the facts remain that your own inner self and your own entity have given you challenges that you have accepted. Now you know these challenges; subconsciously you are aware of them. Consciously you do not want to accept them and this is one reason why you have had difficulty with the pendulum. This is not out of the ordinary. This happens to many personalities. It is nothing to blame yourself for. You are certainly in the midst of a certain line of development. You cannot blame yourself for not being further along the line. The very fact that you are here this evening, the very fact that you are trying as hard as you have been shows that you are indeed developing and that you are indeed learning. There must be an open-minded, an openhearted attitude here. You must not try to use what you have learned in a narrow, limiting way. This hampers your own development. It closes your eyes to many possibilities that will be important to you. It is natural, perhaps, to want to use what you have learned, this information, as a technique to achieve what you at any particular time think desirable, a particular person, a particular thing. But what is important is the inner development. If this is taken care of, it will automatically lead you to the person that is best for you and to the circumstances that will help you develop. To insist that a specific individual or a specific goal be attained through these methods is limiting. There must always be the acknowledgement that you do not consciously as yet realize the depths of yourself, the goals you have set and the challenges, and this material should be used to open up your inner horizons and to lead you in those directions toward which your inner self has already set you. If you then egotistically, say--No--this particular situation is what I want, then you may be blocking the inner direction which has been meant for you. I said I would discuss some particular material and so I shall shortly. But the inner attitude is far more important. I suggest, Joseph, that you take a break and I shall continue.
quotes.translation: 现在你们确实做得很好。我确实要祝贺你们。你们对自己和他人的发展都太缺乏耐心。你们现在就想要到达目的地，并且想以最快速度到达那里，每分钟8595英里，你们明白吗。你们已经给自己开了好几张交通罚单。现在，你们学到了很多东西，我知道你们努力过。然而，光在理智上理解问题是没有用的，甚至直觉上理解也没有用，除非你们理解得如此透彻，以至于它们成为你们日常生活的一部分。你们所知道的许多东西已经成为了你们生活的一部分，但你们仍然希望为自己的有意识目的而运用这些知识。你们仍然不愿意说：让我按照我应该发展的方式发展。你们仍然在说：让我按照我认为我应该发展的方式发展。这个"我"是一个高度自我中心的"我"。你们仍然在说：让我按照我想要的方式发展。你们仍然在说：我要这个人，或我要那个人，或那个东西。因此我要用这种能力和这种知识来获得它。这就是为什么你们时不时给自己开一张交通罚单。你们正在学习的是自我发展的技巧。因此你们不能用它来获得那些与你们自身自我发展无关的东西，这些技巧也不会帮助你们得到那些你们本不该拥有、或你们作为存有之前就决定不该拥有的东西。具体细节我稍后再谈。然而，事实仍然是：你们的内在自体和你们自己的存有给了你们挑战，而你们接受了这些挑战。现在你们知道这些挑战；潜意识里你们意识到它们。有意识层面你们不想接受它们，这就是你们用灵摆遇到困难的原因之一。这并不反常。这种情况发生在许多人格身上。这不是你们应该自责的事。你们当然正处于某条发展路线之中。你们不能因为还没有走得更远而自责。你们今晚在这里的事实，你们一直在努力的事实，都表明你们确实在发展，确实在学习。这里必须有一种开放的心态、开放的心胸。你们不能试图以狭隘、限制的方式运用你们所学到的东西。这会阻碍你们自身的发展。它会蒙蔽你们的眼睛，使你们看不到许多对你们重要的可能性。也许很自然，你们想用所学到的这些信息作为一种技巧，来获得你们在任何特定时刻认为可取的东西——某个特定的人、某个特定的物。但重要的是内在的发展。如果这一点得到了关照，它会自动引导你们走向最适合你们的人，以及有助于你们发展的环境。坚持要通过这些方法达到某个特定的个体或特定的目标，是有限制性的。必须始终承认：你们有意识层面尚未认识到自身的深度、你们设定的目标和挑战，而这份资料应该用来打开你们内在的视野，引导你们走向内在自体已经为你们设定的方向。如果你们然后自我中心地说——不——这个特定的情况就是我想要的，那么你们可能正在阻挡本应为你们准备的内在方向。我说过我会讨论一些特定的资料，我很快就会讲。但内在的态度要重要得多。我建议，约瑟夫，你休息一下，我继续讲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (I thought it a good idea that this be the end of the session, however, Seth came through again at 10:30 as the three of us sat talking about various things. A humorous repartee followed, with Seth answering our questions on a variety of subjects. Two serious notes: Alice Butts, who died last week, has already visited my father. And Dr. Instream, who would say "There is no Seth, " has not much longer to live. Also -- Bill Gallagher will not see certain truths about himself etc. Alice Butts not helping Ruth Butts ' son, etc. See Session 398.)

quotes.text: You spoke earlier of tragedies, and I do not understand you. Great work stands alone. It is a triumph of the human spirit, and it always grows out of experience. As an egotistical creature, alone, you would not choose the experience, even though great work resulted from it. (Smile, and intent delivery.) Learning involves your whole being. Great work is a result of great learning. It is not the result of seeing easy answers scribbled magically upon a blackboard. The flowers thrust themselves up through soil, but they hardly consider the soil or thrusting a tragedy, nor resent the time spent in the frozen earth, for they realize the frozen earth is a condition of their blossoming--a challenge that is an aid, not a hindrance. The light does not resent the darkness which it illuminates, you see? Your inner self is aware of this.
quotes.translation: 你刚才谈到悲剧，我不理解你。伟大的作品是独立的。它是人类精神的胜利，而且总是从经验中成长出来。作为一个孤立的自我中心生物，你不会选择那种经验，即使伟大的作品从中产生。（微笑，专注地传达。）学习涉及你的整个存在。伟大的作品是伟大学习的结果。它不是看到轻松答案神奇地潦草写在黑板上的结果。花朵从土壤中奋力钻出，但它们几乎不会考虑土壤或钻出是悲剧，也不会怨恨在冰冻土地中度过的时光，因为它们明白冰冻的土地是它们绽放的条件——一个挑战，是助力而非阻碍。光明不会怨恨它所照亮的黑暗，你明白吗？你的内在自体知道这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The inner self is always aware of the hidden mechanisms of these family gestalts. Those who have been closely bound through emotional ties often prefer to remain in closely tied or loosely tied physical relationships that continue through many lifetimes. New relationships are always encouraged however, for you can have ingrown reincarnational "families." Many of these form physical organizations that are actually manifestations of inner groupings.
quotes.translation: 内在自体始终知道这些家族完形的隐藏机制。那些通过情感纽带紧密相连的人，往往更愿意保持紧密或松散联系的物理关系，这些关系会延续许多世。然而，新的关系总是受到鼓励，因为你们可能会有内生的转世"家族"。许多这样的家族形成了物理组织，这些组织实际上是内在群体的显现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: At the same time, the inner self will transmit to the conscious mind insights and intuitions meant to clear its sight. But if you believe that the inner self is dangerous and not to be trusted, if you are afraid of dreams or any intrusive psychic material, then you deny this help and turn aside from it.
quotes.translation: 同时，内在自体会向意识心传递旨在澄清其视界的洞见和直觉。但如果你相信内在自体是危险的、不可信赖的，如果你害怕梦境或任何侵入性的通灵材料，那么你就拒绝了这种帮助，并转身避开它。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: He projected a meaninglessness upon reality, and then fell prey to it. Here the senses themselves can help revive him. (Long pause.) He seems now to be choosing between identities, but there is one waiting for him, and it is a probable ego that he did not adopt as a child. He has been plunged back into a physical universe that he would not accept even as a valid mirage. This time he will be able to find himself within it. (Long pause.) In his case he must accept himself as a human being before he can hope to discover the inner self. The ego got no help from him, and it could not carry on alone. There was a definite splitting of personality elements, and a complete abandonment by the inner self of the ego.
quotes.translation: 他将无意义投射到实相上，然后成为其牺牲品。在这里，感官本身可以帮助他复苏。（长时间停顿。）他现在似乎在选择身份之间，但有一个身份在等待他，那是他童年时没有采纳的一个可能自我。他被抛回一个他甚至不愿接受为有效幻象的物理宇宙。这一次他将能够在这个宇宙中找到自己。（长时间停顿。）就他而言，他必须先接受自己作为人类，然后才有希望发现内在自体。自我没有得到他的帮助，它无法独自支撑。人格元素出现了明确的分裂，内在自体完全抛弃了自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It knows full well its own indestructibility, and that of its fellows. What happens in the case of constructive psychic energy when it is purposely denied aggressive outlets? It finds out. What does it feel like to be the brunt of aggression? It forms another life situation and discovers the answer. How strong and potent is the energy that is at its command? How can it best be used? It is quite necessary that all of these questions be answered, for the inner self is composed of energy, and in other fields of activity thoughts and emotions are instantaneously translated, their results instantly seen. There is no saving time lag, as within your own system, and there is no physical body such as you know it.
quotes.translation: 它深知自身及同伴的不可毁灭性。当建设性的心灵能量被刻意剥夺攻击性出口时会发生什么？它会去探索。承受攻击的滋味如何？它会构建另一个人生情境并找到答案。它掌控的能量有多强大？如何最佳运用？这些问题都必须得到解答，因为内在自体由能量构成，在其他活动领域中，思想与情感会瞬间转化为可见的结果。不像你们系统内存在时间差，也没有你们所知的物质身体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is true that the inner self in the last analysis is the durable self. Nevertheless the various outer egos are extremely important, and without them the inner self would be blocked. Nor are these inner abilities as a rule ever left unfulfilled. The outer egos are not gobbled up, so to speak, after a particular existence, but remain in control of those characteristics and abilities which they have been so important in forming and training.
quotes.translation: 归根结底，内在自体确实是持久性的自体。然而各种外在自我极其重要，没有它们内在自体将受阻。这些内在能力通常也绝不会被闲置。可以说，外在自我在特定存在结束后不会被吞噬，而是继续掌控那些它们曾费心塑造与训练的特质与能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your ego is now focused within this reality. You have other egos focused in other realities. The inner self is aware of what is being done in all of these realities. There is some compensation, and the race knows this. Ruburt wrote that there were clumps of consciousness, and of course he is correct. You are a part of many such clumps of consciousness. The abilities and potentials are not only being developed in this system but in others.
quotes.translation: 你的自我目前聚焦于这个实相。你在其他实相中还有其他自我。内在自体知晓所有实相中的活动。种族知道这存在某种补偿机制。鲁柏写道存在意识团块，他当然正确。你是许多这类意识团块的一部分。能力与潜能不仅在此系统发展，也在其他系统中发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is extremely difficult, I should imagine. Nevertheless, even when an inner self has sent out a new outer ego upon a new camouflage venture, the previous ego is still afforded an almost unlimited avenue for development. There are many possibilities for it. It can choose to remain what it is, one ego. It will then remain in a somewhat subordinate position to the inner self, but in no more of a subordinate position than it was earlier.
quotes.translation: 这应该极其难以理解。不过，即使内在自体已派出新的外在自我进行新的伪装冒险，先前的自我仍拥有几乎无限的发展途径。它有许多可能性：可以选择保持原状，作为一个自我存在。届时它将处于比内在自体稍低的从属位置，但不会比早期更从属。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: An individual inner self, then, through constant massive effort of great creative intensity, cooperates with all other inner selves to form and maintain the physical reality that you know, so that physical reality is an offshoot or by-product of (Pause), the highly conscious creative inner self.
quotes.translation: 因此，个体内在自体通过持续且强烈的创造性努力，与所有其他内在自体合作，形成并维持你们所知的物质实相，使得物质实相成为（停顿）高度自觉的创造性内在自体的分支或副产品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When this occurs you will be able to use your normal abilities in addition to other abilities used while in the dream state itself. You will be certain of your identity. You will realize that your physical self is sleeping, or in a dream state, and that the inner self is fully awake. Now this represents a definite increase in the scope of consciousness, and a considerable expansion over the usual limitations set by you upon the self.
quotes.translation: 当这种情况发生时，你将能在梦境状态中运用正常能力之外的其他能力。你将确信自己的身份。你会意识到物质自体正在睡眠或处于梦境状态，而内在自体完全清醒。这代表了意识范畴的明确扩展，以及对你通常加诸自体的限制的显著超越。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: If you have become afraid of emotion or the expression of feeling, or if you have been taught that the inner self is no more than a repository of uncivilized impulses, then you may have the habit of denying this deep rhythm. You may try to operate as if it did not exist, or even try to refute it. But it represents your deepest, most creative impulses; to fight against it is like trying to swim upstream against a strong current.
quotes.translation: 如果你变得害怕情绪或情感的表达，或者你被教导内在自我不过是未开化冲动的储存库，那么你可能养成了否认这种深沉节奏的习惯。你可能会试图表现得好像它不存在，甚至试图反驳它。但它代表了你最深层、最具创造性的冲动；与它对抗就像逆流而上游泳一样困难。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many who write want to develop and use the same abilities, yet it is obvious from their letters that their beliefs prevent them from trusting the inner self enough. You cannot fear your own being and expect to travel through it, to explore its dimensions. First you must take the simple step of affirming your identity. That affirmation will release those attributes that you have and open up new avenues of experience. They will and must be your own. When you ask others to interpret your dreams, for example, you are automatically putting the fulfillment of your own potentials a step away. When you ask another to tell you the direction of your life, then to some extent you keep from yourself the realization that you yourself possess it. Without that awareness no methods will help you.
quotes.translation: 许多写作的人想要发展和运用同样的能力，但从他们的来信中明显看出，他们的信念阻止了他们足够信任内在自我。你不能害怕自己的存在，却期望穿越它、探索它的维度。首先你必须采取简单的步骤来肯定自己的身份。这种肯定将释放你所拥有的那些特质，并开辟新的经验途径。这些特质将是且必须是你自己的。例如，当你请别人解读你的梦境时，你自动地将自己潜能的实现推远了一步。当你请别人告诉你人生的方向时，你在某种程度上阻止了自己意识到你本身就拥有这种方向。没有这种觉知，任何方法都帮不了你。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The nonphysical personality does not think in terms of words, but experiences concepts in a much more direct manner. This sort of thing simply could not be understood by the physically focused individual ... The survival personality's inner self gives this reassembled ego ideas in the same way that, often, the subconscious gives the ego concepts in physical existence. This reassembled ego then attempts to perceive these insights in terms of sense perceptions, which are sent to the physical individual at the other end. Sometimes the communications are made directly, though they must be sifted through the subconscious of the one who is physical. When that person is trained along these lines, however [as Ruburt is], he or she helps in this process, and a psychological framework, like a bridge,22 is erected that serves to connect the two personalities.
quotes.translation: 非肉体人格并不以文字思考，而是以更直接的方式体验概念。这种情形根本无法被专注于肉体的个体所理解……存续人格的内在自我以类似的方式给予这个重组自我想法，就像在物质存在中潜意识常常给予自我概念一样。这个重组自我随后试图以感官知觉的方式来感知这些洞见，这些知觉被传送到另一端的肉体个体。有时这些沟通是直接进行的，尽管它们必须通过肉体者的潜意识来筛选。然而，当这个人在这方面受过训练时（就像鲁柏那样），他或她会协助这个过程，并建立起一个心理框架，像一座桥梁，用以连接这两个人格。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: These dreams go unrecognized by the conscious ego; but they do not go unrecorded by the inner self, and they therefore exist, and they form electromagnetic channels of their own to which--make that by which--the physical body itself is affected. The physical organism is constantly changed by all stimuli, whether or not the ego is aware of the stimuli. And it is affected by stimuli, whether or not science realizes that the particular stimuli even exists. Therefore, the physical organism reacts to this continuous unconscious Mental activity in the form of continuing dream experiences, whether or not the individual is awake or asleep. All of these realities go into the formation of the personality, and unless they are all understood the personality itself will remain a mystery.
quotes.translation: 这些梦境不被意识自我所认知；但它们不会被内在自我所忽略，因此它们存在，并形成它们自己的电磁通道——通过这些通道，肉体本身受到影响。肉体组织不断被所有刺激所改变，无论自我是否意识到这些刺激。而且它受到刺激的影响，无论科学是否意识到这些特定刺激的存在。因此，肉体组织以持续梦境体验的形式对这种持续的无意识心智活动做出反应，无论个体是醒着还是睡着。所有这些实相都参与人格的形成，除非它们都被理解，否则人格本身将始终是一个谜。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The basic consciousness is never physical. Yet within your system it must collect experience within the physical system, hence the physical body. But experience itself is not physical, and cannot be contained within physical matter. Therefore this experience, collected within the physical field, is held in codified form by this inner self or astral identity. It is only by understanding the connection between the physical and nonphysical self, and the communication systems that operate here, that the true nature of human personality can be studied. While we are dealing now with your own species, it should be realized that all consciousness also possesses its own astral identity. The inner senses are part of this nonphysical self. They allow the personality to retain its relationship with nonphysical reality, permitting the material self to focus within its earthly environment.
quotes.translation: 基本意识从来不是物质的。然而，在你的系统中，它必须在物质系统内收集经验，因此有了肉体。但经验本身不是物质的，也不能被包含在物质中。因此，在物质领域收集的这种经验，以编码形式被这个内在自我或星光身份所保存。只有通过理解物质与非我自我之间的联系，以及在此运作的沟通系统，才能研究人类人格的真实本质。虽然我们现在讨论的是你们自己的物种，但应该认识到所有意识也拥有自己的星光身份。内在感官是这非我自我的一部分。它们允许人格保持与非物质实相的关系，使物质自我能够聚焦在其尘世环境中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: He tries at times to use a schedule, a disciplined schedule as a fence against the subconscious, and becomes panic-stricken imagining himself without it. This is not to say that a schedule in itself is not good, it is to say that he can and sometimes does misuse one. In these instances the time is actually used to clamp down on the inner self, rather than to release it. These outings will be of benefit here, not only because they allow for spontaneous interaction, but because they serve to break the schedules in ways that do not disturb working hours. They provide a beginning for a habit of release. Here the ego is helping us now, for it is sticking to these plans, and the plans are those the ego itself enjoys, and can accept. He has been afraid to simply sit and think, for fear of letting the spontaneous self show without the symbolized writing mechanism.
quotes.translation: 他有时试图使用时间表，一个严格的时间表作为对抗潜意识的围栏，并想象没有它就会惊慌失措。这并不是说时间表本身不好，而是说他能够并且有时确实误用了它。在这些情况下，时间实际上被用来压制内在自我，而不是释放它。这些外出活动将对此有益，不仅因为它们允许自发的互动，而且因为它们有助于以不干扰工作时间的方式打破时间表。它们为释放的习惯提供了一个开端。在这里，自我正在帮助我们，因为它坚持这些计划，而这些计划是自我本身享受并能接受的。他一直害怕只是坐下来思考，因为担心让自发自我在没有象征性写作机制的情况下显现出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Outer physical time is a complete camouflage, unnecessary basically on your plane; but you have made it seem necessary because of your refusal to admit the inner self as part of your whole personality, and therefore you have not been able to utilize psychological time to its fullest advantage on your plane. Psychological time as I have said is a natural pathway, part of an inner sense, that was meant as an easy access from the inner to the outer world and back again. You do not use it as such.
quotes.translation: 外在物理时间是彻底的伪装，在你的层面上基本毫无必要；但由于你拒绝承认内在自己是完整人格的一部分，因此无法在你的层面上充分利用心理时间。如我所说，心理时间是自然通道，是内在感官的一部分，本应作为从内在世界通往外在世界再返回的便捷途径。你们并未如此运用它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Instead I would like to give you some more material dealing with mental enclosures. These are in some respects a different sort of camouflage, a self-formed, artificial and only partial enclosure, a beneficial psychic device within which the inner self momentarily and temporarily gathers and holds and collects as much psychic energy about it as it is capable of receiving, utilizing, and also withstanding. The mental enclosure in most cases is self-limiting then, since it represents a setting up of barriers on all sides but one. But it is limiting only for the ultimate purpose of intense concentration of energy, resulting in a burst or expansion of this energy that has been transformed and pressurized, so to speak, into new patterns.
quotes.translation: 相反，我想提供更多关于"心灵围场"的资料。这些围场在某些方面是另一种伪装——自我形成的、人为的、仅具部分性的围场，是一种有益的心灵装置，内在自己在此暂时聚集、持有并收集其所能接收、运用且承受的心灵能量。在多数情况下，心灵围场是自我限制的，因为它代表在除一面之外的所有方向设置屏障。但这种限制仅服务于终极目的：能量高度集中，最终导致这股经过转化与加压（姑且如此说）的能量爆发或扩展，形成新的模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: For all of this, however, inner portions of each individual's being are not touched by those beliefs. The ideas will be reflected in their daily experience, certainly, and seem to be justified. Yet beneath, the inner self is quite aware of the great thrusting creativity that occurs in dreams, and realizes that the source of individual energy has nothing to do with such superficial concepts as the nature of good and evil.
quotes.translation: 然而，尽管如此，每个个体存在的内在部分并不受这些信念影响。这些观念当然会反映在日常经验中，看似合理。但在表层之下，内在自己完全知晓梦境中发生的巨大创造性推力，并意识到个体能量的源头与善恶本质这类肤浅概念毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The energy of this inner self is directed and used by it to richly form from itself, from components and inner experience, a material counterpart in which the outer ego then can act out its role. The outer ego is most in the role, acting out a play that the inner self has written.
quotes.translation: 内在自己的能量由其引导运用，从自身、组成部分及内在经验中丰沛地塑造出物质对应体，外在自我随后可在此对应体中扮演角色。外在自我大多处于角色中，演绎着内在自己已写就的剧本。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying that in our methods the ego is changed rather completely but gradually in many cases, and only through its own willingness to do so. It recognizes its identity as a part of. underlined, the inner self. Therefore basically it has no need to fight the inner self, since it knows its survival is dependent upon this inner framework.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，在我们的方法中，自我在许多情况下会彻底但渐进地改变，且唯有通过其自愿才能实现。它认识到自身是内在自己的一部分（强调）。因此它根本无需与内在自己对抗，因为它知道自身的存续依赖于这个内在架构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Throughout the ages some have recognized the fact that there is self consciousness and purpose in certain dream and sleep states, and have maintained, even in waking life, the sense of continuity of this inner self. To such people it is no longer possible to identify completely with the ego consciousness. They are too obviously aware of themselves as more. When such knowledge is gained, the ego can accept it, for it finds to its surprise that it is not less conscious, but more conscious, that its limitations are dissipated; now it is not true, and I emphasize this strongly, that so-called unconscious material, given any freedom, will draw energy away from the egotistically organized self in a normal personality.
quotes.translation: 古往今来，有些人已认识到某些梦境与睡眠状态中存在自我意识与目的，甚至在清醒生活中也保持着这种内在自己的连续性感知。对这些人而言，已不可能完全认同自我意识。他们太清楚地意识到自己远不止于此。当获得这种认知时，自我能够接纳它，因为它惊讶地发现：自己非但没有变得意识薄弱，反而更加清醒，其局限性已然消散；现在我要强烈强调：所谓无意识材料若获得任何自由，绝不会从正常人格中以自我为中心组织的自我中抽离能量——这绝非事实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner self is highly capable and follows certain electromagnetic routes which it knows, and avoids other routes. Signals from the body reach it constantly. It is in immediate contact with the body on certain levels: survival levels. With these conditions satisfied, it can indeed travel further, so to speak, than in such an experience with drugs. I am comparing now the drug and drugless experiences at their best.
quotes.translation: 内在自体极具能力，遵循自身知晓的特定电磁路径，并避开其他路径。身体信号持续传递给它。在生存层面等特定层次上，它与身体保持直接联系。当这些条件满足时，它确实能比药物体验走得更远——我在此比较的是最佳状态下的药物与非药物体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
