quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are here also thrusts in all directions, with certain identifying pulsations that underlie all, and that have their origins within the inner self. As the vitality of the universe forms, of itself, the boundaries of the various fields of activity, and as vitality itself takes on the coloration of the various fields and forms the camouflage patterns within them, so also vitality, in the form of emotions that the camouflage patterns of the personality, even while this vitality forms both emotions and personality for every individual, every consciousness, may be thought of as a separate field of activity; and all the data relating to fields of activity may be seen to apply to any consciousness as well.
quotes.translation: 此处同样存在向各个方向的推进，伴随某些贯穿始终的识别性脉动，这些脉动源自内在自体。正如宇宙生命力自行形成各活动领域的边界，生命力本身呈现各领域的色彩并形成其中的伪装模式，同样地，以情绪形式存在的生命力——即便这种生命力为每个个体、每个意识同时塑造情绪与人格——也可被视为独立的活动领域；所有与活动领域相关的数据，同样适用于任何意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The word slow, or slowly, is not good in this connotation, since of itself it does not necessarily suggest safety, but a mere neutral and temporary putting off. So far Ruburt is doing well, and will learn as he progresses how to operate inner acceleration and flow, or rush of energy, so that he is comfortable. And the ego, through experience, will learn that the inner self will always return safely. And it would be most unjust, and needlessly cruel, not to give the ego this necessary reassurance; and also the inner self should manage to communicate to the ego its gratitude for the egos protective concern.
quotes.translation: "缓慢"一词在此语境中并不恰当，因其本身未必暗示安全，仅表示中性且暂时的延迟。目前鲁柏表现良好，他将在进展中学会如何运作内在加速与能量流动，从而保持舒适。而自我将通过经验认识到，内在自体总会安全回归。若不给予自我这份必要的安心，将是极不公平且无谓残忍的；同时内在自体也应设法向自我传达对其保护性关切的感激。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You have built defenses so strongly that you have not heard the voice of the inner self. The inner self is hardly to be feared. You have allowed the ego to become a counterfeit self, and you take its word because you will not hear the muffled voice that is within you speak.
quotes.translation: 你建立的防御如此坚固，以致听不见内在自体的声音。内在自体绝非可惧之物。你让自我成为虚假自体，因不愿聆听内在被压抑的声音，便轻信了自我的话语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The identity, indeed, is as much and more the inner self as it is the ego. This has been mentioned in the past, but Ruburt became so fearful of his own spontaneity in early life that he was more or less forced, out of fear, to deny the validity of his identity with the inner self. On some occasions, as the other evening, he spontaneously accepts this identification, particularly when alcohol acts as a depressant.
quotes.translation: 身份认同既属于自我，更属于内在自体。这点过去曾提及，但鲁柏早年对自身自发性过于恐惧，出于畏惧，他几乎被迫否认与内在自体认同的真实性。在某些场合（如前晚），当他借助酒精的抑制作用时，会自发接受这种认同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When you think of reincarnation, you suppose a series of progressions. Instead the various lives grow out of what your inner self is. They are not thrust upon you by some outside agency. They are a material development, as your consciousness opens up and expresses itself in as many ways as possible. It is not restricted to one three-dimensional lifetime, nor is it restricted to three-dimensional existence alone.
quotes.translation: 当你思考转世时，会设想一系列递进过程。实则各种生命皆源自你内在自体的本质。它们并非由外在力量强加于你，而是当意识尽可能以多种方式敞开并表达自身时，产生的物质性发展。意识既不受限于单一三维生命，也不局限于三维存在本身。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This has been a fruitful session, and I am pleased to find us back on schedule. You will discover that this evening's material on the physical organism in particular will be most helpful, particularly in future sessions. We will sometime or other deal with the maintenance of the organism, and then you will need this material. I hope it explains the comparative （underline comparative） rigidity of pattern which composes the body, which allows it to maintain apparent constancy; and one of the prices it must pay for this is a stabilization of a kind that the inner self is not bound by.
quotes.translation: 这是一次富有成果的课，我很高兴发现我们回到了正轨。你们会发现，今晚关于物质有机体的资料尤其会非常有用，特别是在未来的课中。我们会在某个时候处理有机体的维护问题，届时你们会需要这些资料。我希望这解释了构成身体的模式相对（强调相对）的僵化性，这种僵化性使身体能够维持表面上的恒定；而它为此付出的代价之一是一种内在自体不受其约束的稳定化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now, to return to an earlier discussion. What you call suggestion is indeed expectation. You should understand by now how the physical image is constructed. This construction is from the inside out. The inner self attempts to construct a physical image in line with its own self-image. Any errors of construction have their origin not in the inner self, but in either the personal subconscious or in the ego.
quotes.translation: 现在，回到之前的讨论。你们所谓的暗示其实就是期望。你们现在应该明白物质形象是如何构建的。这种构建是从内而外的。内在自体试图根据其自身的自我形象来构建一个物质形象。任何构建上的错误并非源于内在自体，而是源于个人潜意识或自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: And despite all comments to the contrary, this is by far the most difficult discipline; but without it the inner self is not secure in its journeys, and is like a boat with no harbor to receive it, and like the man without a country, with no place to return. The personality, to some （underline some） degree has been led astray by those who begin such a journey without first making certain of their return.
quotes.translation: 尽管有各种相反的说法，这仍然是迄今为止最难的训练；但若没有它，内在自体在其旅程中就不安全，就像一艘没有港口接纳的船，像一个没有国家的人，无处可归。人格在某种程度上（强调某种程度）被那些开始这种旅程却没有先确保归途的人引入歧途。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Distortions occur at transitionary points, or at points of imbalances. There is a meshing then of data from various levels. A projection obviously need not be conscious. The waking self may be engaged in normal activities while the inner self is someplace else entirely. There are more brief periods of forgetfulness however than people usually realize, and in these periods often projections have occurred.
quotes.translation: 扭曲发生在过渡点或失衡点。然后来自不同层面的数据会交织在一起。投射显然不必是有意识的。当内在自体完全在别处时，清醒的自我可能正忙于正常活动。然而，人们通常意识不到的短暂遗忘期比想象中要多，在这些时期常常发生了投射。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: But thoughts have shapes, as do dreams. I use the word shape for simplicity's sake, but the electrical universe is composed of dimensions which are perceived by the inner self, for the inner self also has existence within the electrical universe. If all of this sounds farfetched, then remember that the shapes that you perceive meaningful, many other species within your own field cannot perceive at all.
quotes.translation: 但思想有形状，就像梦一样。我为了简便起见使用“形状”这个词，但电性宇宙由内在自体所感知的维度构成，因为内在自体也在电性宇宙中存在。如果这一切听起来牵强，那么请记住，你们所感知的有意义的形状，你们自己领域内的许多物种根本无法感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The whole self as you know has its existence in uncamouflaged energy, and is therefore capable of the assimilation of knowledge in so far as it can, if it chooses, be basically unaffiliated to any one camouflage dimension or perspective. In actual practice this takes a supreme development, but even for general purposes the inner self retains a freedom from camouflage perspectives, and is aware in varying degrees of other perspectives, and of its existence outside of them.
quotes.translation: 你们所知的整体自体存在于非伪装能量中，因此能够吸收知识，只要它选择，基本上可以不受任何单一伪装维度或视角的束缚。在实际操作中，这需要极高的发展，但即使为了普遍目的，内在自体也保持着不受伪装视角束缚的自由，并在不同程度上意识到其他视角及其在这些视角之外的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It does no good in such a case to bemoan the situation and say, "I want to understand myself but I'm frightened that I will not like what I find." You yourself must change your beliefs. You must stop believing that the inner self is a dungeon of unsavory repressed emotion. It does contain some repressed emotion. It also contains great intuition, knowledge, and the answers to all of your questions.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，哀叹处境并说“我想了解自己，但又害怕发现不喜欢的东西”是毫无益处的。你必须自己改变信念。你必须停止相信内在自我是一个充满令人不快的压抑情绪的地牢。它确实包含一些压抑的情绪，但也蕴藏着伟大的直觉、知识，以及你所有问题的答案。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Hypnotism will be necessary, however, only for a time, and only to induce the light trance state. In the light trance state, the inner self is free from the camouflage nature of your plane, and the truly humorous aspect is this: Only by freeing yourself from your own camouflage universe can you see it clearly, understand it for what it is, and actually learn to use it for mankind's best advantage.
quotes.translation: 然而，催眠只在必要时使用一段时间，且仅用于诱导浅层出神状态。在浅层出神状态中，内在自我摆脱了你层面的伪装特性，而真正幽默之处在于：只有将自己从自己的伪装宇宙中解放出来，你才能清晰地看见它，理解它的本质，并实际学会用它来为人类谋取最大利益。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is no battle between the intuitive self and the conscious mind. There only seems to be when the individual refuses to face all the information that is available in his conscious mind. (Pause.) Sometimes it seems easier to avoid the frequent readjustments in behavior that self-examination requires. In such cases an individual collects many secondhand beliefs. Some contradict each other; the signals given to the body and to the inner self are not smoothly flowing or clear-cut, but a muddied jumble of counter-directions.
quotes.translation: 直觉自我与意识心之间并无战争。只有当个体拒绝面对意识心中所有可得信息时，这种冲突才看似存在。（停顿）有时，回避自我审视所需的频繁行为调整似乎更容易。在这种情况下，个体积累了许多二手信念。有些信念相互矛盾；传递给身体和内在自我的信号并非流畅清晰，而是混杂着相互矛盾的指令。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As I also mentioned (in the 614th session in Chapter Two), the conscious mind is not basically cut off from the inner self or from those deep inner sources of knowledge available to it. The aware mind is not any one event, for that matter; it represents various portions of the inner self that "surface" at any given time.
quotes.translation: 正如我（在第二章第614节中）也提到过的，意识心从根本上并未与内在自我或那些可触及的深层内在知识源泉隔绝。就此而言，觉知的心并非单一事件；它代表了内在自我在特定时刻“浮现”的不同部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is this inner self, out of the massive knowledge and unlimited scope of its consciousness, that forms the physical world, that provides stimuli to keep the ego constantly at the job of awareness . It is the inner self, termed here the inner ego, that organizes, initiates, projects, controls the EE units of which we have been speaking lately, transforming energy into objects, into matter.
quotes.translation: 正是这个内在自我，凭借其浩瀚的知识和无限的意识范围，形成了物质世界，提供了刺激以保持自我持续处于觉知状态。正是这个内在自我——此处称为内在自我——组织、启动、投射并控制我们近来一直在讨论的EE单位，将能量转化为物体，转化为物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is possible to treat such disorders from a chemical standpoint, as is sometimes being done, but the acquired artificial chemical balance will in most cases not be maintained, because the inner self, the deep subconscious, has not been signaled that an error is being made. Ideally of course such an error should not occur. There are also reasons why the deep subconscious has allowed such difficulties to come about, and in most cases the basic reason here is a lack of understanding and communication between the various portions of the self, so that seemingly the left hand does not know what the right hand is doing.
quotes.translation: 从化学角度治疗此类失调是可能的，正如有时所做的那样，但获得的人造化学平衡在大多数情况下无法维持，因为内在自我（深层潜意识）并未收到错误正在发生的信号。理想情况下，这种错误当然不应发生。深层潜意识允许这些困难出现也有其原因，在大多数情况下，根本原因在于自我各部分之间缺乏理解和沟通，以至于看似左手不知道右手在做什么。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This should lead you to understand why physical time is basically meaningless to the subconscious, and why the inner self has at its command a knowledge of past lives and past endeavors; for the inner self, dear friends, these lives are not in the past, nor is the life of the ego necessarily present to the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这应能使你明白，为何物理时间对潜意识而言基本上毫无意义，以及为何内在自体能掌握过去世与过往努力的认知；因为对内在自体而言，亲爱的朋友们，这些生命并非存在于过去，而自我的人生也未必是整体自体的当下状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. No (underlined) physical condition is irreversible, with the exception of loss of limbs and definite organs. The personality is always free to choose, in your terms, its future. But the choice is with the inner self, which is the real identity. There are of course other elements entering into any such situation. Telepathically received suggestions from others, and so forth. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在。没有任何（强调）身体状态是不可逆转的，除了肢体与特定器官的丧失。人格始终能自由选择——以你们的说法——自己的未来。但选择权在于内在自体，那才是真正的身份。当然还有其他因素介入任何这类情境，例如透过心电感应接收他人的暗示等等。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In all instances of ill health, the psychic inner forces are being misdirected. The aim of medicine should then be to aid the inner self to direct its own energy along other lines. Now. With the above, the psychic forces may be misdirected in several main ways, and with several resulting malfunctions. Energy may not be properly directed toward releasing from the physical field of the body excess chemicals into other fields. A buildup of such chemicals can be deadly, leading to among other things forms of insanity, schizophrenia, and other disorders which show themselves in mental or personality symptoms.
quotes.translation: 在所有健康欠佳的案例中，内在的心灵力量正被误用。医学的目标因此应是协助内在自体将其能量导向其他途径。现在。根据上述，心灵力量可能以几种主要方式被误用，并导致数种功能失调。能量可能未被适当导向，以将体内过剩的化学物质从身体物理场域释放至其他场域。这类化学物质的累积可能致命，导致精神错乱、精神分裂症及其他以精神或人格症状显现的失调症。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Another thing. It is in some ways convenient that you are not consciously aware of each breath that you take. But it is sheer stupidity to ignore the inner self which does the breathing, and is aware of the mechanics involved. What you almost get here is that some little unknown self performs these necessary functions, and that is not the case. I have said that the mind is a part of the inner world, but you have access to your own minds which you ignore, and this access would lead you inevitably to the truths about the physical world. Working inward you could understand the outward so much more clearly.
quotes.translation: 另一件事。你们未能有意识地觉察每一次呼吸，在某些方面确实方便。但忽视那进行呼吸、并知晓其中机制的内在自体，则是十足的愚昧。你们几乎要认为，是某个未知的小我执行这些必要功能——但事实并非如此。我曾说过，心智属于内在世界的一部分，但你们能触及自己那被忽视的心智，而这份触及将必然引领你们发现物质世界的真相。向内探索，你们便能更清晰地理解外在世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: "When Ruburt left the church, the concept of the sinful self was still there, but the methods that earlier served to relieve its pressures were no longer effectively present. The concept was shifted over to the flawed self of scientific vintage. Science has no sacraments. Its only methods of dealing with such guilt involve standard psychoanalytic counseling--which itself deepens the dilemma, for counseling itself is based upon the idea that the inner self is a reservoir of savage impulses. Period.
quotes.translation: "当鲁柏离开教会时，有罪自我的概念依然存在，但早年用以缓解其压力的方法已不再有效。这个概念被转移至科学时代的缺陷自我。科学没有圣礼。它处理这类罪疚的唯一方法涉及标准的精神分析咨询——这反而加深了困境，因为咨询本身基于"内在自体是野蛮冲动的蓄水池"这一观念。句号。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 11. When Mass Events is published, see Session 835 for February 7, 1979, in Chapter 6.

quotes.text: Unfortunately, certain aspects of Christianity were stressed over others, and that dictum was based upon the belief in a wicked self that needed to be disciplined and diverted into constructive activity. The belief in such an unsavory self stops many people from any exploration of the inner self -- and, therefore, from any direct experience that will give them counter-evidence. If you are afraid of yourself, if you are afraid of your own memories, you will block your associative processes, fearing for example that they will bring to light matters best forgotten -- and usually sexual matters.
quotes.translation: 不幸的是，基督教某些面向被过度强调，其训诫建立在"需要被纪律约束并导向建设性活动的邪恶自我"这一信念上。对如此不光彩自我的信念，阻止许多人探索内在自体——也因此阻止他们获得能提供反证的直接经验。若你害怕自己，害怕自己的记忆，便会阻断联想过程，例如担心这些过程会揭露最好被遗忘的事——通常与性有关。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This allows the inner self to work much more quickly and effectively. You can trick normal consciousness quite easily with baubles, take its attention into other areas so that the inner self is left alone to do its work. Now give us a moment.
quotes.translation: 这能让内在自体更快速有效地运作。你可以用些小玩意儿轻易地哄骗普通意识，将它的注意力引向其他领域，这样内在自体就能不受干扰地完成其工作。现在请稍等片刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner self, which has been called the soul, has connections through the entire physical organism, and is not concentrated in any one portion. More adjustments are made by the physical organism than you know, and when I say that it exists in many fields, I mean that it actually not only appears within them, but is a part of them in an intimate manner, that the physical organism as it is materialized within your universe is actually a coming together and merging that has its existence, and is a blending of data from many planes, that would be considered foreign by the intellect.
quotes.translation: 被称为灵魂的内在自体，通过整个生理有机体产生联结，并不集中于任何特定部位。生理有机体所做的调整远比你意识到的要多。当我说它存在于多个场域时，我的意思是它不仅实际出现在这些场域中，而且以亲密的方式成为它们的一部分——那个在你们宇宙中物质化的生理有机体，实际上是来自多个层面的数据的汇聚与融合，其存在本身便是这些数据的交融，而这些数据在理智看来会是陌生的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The entity itself does not have to keep constant check on its personalities, because in each personality there is an inner self-conscious part that knows its origin. This part, for now, I will call the self-conscious beyond the subconscious. The breather and the dreamer are not so automatically controlled as it would seem. I have mentioned before that some part of you knows exactly how much oxygen the lungs breathe, and how much energy it takes to pace a floor, and this is the part of you of which I spoke. It is the part, and the self-conscious part, that receives all inner data.
quotes.translation: 存有本身无需持续监控其人格，因为每个人格中都存在着一个知晓自身起源的内在自意识部分。此刻我将这个部分称为超越潜意识的自我意识。呼吸者与做梦者并非如表面看来那般被自动控制。我之前提过，你的一部分确切知道肺部呼吸了多少氧气，踱步需要消耗多少能量，这正是我所说的那个部分。它是接收所有内在数据的那个部分，那个具有自我意识的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The ego takes care of physical matters so that the inner self can go about its other concerns. To shunt it aside is highly dangerous. The inner self is then in a precarious position, for it must also attempt to deal with physical reality.
quotes.translation: 自我负责处理物质事务，以便内在自体能够处理其他事务。将其排挤到一旁是极其危险的。内在自体随后会处于岌岌可危的境地，因为它还必须尝试应对物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The inner self does not feel threatened, therefore, only the part of the personality that is momentarily unaware of the true situation. Others also respond, and are in this drama for their own reasons. (Long pause.) The drama has a theme, and through working out the problems therein presented the theme becomes clear. In some psychological circles there are therapeutic groups that operate by setting up such dramas. Remember, the purpose is therapeutic, though it may not appear so. And none of this should be taken to mean that the sufferings are not quite real to those involved.
quotes.translation: 因此内在自体并不感到受威胁，只有人格中暂时不明真相的部分才会如此。其他人也会出于自身原因参与这场戏剧并做出回应。（长停顿。）这场戏剧有一个主题，通过解决其中呈现的问题，这个主题会变得清晰。在某些心理学圈子里，存在通过设置此类戏剧来运作的治疗团体。请记住，其目的是治疗性的，尽管表面看来可能并非如此。这一切都不应被理解为意味着当事人的痛苦不是真实的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The multiplicity of human experience would be impossible were it not for the inner self, and for the heritage that speaks through the cells of every human being. The perspectives and psychic relationships that make up the human personality simply could not have resulted through action within your field alone. It cannot be stressed too strongly that experience within the self can lead to at least some understanding of the nature of action in its pure form, for within your physical universe action is to some extent frozen, in so far as your perceptions of it are concerned.
quotes.translation: 若非内在自体，以及通过每个人类细胞诉说的传承，人类经验的多样性将不可能存在。构成人格的那些视角与心灵关系，绝不可能仅仅通过你们场域内的活动而产生。再怎么强调也不为过：对内在自体的体验，至少能让人对纯粹形式的行动本质有所理解，因为在你们的物质宇宙中，就你们对它的感知而言，行动在某种程度上是被冻结的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner self therefore uses the physical system to express its own inclinations and ideas of reality. It is the inner self that unfolds those patterns of behavior spoken about in the article you read on infant growth. (In a recent issue of Time magazine.) Such unfoldings always occur from within, responding to signals not from the exterior but from the interior environment.
quotes.translation: 因此，内在自体利用物质系统来表达自身的倾向与对实相的观念。正是内在自体展开了你读到的关于婴儿成长的那篇文章（近期《时代》杂志）中所提及的行为模式。这种展开始终从内在发生，回应着来自内在环境而非外在环境的信号。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The side which is open allows free flow of energy from the inner self, but momentarily the outlet for this energy is blocked up. This holding back, this gathering and collection without instant outlet, is one of the natural and constant processes involved not only in the construction of energy into matter, but in the construction of energy into any other form, and it is closely allied to the pause and pulsation that I have mentioned, as atoms and molecules appear and disappear imperceptibly, even while they seem to give continuity to any particular object.
quotes.translation: 敞开的那一面允许能量从内在自体自由流动，但此能量的出口会暂时被阻塞。这种阻滞、这种没有即时出口的聚集与累积，不仅是能量构建为物质时自然且持续的过程之一，也是能量构建为任何其他形式时自然且持续的过程，它与我所提及的停顿与脉动密切相关——正如原子与分子在看似赋予任何特定物体连续性的同时，也在无形中显现与消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In your daily physical life you are usually concerned simply with changing your beliefs about yourself, and then changing the beliefs others hold about you. You will find conflicting beliefs within yourself and you must become aware of these. As an example, you may believe that you want to understand the nature of your inner self -- you may tell yourself you want to remember your dreams, but at the same time still hold a belief in the basic unworthiness of the self, and be quite frightened of remembering your dreams because of what you might find there.
quotes.translation: 在日常的肉身生活中，你通常只关心改变自己对自身的信念，然后改变他人对你的信念。你会在自身中发现相互冲突的信念，必须意识到这些冲突。举例来说，你可能相信自己想要了解内在自体的本质——你可能告诉自己你想记住梦境，但同时仍持有自体基本无价值的信念，并因害怕在梦境中可能发现什么而十分恐惧记住梦境。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It acts upon itself, being action. The inner self also changes, but it is also that which changes itself. We come now close to a definition finally for the entity, which cannot really be defined, because in your terms it escapes definition. However, the entity can be partially defined as the sum of all the selves within a given range of action, the simultaneous totality which on the one hand then cannot yet exist, since action can never complete itself, yet representing that impetus forever frustrated on the part of action for complete materialization.
quotes.translation: 它作用于自身，因为它是行动。内在自体也会改变，但它同时也是改变自身之物。我们现在终于接近对存有的定义，但存有实际上无法被定义，因为以你们的术语而言它超越了定义。然而，存有可被部分定义为特定行动范围内所有自体的总和，是同时性的整体——一方面它尚不存在，因为行动永远无法完成自身，却又代表着行动在完全物质化方面永远受挫的驱动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Its sense of identity spontaneously goes beyond the change of its own form. It has no ego to cut the "I" identification short. Creatures without the compartment of the ego can easily follow their own identities beyond any changes of form. The inner self is aware of this integrity of identity, but the ego focused so securely in physical reality cannot afford this luxury.
quotes.translation: 它的身份感自然而然地超越自身形态的变化。它没有自我来截断"我"的认同。没有自我这个隔间的生灵，能轻易跟随自身身份超越任何形态变化。内在自体知晓这种身份的完整性，但如此稳固聚焦于物质实相的自我，却无法享有这种奢侈。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (First I thought of Seth's assertion in the 92nd session for September 28, 1964, that "trees have their dreams"; [in Volume 1, see the quotations in Note 1 for Session 698]. Then I remembered that he'd come through with extensive material on tree consciousness in a much earlier session. With Jane's help the next day I found that information in the 18th session, which had been held on January 22, 1964. Most of that session is unpublished, although someday we'd like to print it in full. It contains many intriguing ideas -- as, for example: "A tree knows a human being also ... [yet it] does not even build up an image of a man, which is why this is so difficult to explain ... And the same tree will recognize the same man who passes it by each day."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: We are dealing here, again, merely with the various aspects of action. As a personality itself is an action gestalt, within the inner self there is a capsule comprehension of the purposes and intents of the whole personality. These are indeed within the very structure, both psychic and physical, of the personality itself. The ego, on its own as a separate unit, does not have such data, although since it is after all a portion of the whole self, it does have such information available. But when it acts as a unit it does not use such information.
quotes.translation: 我们在此再次仅涉及行动的各种面向。由于人格本身是行动完形，在内在自体内部存在着对整个人格目的与意图的胶囊式理解。这些确实存在于人格自身的心理与物质结构中。自我作为独立单元时并不拥有这类数据，尽管它终究是整体自体的一部分，确实能获取此类信息。但当它作为单元运作时，它并不使用这些信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: This requires on the egos part an excellent ability to perceive correctly the elements of the physical situation, to express it in terms that the subconscious can understand, and to deliver the message properly. The subconscious will then break the physical data given to it down into its psychic components, translate it into symbols; and the inner self, at the request of the subconscious, will then focus all of the energies at its command to deliver the most acceptable solution, taking the entire needs of the whole self into consideration.
quotes.translation: 这要求自我部分具备卓越能力：正确感知物质情境的要素，以潜意识能理解的方式表达，并妥善传递信息。随后潜意识会将接收到的物质数据分解为其心灵成分，转化为象征符号；而内在自我在潜意识的请求下，将调动其掌控的所有能量，在考量整体自我的全部需求后，提供最可接受的解决方案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The ego itself attempts as its function to be the director and center of other functions. The ego, while considering itself apart from action, is obviously not apart from it. As dreams allow the inner self great freedom, and as in dreams great perspectives of time are available, and great freedom in space, though no space as you know it is involved, so it is possible for the ego itself to achieve the experience of freedom from time and space, if it would only allow itself for a short while to relax the intensity of its objective focus.
quotes.translation: 自我本身试图以其他功能之指导者与中心自居。尽管自我自认与行动分离，但它显然无法脱离行动。正如梦境赋予内在自我极大自由，在梦中可触及浩瀚的时间视野与空间自由（虽不涉及你所认知的空间），自我若肯暂时放松客观聚焦的强度，同样能获得超越时空的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: At the bottom so to speak, will be found a layer of the subconscious dealing with racial heritage, concerning the dim first materialization of man; and beneath this a heritage dealing with a comprehension of reality as concerned in physical matter before the physical evolution of man, following backward to that first inner self within its mental enclosure, that was adept enough to translate and transform its psychic energy to form the first, most minute physical materialization, from which all other physical constructions then flowed.
quotes.translation: 可以说，底层将发现处理种族遗产的潜意识层，关乎人类最初模糊的物质化显现；其下则是处理人类物质进化前对物质实相认知的遗产层，回溯至最初被心灵外壳包裹的内在自我——它已足够娴熟地将心灵能量转化变形，形成最初最细微的物质化显现，所有后续物质构造皆由此衍生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If you will think （I hope） for simplicity's sake of the whole self as it exists on your plane with its physical body, conscious ego and inner self as one field unit, which is also part of the larger or more complete entity as one field unit within another, then perhaps it will not be too much for you to imagine the connection, or one of the connections, between the entity field and the whole-self field, which is on your plane as being the inner senses--that is, the inner senses are one of the connectives between these two fields.
quotes.translation: 为简便起见，若你愿将存在于你们层面、包含物质身体、意识自我与内在自我的整体自我视为一个场域单元，它同时又是更大或更完整存有（作为另一场域单元）的一部分，那么你或许能想象存有场域与你们层面的整体自我场域之间的连接——或其中之一——正是内在感官：即内在感官是这两个场域间的连接纽带之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This out ego, among its purposes, has the duty of expressing not only itself but to a lesser extent those various hidden personalities which compose the subconscious. In larger terms and in more comprehensive terms, the whole self, the whole field of the complete subconscious and inner self, reaches back to the entity. There is no end to the past projection or existence of the subconscious of any given self; and though it is not understood in your field, there is no end to the forward thrust of the subconscious of any given self.
quotes.translation: 这个外在自我在其诸多目的中，不仅负有表达自身的职责，还需在较小程度上表达构成潜意识的那些隐藏人格。以更宏大更全面的视角而言，整体自我——即完整潜意识与内在自我的整体场域——可回溯至存有。任何特定自我的潜意识，其过往投射或存在皆无终点；虽在你们层面难以理解，但任何特定自我的潜意识向前推进亦无终点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: What you must understand is that the psychedelic experience represents but a glimmering of the constant state of the inner self: not constant in terms of something static, however. With drugs, there are some dangers. There are dimensions in which you are completely incapable, and if through some molecular disturbance you fell into one of these it is possible that you could not find your way back. You do not understand me here, and it is difficult to explain. Your vocabulary is not equipped to deal with the concept. I will try.
quotes.translation: 你必须明白，迷幻体验仅映照出内在自我的恒常状态——但此恒常并非静止之物。使用药物存在某些危险。有些维度你完全无法应对，若因分子扰动坠入其中，可能永无归途。此刻你无法理解我的话语，这难以解释。你们的词汇尚不足以处理此概念。我会尝试说明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Its own stability and awareness can be vastly deepened and strengthened. In times of seemingly calamitous encounters with nature, individuals may find themselves amazed at their capacity to relate with other people, but in the artificially induced psychic disaster area of massive LSD therapy, the situation is reversed. Consciousness finds itself in a crisis situation; not [because of one coming] from the exterior world, but because it is forced to fight on a battleground for which it was never designed and cannot understand, where basically counted-upon allies of association, memory and organization, and all the powers of the inner self, are suddenly turned into enemies.
quotes.translation: 内在自我的稳定性和觉知力可以被大幅深化与强化。当遭遇看似灾难性的自然事件时，个体或许会惊讶于自己与他人联结的能力；但在大规模LSD疗法所人为制造的心理灾难区中，情况却截然相反。意识发现自己陷入危机状态——并非因为来自外在世界的威胁，而是被迫在一个它从未被设计应对、也无法理解的战场作战，在此处，原本可依赖的联想、记忆与组织等盟友，以及内在自我的所有力量，都突然变成了敌人。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now I understand that to one closely and daily involved with the woman, it is difficult to see purpose or reason in the condition. Since the egotistical knowledge of the woman does not include this data, there are of course difficulties here also. But the inner self of the woman knows that in facing such a condition and finding nevertheless some moments of joy, even some compassion for others, that the personality has satisfied many of those feelings of inadequacy from the past existence. (One minute pause, eyes closed.)
quotes.translation: 我明白，对于每日与这位女性密切相处的人来说，很难看出这种状况有何目的或意义。由于这位女性的自我认知并不包含这些数据，此处自然也存在困难。但这位女性的内在自我知道，在直面这种状况并仍能寻得片刻欢愉、甚至对他人怀有悲悯时，人格已满足了过往存在中许多关于不足的感受。（停顿一分钟，闭眼。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The dream experience is felt directly by the inner self. Dreams have an electric actuality, as I have told you. In this electrical actuality they then exist independently of the dreamer, although he still applies the dream to himself. In the same manner do thoughts and emotions have the electric reality of which I have spoken. Therefore, within the electric system, dreams, thoughts and emotions exist as actualities, and in what you may call a tangible form, though not in the form of matter as you are familiar with it.
quotes.translation: 内在自我直接感受梦境体验。如我曾告知的，梦境具有电性实相。在这种电性实相中，它们独立于做梦者而存在，尽管做梦者仍将梦境应用于自身。同样地，思想和情感也具备我所提及的电性实相。因此，在电性系统内，梦境、思想和情感作为实相存在，且以你们可称为"有形"的形式呈现——尽管并非你们所熟悉的物质形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: They will be formed to impress world conditions at any given time, and therefore couched in symbols and events that will most impress the populace. This is craftily done, for the inner self knows exactly what will impress the ego, and what kinds of personalities will be best able to personify the message at any given time. When such a personality appears in history then, he is intuitively recognized, for the way has long been laid, and in many cases the prophecies announcing such an arrival have already been given.
quotes.translation: 它们将被塑造以在任何特定时刻影响世界状况，因此会以最能震撼大众的象征与事件来呈现。这是巧妙的设计，因为内在自我精确知晓什么能触动自我，以及何种人格特质能在特定时刻最佳地具象化信息。当这样的历史人物出现时，人们会凭直觉认出他——因为道路早已铺就，且在许多情况下，宣告其降临的预言早已给出。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your probability you did allow the inner self some freedom. Therefore, the so-called egotistical consciousness was not given complete sway. It remained flexible enough so that even hidden in its god concepts4 there were symbols of greater reality. Your system deals with physical manipulability, again, and the translation of creativity into physical form. An exterior separation had to occur for a while, in which consciousness forgot, egotistically speaking, that it was a part of nature, and pretended to be apart.
quotes.translation: 在你们的概率系统中，你们确实允许内在自我拥有某种自由。因此，所谓的自我意识并未获得完全主导权。它保持足够的灵活性，以至于即便隐藏在其神祇概念中，也存有更伟大实相的象征。你们的系统再次涉及物质操控性，以及将创造力转化为物质形态的过程。外在的分离必须暂时发生——在这种分离中，从自我角度而言，意识遗忘了自身是自然的一部分，并假装与之分离。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: In your terms, until now your consciousness has specialized in neurological patterning. As mentioned (in Session 682), this was extremely important while it learned the art of specialized focus. Now, however, it must begin to recognize that it can indeed expand, and bring into its awareness other quite legitimate realities. The nature of probabilities must be understood, for the time has come in the world as you experience it where the greatest wisdom and discrimination are needed. Your consciousness and neurological prejudice blind you to the full dimension of physical activity. The true implications of physical action are not as yet apparent to you.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The energy that composes personality therefore consists of an inconceivable number of separate identities. These separate identities form what we call the inner self, which retains its individuality even while the energy that composes it constantly changes. There are continual groupings and regroupings, but basic identities are always retained. The potential egos within any given identity therefore retain their own individuality and self-knowledge, regardless of their relative importance in the order of command.
quotes.translation: 因此，构成人格的能量由数量不可思议的独立身份组成。这些独立身份形成了我们所谓的内在自我——即便构成它的能量不断变化，它仍保持其个体性。持续进行着聚合与重组，但基本身份始终被保留。因此，任何给定身份中的潜在自我，无论其在指挥层级中的相对重要性如何，都保留着自身的个体性与自我认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I have given you both sermon enough for this evening but I cannot emphasize too strongly the importance of what I have said. If you direct your inner self with confidence to steer you through your physical existence, it will do so. If you concentrate upon difficulties you will not allow it to do so. This method of giving yourself room will also help you to achieve a greater freedom in psychic matters. For any negative focus （and underline negative） within egotistical reality will automatically block you.
quotes.translation: 今晚我已给你们足够的训诫，但我再怎么强调我所说内容的重要性也不为过。如果你满怀信心地指引内在自我引领你度过物质生存，它便会如此运作。若你专注于困难，便不会允许它这样做。这种给自己留出空间的方法，也将帮助你在心灵事务上获得更大的自由。因为自我实相中任何负面焦点（请着重强调"负面"二字）都会自动阻碍你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Fear cannot be ignored. It must be faced and conquered. It always leads to retreat when it is not faced. The physical image is indeed a replica in many ways of the inner self. When a man is ill it is not necessarily because he wants to be ill subconsciously. It is not necessarily because he is receiving some hidden psychological benefit, or because the illness fulfills some need. He is ill often--always in fact--because of a distortion that is occurring within the self, and materialized in physical form.
quotes.translation: 恐惧无法被忽视。它必须被面对并克服。当恐惧不被面对时，它总是导致退缩。物质形象在许多方面的确是内在自我的复制品。当人生病时，未必是因为潜意识里想要生病，未必是因为他在获得某种隐藏的心理益处，或疾病满足了某种需求。他生病往往——事实上总是——因为自我内部正在发生的扭曲，并以物质形式显化出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner self and the deeper layers of the subconscious are relatively free however from the egos false gods, and it is for this reason that precognitions are at all possible. For these layers of the self are simply able to perceive a larger portion of action than the ego is able or willing to perceive. As a rule, the ego will not even accept the information that is derived in such a manner, for to do so would be to deny those artificial precepts of continuity upon which it feels its dominance rests.
quotes.translation: 然而内在自我与潜意识较深层次相对不受自我虚假神祇的束缚，正因如此，预知才成为可能。因为这些自我层次能够感知到比自我所能或愿意感知的更广阔的行动范围。通常，自我甚至不会接受以这种方式获得的信息，因为这样做将否定那些它认为其统治所依赖的连续性人为准则。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Here we have a combination of forces psychic showing themselves in chemical and electrical manifestations. The seasons as you know represent the physical construction of the inner psychic climate. As particular portions of matter are transformed, as the inner self, through the inner senses creates a simple material object that is picked up by the outer senses clearly as, say, a table, so are these other constructions that closely mirror inner reality that are perceived by the outer senses as effects.
quotes.translation: 在此我们看到了心灵力量以化学与电性显化相结合的表现。如你所知，季节代表着内在心灵气候的物质建构。正如特定物质部分被转化，内在自我通过内在感官创造出能被外在感官清晰捕捉的简单物质对象（比如一张桌子），这些紧密映照内在实相的其他建构，也被外在感官感知为效应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The physical system suffers. It is impossible for the ego to block off specific connections with the whole personality, therefore any barriers effectively impede whole blocks of active and necessary vitality. In Ruburt's case now, the floodgates to the inner self are opened, so that the vitality rushes into those areas that have been to some extent denied.
quotes.translation: 物质系统在受苦。自我不可能切断与整个人格的特定连接，因此任何障碍都会有效阻碍整块活跃且必要的生命力。以鲁柏目前的情况而言，通往内在自我的闸门已经开启，使得生命力涌入那些在某种程度上曾被否定的区域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Basically this concern for human welfare is indeed virtuous, but overindulged in it becomes loaded with possibilities that could be most unfortunate. You knew I was going to light into you this evening, as Ruburt would say. What I want, here, is the balance. Neither plunge yourself into the ignorance, doubts and injustices, so that you can see nothing else, nor close your eyes to them. But there must be a place within you where these do not exist, or the freedom of the inner self will be hampered, as far as its connection with the ego is concerned. Your deep consideration for human problems has indeed helped lead you to these sessions.
quotes.translation: 从根本上说，这种对人类福祉的关切确实是美德，但过度沉溺其中就会充满可能带来最不幸后果的潜在因素。你知道我今晚要训斥你，正如鲁柏会说的那样。我在此想要的是平衡。既不要沉溺于无知、怀疑与不公之中以致看不见其他事物，也不要对它们视而不见。但在你之内必须存在一个这些都不存在的空间，否则就内在自我与自我的连接而言，其自由将受到阻碍。你对人类问题的深切关怀确实引导你参与了这些课程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When Ruburt replaces the bed sheets, I suggest colored ones. As he goes to sleep this evening, have him try imagining a scene in springtime, with him walking briskly or running. When he walks now on the streets, he should keep the mental image just given in his mind, picturing the whole flexible and fleet image, and the inner self will take steps to see that the suitable adjustments are made. He should remember to give frequent suggestions pertaining to relaxation. This is extremely important.
quotes.translation: 当鲁柏更换床单时，我建议使用彩色床单。今晚他入睡时，让他试着想象一个春天的场景，他在其中轻快地行走或奔跑。现在他走在街上时，应保持刚才给予的心像，想象那完整灵活而敏捷的画面，内在自体将采取措施确保做出适当的调整。他应记得经常给予与放松相关的暗示。这一点极为重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Discipline then should not only be considered, as it is by some schools of thought, as a mere mental discipline over the muscles, or various portions of the body by the inner self, but indeed a discipline in terms of training of the ego by the inner self, so that the ego as a personality achieves a well-balanced relationship with the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 因此，纪律不应像某些学派所认为的那样，仅仅被视为内在自体对肌肉或身体各部分的纯粹心智控制，而确实是一种由内在自体训练自我的纪律，使自我作为人格与物质宇宙达成平衡的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner self does indeed have an overall conception of the goals and strengths of the personality. It is then this inner self that must be searched for the answers. I mentioned earlier in another session that the very attempt to seek for an answer to the basic problem will indeed automatically release some of that energy for a constructive purpose.
quotes.translation: 内在自体确实对人格的目标与力量有整体性的概念。因此，必须向这个内在自体寻求答案。我在另一节中曾提到，仅仅尝试寻找基本问题的答案，确实会自动释放部分能量用于建设性目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner ego however is always aware of both aspects of its reality. In the deepest sense (Pause), this inner self is organized about its primary aspect, which is creativity. It constantly translates the components of its gestalt into reality, either physical reality through the EE units I have mentioned, or into other realities equally as valid.
quotes.translation: 然而内在自我始终意识到其现实的两个面向。在最深层的意义上（停顿），这个内在自体是围绕其首要面向——创造力——而组织的。它不断将其完形的组成部分转化为现实，要么通过我提过的EE单位转化为物质现实，要么转化为同样有效的其他现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is in all of this an order. It is an order that the inner self is to learn. It is intuitively known, but it must be realized. There are personalities far more developed than my own; there are personalities that operate in a context that even I would find extremely alien, but no particle of individuality is ever lost, and no experience.
quotes.translation: 这一切之中存在着一种秩序。这是内在自体必须学习的秩序。它被直觉地知晓，但必须被实现。有比我自身发展得远为成熟的人格；有在连我都会觉得极其陌生的脉络中运作的人格，但没有任何个体性粒子会失落，也没有任何经验会失落。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The brain looks out upon the physical universe, and consciousness then reacts, again creatively, to that environment. Information is now carried in reverse fashion back to the inner self, in an instantaneous and automatic procedure. Thus thought becomes an inner image which is translated into a thermal image, and then into intuitional form, into highly condensed and codified data, and then into a pure and direct sort of experience which you cannot understand as physical creatures.
quotes.translation: 大脑向外审视物质宇宙，然后意识再次以创造性的方式对该环境做出反应。信息现在以反向方式，通过瞬间自动的程序传回内在自体。于是思想成为内在影像，被转化为热影像，再转化为直觉形式，转化为高度浓缩编码的数据，然后转化为一种你们作为物质生物无法理解的纯粹而直接的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The ego considers itself the self and considers anything outside of its self as being either no self or another such separate identity, and so the individual man is led to believe that telepathy is basically a communication between two or more basically alone, separate and aloof selves. Telepathy does not operate at the level of the ego, although its actions may protrude into the domain of the ego. Telepathy operates within the inner self, within various levels, different levels of the subconscious, where the ideas of separation and limitations of self are not nearly so limiting.
quotes.translation: 自我视自身为全部，并将自身之外的一切视为非我或另一个孤立的身份，因此个体人类相信心电感应本质上是两个或多个基本孤独、分离且疏离的自我之间的沟通。心电感应并不在自我的层面运作，尽管其作用可能渗入自我的领域。心电感应运作于内在自我之中，运作于潜意识的不同层面，在那里，自我的分离与限制观念远没有那么具有约束力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: At times they are able to be perceived as pseudo images. They are doing subconsciously what came naturally, attempting to form, as always, their own physical construction. However it is impossible for them to create a consistent solid image in your terms, for while they are still focused within your system the inner self knows well that the individual is finished with a given life situation, is out of alignment so to speak, and is therefore denied full use of its own energy.
quotes.translation: 有时它们能被感知为伪图像。它们在做着原本自然发生的事，试图像往常一样构建自己的物质形态。然而，以你们的说法，它们不可能创造出一个连贯的实体形象，因为当它们仍聚焦于你们的系统时，内在自我深知个体已结束特定的人生情境，可以说是脱离了校准状态，因此被剥夺了对其自身能量的完全使用权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now,"There is no place to go" if you know what is truly meant by that statement. It is also true that there are as many places to go as you wish to find. You always create the places and the destinations at which you arrive. There are no places, and there are infinities of places. The inner self forms all systems and all places. On the one hand you can indeed call them illusion. On the other hand, these illusions are quite real. They are the clothing over the basic reality.
quotes.translation: 现在，“无处可去”——如果你真正理解这句话的含义。同样真实的是，有多少你想去的地方，就有多少地方可去。你总是创造你到达的地方和目的地。没有地方，又有无限的地方。内在自我形成所有系统与所有地方。一方面，你确实可以称它们为幻相；另一方面，这些幻相又相当真实。它们是覆盖在基本实相之上的外衣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This is the ideal circumstance, for when this is the case then the ego listens to the inner self, and then directs its energy outward in a way that is beneficial for the whole gestalt framework. What you call negative suggestions are often judgments of the ego, for suggestion works from the ego to the subconscious, as well as it works the other way around. Such suggestions made by the ego can indeed be caught, and positive or constructive suggestions given to replace them.
quotes.translation: 这是理想的情况，因为当如此时，自我会倾听内在自我，然后以有益于整体完形架构的方式将能量向外引导。你们所谓的负面暗示往往是自我的判断，因为暗示既从自我流向潜意识，也以相反方向运作。自我做出的这类暗示确实可以被捕捉到，并用正面或建设性的暗示来取代它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: All of the powers of your inner self are set into activation as a result of your conscious beliefs. You have lost a sense of responsibility for your conscious thought because you have been taught that it is not what forms your life. You have been told that regardless of your beliefs you are terrorized by unconscious conditioning.
quotes.translation: 你内在自我的所有力量都因你有意识的信念而被激活。你已丧失对意识思想的责任感，因为你被教导说，并非意识思想塑造你的生活。你被告知，无论你的信念如何，你都被无意识的制约所恐吓。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You can see that the inner self is much more spacious and unlimited than the ego self, and that while divisions occur they may vary, and the boundaries of the inner self constantly change.
quotes.translation: 你可以看到，内在自我比自我自我更为广阔且不受限制，虽然分裂可能发生且各有不同，但内在自我的边界不断变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Such electrical realities then, through the strength of their intensities and their particular range, are projected into some fields, but not projected into others. Any so-called travel through time involves then a traveling through such intensities. This is obviously impossible for the physical camouflaged self, but it is not impossible for the inner self, which as you know has its own electrical reality, which is again composed of particular impulses and intensities.
quotes.translation: 这些电性实相凭借其强度与特定范围的力量，被投射到某些场域，而非其他场域。任何所谓的穿越时间之旅，实则涉及穿越此类强度。这对物质伪装自我而言显然不可能，但对内在自我却非不可能——如你所知，内在自我拥有自身的电性实相，这实相同样由特定脉冲与强度构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This, temporarily, is something like what happened to you, Joseph. The inner self is aware of other realities. It is aware of the ego. Remember here the difference between consciousness of self and the ego, for the difference is important. The ego is but part of the self, part of the conscious self, but focused in one direction.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，这暂时与你曾经历的情况类似。内在自我觉察到其他实相，也觉察到自我。请记住此处自我意识与自我的区别，因这区别至关重要。自我仅是自性的一部分、意识自我的一部分，但聚焦于单一方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. While the inner self is aware of this connection, the present self has been fooling itself to some degree, for it did not accept the intuitional knowledge. Regardless of what you thought consciously therefore, you still inwardly blamed yourself for letting the child go, and therefore the difficulty with the womanly organs.
quotes.translation: 现在。当内在自我觉察到这份连结时，当前自我已在某种程度上自欺，因它未曾接纳直觉知识。因此无论你意识层面作何想法，你内在仍因放手让孩子离去而自责，故而引发女性器官的困扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

source_raw.title: (Continuation of Session 458, January 20, 1969, after break at 9:47. This material is not included in the records.

quotes.text: This is not to say that the outer ego is a puppet. It is to say that the outer ego is far less conscious than the inner ego or the inner self, that its perception is less, that it is far less stable, though it makes great pretense at stability; that it springs from the inner self, and is less rather than more, aware. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这并非说外在自我是傀儡。而是说外在自我远不如内在自我或内在自性具有意识，其感知力更弱，稳定性更差——尽管它极力伪装稳定；它源自内在自我，其觉知程度是递减而非递增的。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now it is obvious that the body grows up about the inner self, and that trees grow out of the ground, whereas buildings do not ordinarily spring up like flowers of their own accord; so the inner self has various methods of creation, and uses the EE units in different ways, as you shall see as we continue with this discussion.
quotes.translation: 显然身体是围绕内在自我成长起来的，树木从大地中生长，而建筑物通常不会像花朵般自发绽放；因此内在自我拥有多样的创造方式，并以不同方式运用EE单位，随着我们继续讨论，你将逐渐明白。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (Emphatically:) When the inner self is alerted, it will immediately try to remedy the situation by an influx of self-corrective measures. On occasion, when the situation gets out of hand, it will bypass those restrictive areas of the conscious mind, and solve the problem by shooting forth energy in other layers of activity.
quotes.translation: （强调地：）当内在自我被唤醒时，它会立即通过注入自我修正措施来补救状况。当情况失控时，它有时会绕过意识心智的限制区域，通过在其他活动层面释放能量来解决问题。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The inner self obviously needs the outer ego with its outer senses, in order to permit its own materialization in various camouflage forms. This should not be underrated or forgotten. Without the outer core, the inner self could simply not add to its own value fulfillment through participation in energy-constructs （hyphen）.
quotes.translation: 内在自体显然需要外在自我及其外在感官，才能以各种伪装形态实现自身物质化。这一点不应被低估或遗忘。若无外在核心，内在自体便无法通过参与能量建构来增益自身的价值完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner self would be then any given outthrust of original action outward, as explained earlier. This outthrust would, because of its nature, instantly send further outthrusts in as many directions as possible for it. And because it is action, and because no action can complete itself, and no action can completely materialize, then each outthrust or materialization would result in an in-thrust; not into the original action from which it came, but into itself.
quotes.translation: 如先前所述，内在自体将是原始行动向外投射的任一特定迸发。这种迸发因其本质，会立即向尽可能多的方向发射出更多迸发。由于它是行动，且没有任何行动能自我完成，也没有任何行动能完全物质化，因此每个迸发或物质化都会导致一个内收——并非回归其源起的原始行动，而是进入自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is a corresponding image, held always within the inner consciousness of those who pass out of your system. (Long pause. One of several here.) This is indelible, but not always immediately available for reference. It forms a part of the whole inner self. We would prefer that you not think of any given entire entity in terms of a physical structure, though we have ourselves used the term structure to make explanations simpler, and will probably do so again.
quotes.translation: 那些离开你们系统的人，其内在意识中始终存有一个对应的影像。（长停顿。此处有数次停顿。）这影像不可磨灭，但并非总能立即被参照。它构成整个内在自体的一部分。我们更希望你们不要以物理结构的概念来思考任何特定整体存有，尽管我们自己也使用"结构"一词以简化解释，且将来可能继续如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Later you may be able to follow this inner self even while the physical ego operates in its normal manner, but this is much more difficult if overall personality balance is to be maintained. It should be fairly obvious that identity hardly resides exclusively within the physically-oriented ego. In one sense, identity is always a becoming, and it can never be a static, finished thing. For it knows itself through change, and that which is finished cannot change.
quotes.translation: 日后你们或许能在物质自我正常运作时追随这个内在自体，但若要维持整体人格平衡，这将困难得多。显而易见，身份认同绝非仅存于物质导向的自我之中。从某种意义而言，身份认同始终处于"成为"的状态，它永不可能成为静止的、完成之物。因为它通过改变认知自身，而完成之物无法改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: They must be interpreted instead through the use of those inner senses of which I have spoken, for these are the basic tools of the inner self. I realize that it is frowned upon to speak in terms of a limited intellect, which cannot understand a whole reality because of a built-in deficiency; nevertheless while it is true that the intellect by itself cannot grasp or comprehend inner reality, this should not be thought of as a deficiency inherent in intellect.
quotes.translation: 它们必须通过我提及的那些内在感官来诠释，因为这些是内在自体的基本工具。我明白，谈论有限智力因先天缺陷而无法理解整体实相会招致非议；然而，尽管智力本身确实无法把握或理解内在实相，但这不应被视为智力固有的缺陷。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am in somewhat the same position when I try to explain to you the nature of this inner self, for while you can become aware of it in dreams, you cannot truly appreciate its maturity or abilities; yet they are yours in the same way that the man's abilities belonged to the child. In the dream state you learn, among other things, how to construct your own physical reality day by day, just as after death you learn how to construct your next physical lifetime.
quotes.translation: 当我试图向你们解释这个内在自体的本质时，我处于类似的境地——因为你们虽能在梦中觉察它，却无法真正领会其成熟度或能力；然而它们属于你们，正如那个男人的能力属于孩童。在梦境状态中，你们学习如何日复一日构建自己的物质实相，正如死后你们学习如何构建下一世物质生命。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You may also be part of a self operating within other fields, and operating also within another system of units. The inner self operates as a relay station, as a reference point for the various seemingly disconnected selves. It is only through contact with the inner self that knowledge of the whole self can be found.
quotes.translation: 你或许也是某个在其他场域运作的自我的一部分，同时也在另一个单位系统内运作。内在自我如同中继站，为各个看似互不相连的自我提供参照点。唯有通过与内在自我的接触，才能获得对整体自我的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: At the same time all beliefs are communicated to others, not only through quite unconscious bodily mechanisms, but telepathically. You will always try to correlate your ideas with exterior experience. (Pause.) All of the abilities of the inner self will be brought to bear to materialize the image of your beliefs, regardless of what they ought to be. The "proper" emotions will be generated, bringing about those body states that exist in your conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 与此同时，所有信念不仅通过完全无意识的身体机制，还通过心电感应传达给他人。你总会试图将自己的观念与外在经验相关联。（停顿）无论你的信念"应该"是什么，内在自我的所有能力都将被调动起来，以具象化你信念的影像。那些"恰当"的情绪会被激发，从而引发存在于你意识心之中的身体状态。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Each individual is a universe in a small package. (A one-minute pause.) As the physical planets move in order while being individual, so there can be a social order that is based upon the integrity of the individual. But that order would recognize the inner validity that is within the self; and the inner order, unseen, that forms the integrity of the physical body, likewise would form the integrity of the social body. The self, the individual, being its fulfilled self, would automatically function for the good of itself and for the good of society. The individual's good, therefore, is the society's good, and represents spiritual and physical fulfillment. This presupposes, however, an understanding of the inner self and an exploration into the unknown reality of the individual psyche.
quotes.translation: 每个个体都是一个浓缩的宇宙。（一分钟停顿）如同物质行星在保持独特性的同时有序运行，社会秩序也可以建立在个体完整性的基础之上。但这种秩序会承认自我内在的有效性；那不可见的内在秩序，既构成物质身体的完整性，同样也将构成社会身体的完整性。当自我、个体实现其圆满状态时，自然会为自身利益与社会利益运作。因此，个体之善即社会之善，代表着灵性与物质的圆满实现。然而，这预设了对内在自我的理解，以及对个体心灵未知实相的探索。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 704
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: (From the 242nd session for March 16, 1966:) The ego is not the most powerful or the most knowledgeable portion of the self. It is simply a well-specialized part of the personality, fully equipped to operate under certain circumstances21 ... When those conditions no longer exist [after "death"], then other layers of the self take over the dominant position, and the personality realigns its psychological components. The ego does not disappear, however; it merely takes a back seat in some respects, as your own subconscious does during physical existence. The ego is under the control of what may loosely be called "the inner self." The survival or nonphysical personality has somewhat the same relationship to the ego as the dreaming personality has to it in physical life.
quotes.translation: （摘自1966年3月16日第242节：）自我并非自我最强大或最博学的部分。它只是人格中高度专门化的部分，完全具备在特定情境下运作的能力……当这些条件（在"死亡"后）不复存在时，自我的其他层面便占据主导地位，人格重新调整其心理构成。但自我并未消失；它只是在某些方面退居次要位置，如同你肉身存在时的潜意识一般。自我受控于可笼统称为"内在自我"的部分。存续的或非肉身的人格与自我的关系，某种程度上如同肉身生活中做梦人格与自我的关系。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I am making generalizations here, but each individual case should be looked at in its own light. Such people as a rule, however, have an exaggerated version of the self (pause), so idealized (long pause) that its very existence intimidates practical action. They are afraid of making mistakes, terrified of betraying this sensed inner psychological superior. Usually, such an idealized inner self comes from the acceptance of highly distorted beliefs--again, concerning good and evil. You end up with what can amount to two main inner antagonists: a superior self and a debased self. The qualities considered good are attracted to the superior self as if it were a magnet. The qualities that seem bad (underlined) are in the same fashion attracted to the debased self. Both of them, relatively isolated psychological polarities, hold about equal sway. All other psychological evidences that are ambiguous, or not clearly understood by either side, group together under their own psychological banners. This is a kind of circular rather than linear arrangement, however, psychologically speaking.
quotes.translation: 我在此进行概括性论述，但每个个体案例都需根据其自身情况审视。不过，这类人通常持有对自我过度夸张的版本（停顿），如此理想化（长停顿）以至于其存在本身就令实际行动望而生畏。他们害怕犯错，恐惧背叛这种感知到的内在心理优越者。通常，这种理想化的内在自我源于对高度扭曲信念的接纳——再次涉及善恶观念。最终你会形成两个主要的内在对抗者：优越自我与卑劣自我。被视为善的品质如同被磁铁吸引般聚向优越自我，而看似恶的品质则以同样方式聚向卑劣自我。这两个相对孤立的心灵极性，几乎拥有同等影响力。所有其他模棱两可或未被任何一方清晰理解的心理证据，都会聚集在各自的心理旗帜之下。然而从心理学角度而言，这是一种环形而非线性的排列。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: At the beginning of the notes for this 920th session I wrote that the session isn't dictation for Dreams. Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: As far as these drugs are concerned there are a few points I would like to make. One of your purposes as I have said is to learn to organize energy units and to focus your own energy along those lines. That is, you are the energy that you use. The self-consciousness is not to be blotted out but taken along. It is so to speak to walk side by side with the inner self. The use of these drugs sweeps the personality off its feet. Often the personality does receive a rewarding glimpse of the inner reality, but more often the ego is merely sent tumbling through frightening images of chaotic phantom realities formed by a suddenly-released subconscious, and with no guide. The experience is often vivid and long remembered, but so unorganized and undisciplined that no inner order is arrived at, no other organization glimpsed, and the ordinary but necessary camouflage footing suddenly dispensed with.
quotes.translation: 关于这些药物，我想提出几点。如我所述，你的目的之一是学习组织能量单位，并沿着这些路径聚焦自身能量。也就是说，你即是你所使用的能量。自我意识不应被抹除，而应被携带同行。可以说，它应与内在自我并肩而行。使用这些药物会使人格失去平衡。人格虽常能瞥见内在实相而获益，但更多时候，自我只是被抛入由突然释放的潜意识所形成、且无人引导的混乱幻象实相的恐怖影像中。这种体验往往生动且令人长久铭记，但因缺乏组织与纪律，既无法触及内在秩序，也未能瞥见其他组织形态，同时突然抛弃了寻常却必要的伪装立足点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The pieces to the puzzle are at mankind's fingertips, but he has put together an awkward, ill-fitting miniature model universe of a puzzle with which he is afraid to part. If the physical universe existed on a physical field only, indeed this would be the greatest miracle of all, for it would be impossible. The inner vitality of which we have so often spoken, and whose ways I have described, this inner vitality is the force which itself forms the physical universe, and without which no such manifestation would be possible. Yet this inner self, this inner vitality, is one of the main clues which man refuses to recognize, calling it an unreasonable assumption, but not willing to examine it for those characteristics which show it to be the most reasonable and logical of phenomena.
quotes.translation: 拼图的碎片就在人类指尖，但人类却拼凑出一个笨拙扭曲、比例失调的微型宇宙模型，且不愿舍弃。若物质宇宙仅存在于物质场域，那确实是最伟大的奇迹——因为根本不可能存在。我们常提及的内在活力，以及我所描述过的运作方式，正是这种内在活力本身形成了物质宇宙，没有它便不可能有任何显化。然而这个内在自体、这种内在活力，正是人类拒绝承认的主要线索之一，称之为不合理的假设，却不愿检视那些足以证明它是最合理、最合逻辑现象的种种特征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As inner energy forms more complicated gestalts through the processes that I have earlier explained, then inner energy continues its communication with the physical matter that it creates about it. When inner energy desires to construct a more complicated gestalt, then it must telepathically communicate this intent and purpose through the matter which it collects about itself, forming a more complicated inner telepathic pattern first, that can then be filled in with physical matter. The manners in which telepathy operates are difficult to explain because of the divergence of definition held by the ego and by the inner self of any given individual. To the human being it must appear that telepathy is a mental or psychic communication occurring between two or more entirely separate selves. The ego, you see, has one definition for the self and its own idea of the limitations of itself.
quotes.translation: 当内在能量通过我先前解释的过程形成更复杂的完形时，它便持续与自身创造出的物质进行沟通。当内在能量想要构建更复杂的完形时，它必须通过收集在自身周围的物质，以心电感应方式传达这个意图与目的——先形成更复杂的内在心电感应模式，再用物质填充。心电感应运作方式的解释之所以困难，在于任何个体的自我与内在自体对定义的分歧。对人类而言，心电感应必然表现为两个或更多完全分离的自体之间的心智或灵性沟通。你看，自我对自体有自己的一套定义，对自体的局限性也有自己的看法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It constructs ideas instead within another electrical system. Yet because of the nature of the personality, no dream exists in a vacuum, and every dream is recorded by the inner self. I am making an attempt here this evening, since we have three present, to give a very brief, and I am afraid inadequate explanation, that will however serve as a basis so that these three, at least, will be able to have some sort of a standing ground for other discussions.
quotes.translation: 它反而在另一个电性系统中构建意念。但由于人格的本质，没有任何梦境存在于真空中，每个梦都被内在自体记录着。今晚我在此尝试——既然我们有三位在场——做一个非常简短（恐怕也不够充分）的解释，但这至少能为这三位提供基础，使他们在其他讨论中能有所依凭。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This knowledge helps you use and direct physical laws, not ignore them. You use them more efficiently, and for the purposes of the inner self. You begin to create physical matter so that it does indeed reflect the inner self, and in so doing, you effect changes that are noticed by others and serve as an example.
quotes.translation: 这种知识帮助你运用并引导物质法则，而非忽视它们。你更有效地运用它们，为内在自体的目的服务。你开始创造物质，使其确实反映内在自体，并在此过程中产生他人注意到的改变，成为典范。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: A particularly vivid dream is every bit as real to the inner self as a vivid psychological experience that occurs within the waking state. It is important here that we realize that as far as the basic self is concerned no distinctions are made in this respect. The personality creates its dreams; the dreams are then experienced. The experience is indelibly recorded, and then changes the personality, again, in the same manner that any experience would.
quotes.translation: 对内在自体而言，一个特别生动的梦境，其真实性丝毫不亚于清醒状态下发生的生动心理体验。重要的是我们要认识到，就基本自体而言，在这方面并无区别。人格创造其梦境，然后体验这些梦境。这种体验被不可磨灭地记录下来，进而改变人格——其方式与任何其他体验完全相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The subconscious in sleep has great freedom, and has at its command information gained through past experience in this life and in other lives. In the intense focus of awareness that occurs within the dream state, the inner self is able to direct all of its energies for the purpose of solving a given problem.
quotes.translation: 睡眠中的潜意识拥有极大自由，并能运用此生及前世经验中获得的信息。在梦境状态中高度集中的觉知里，内在自体能够调动全部能量来解决特定问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are a few points that I would like to make of a general nature. Ruburt has been reading Jung, though not consistently. The libido does not originate in the individual subconscious of the present personality. It originates instead in the energy of the entity and inner self, and is directed by means of the inner senses, outward so to speak, through the deeper layers of the individual subconscious mind, then through the outer or personal layers.
quotes.translation: 我想先谈几点一般性的观点。鲁柏一直在读荣格，虽然并非持续不断。力比多并非源自当前人格的个体潜意识，而是源自存有与内在自我的能量，并通过内在感官向外引导——可以说，经由个体潜意识的深层，再通过外层或个人层面的潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: If this sounds difficult then indeed it is, because I will not deal in platitudes, and the exercise of the inner abilities demand, as a bulwark, the sometimes difficult achievement of an ego that can adapt itself in the outer environment, and so hold its own while the inner self is then freed to go its way.
quotes.translation: 如果这听起来困难，那确实如此，因为我不愿用陈词滥调敷衍。内在能力的运用需要一个堡垒——即一个能在外在环境中灵活适应、站稳脚跟的自我，唯有如此，内在自我才能被解放出来走自己的路。这有时是项艰巨的成就。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The movement through space is a distortion. I expect to say much more about this in further sessions, as it is extremely important; and you can see now perhaps why our eighth sense, disentanglement, is so important, since the inner self must disentangle itself from a particular camouflage before it can change. It must ignore, so to speak, one set of camouflage and be able to either adopt another smoothly or to dispense with camouflage entirely.
quotes.translation: 穿越空间的运动是一种扭曲。我期待在后续课程中对此详加阐述，因为它极其重要。现在你或许能明白为何我们的第八感——解离——如此关键：内在自我必须先从一个特定的幻相中解离出来，才能进行转变。可以说，它必须忽略一套幻相，然后要么平稳地采用另一套，要么完全摒弃幻相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json
