quotes.text: In other words, a dream allows the inner self to view itself within the spacious present. Now, chemically the physical body does need to dream. That is, dreaming is a necessity if the physical body is to survive. This is the result of certain chemical reactions and chemical necessities, chemical excesses that build up during the days, inciting the mental dream mechanism.
quotes.translation: 换言之，梦境让内在自我能在广袤的当下中审视自身。从化学层面看，肉体确实需要做梦。也就是说，若肉体要存活，做梦是必需的。这是某些化学反应与化学需求的结果——白天积累的化学过剩物质会激发心理的梦机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We have seen that all experience is retained in electrically coded data within the cells, and that the material of the cells forms about this coded experience. We have seen that the ego begins, sparked into being, by the inner self, greatly influenced by heredity and physical environment; and that this ego as it continues to exist gradually builds up an electrical reality of its own, as its experiences form into coded data within the cells.
quotes.translation: 我们已经看到，所有经验都以电性编码数据的形式存于细胞中，而细胞的物质结构正是围绕这些编码经验形成的。我们也看到，自我由内在自我激发而生，深受遗传与物理环境影响；随着自我持续存在，它逐渐构建起自身的电性实相，因为其经验在细胞内形成了编码数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In denying life to yourself you end up by denying life to others. Now I wish this session was recorded so you could hear me, for I hold you, as Ruburt does, closely and dearly as a friend. But you are bound to misinterpret what I say in some sessions, and so it behooves me to speak more plainly. You do not realize now, you do not let yourself realize, the beauty and the complicated reality of your being. You do not let yourself realize the spontaneity and joyful burst that is your inner self, that results in this present human personality that you call yourself. Nor the effort and creative energy that has gone into your making, and that sings within your being like the first morning of creation.
quotes.translation: 否定自己的生命，最终会导致否定他人的生命。此刻我多希望这堂课能被录下来，好让你听见我的声音——因为正如鲁柏一样，我将你视作亲密而珍爱的朋友。但你难免会误解我在某些课程中的话，因此我必须说得更直白些。你此刻尚未意识到——也不让自己意识到——你存在中的美与复杂实相。你不让自己意识到那属于你内在自我的自发性与喜悦迸发，正是这迸发造就了你称之为自己的当前人格。你也不让自己意识到那投入你创造中的努力与创造力——它在你存在中歌唱，如同创世的第一缕晨光。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I would suggest that you both in summertime indulge in physical activity in the yard--quick activity of a game variety. The fact that Ruburt begins to remember his dreams shows that the inner self is being allowed more freedom, and it responds to physical touch, pampering, denial, as the case may be.
quotes.translation: 我建议你们两人在夏季时多从事庭院里的体能活动——带有游戏性质的快速活动。鲁柏开始记得自己的梦境，这显示内在自体正被允许拥有更多自由，而它会根据情况对肢体接触、纵容或拒绝做出回应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Each inner self is a portion of the basic inner reality. It cannot know itself however, except through experience, and it must create in order to experience. The experience constantly deepens the value fulfillment of basic reality itself. There is no alternative between diversity and nothingness.
quotes.translation: 每个内在自体都是基本内在实相的一部分。然而，它只能通过经验认识自己，并且必须创造才能体验。经验不断深化基本实相本身的价值完成。在多样性与虚无之间别无选择。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Only when such nourishment is for some reason cut off to a considerable degree, is the ego threatened by starvation... We will have more to say concerning the ego's relationship with the so-called unconscious. In a healthy personality the inner self easily projects all experience into EE units, where they are translated into actuality. Physical matter therefore acts as a feedback. Now we will end our session unless you have questions.
quotes.translation: 只有当这种滋养因某种原因被大幅切断时，自我才会面临饥饿的威胁……关于自我与所谓潜意识的关系，我们还有更多要说的。在健康的人格中，内在自体能轻易将所有经验投射到EE单位中，在那里它们被转化为实际存在。因此物质身体充当了反馈机制。除非你们有问题，否则我们现在结束此节。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If -- now, a brief innocuous-enough example -- you meet an individual often enough and think, "He gives me a pain in the neck," it is surely no coincidence that you find yourself with a painful neck in future encounters with this person. The suggestion is quite a conscious one, however (emphatically), given by yourself and carried out not symbolically but most practically, most literally. In other words, the conscious mind gives its orders and the inner self carries them out.
quotes.translation: 举个简短无害的例子——如果你经常遇见某个人并心想"他让我脖子疼"，那么日后与这人相处时发现自己真的脖子疼，这绝非巧合。不过（强调地），这个暗示完全是你自己给出的，而且执行方式不是象征性的，而是最实际、最字面的。换句话说，意识心下达指令，内在自体负责执行。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This sixth sense is too important to skim over, and yet I wanted to mention it this evening because it fits in with our discussion. Without this sixth sense, and without its constant use by the inner self-conscious ego, you could not even construct the physical camouflage universe of your own plane. This sense, again, is used constantly beneath the outer egos awareness, and forms the basis for camouflage constructions on every plane.
quotes.translation: 这第六感太过重要不容轻忽，但我今晚想提及它，是因为它符合我们的讨论。没有这第六感，没有内在自体-意识自我对其持续运用，你们甚至无法构建自己层面的物质伪装宇宙。再次强调，这种感知在外在自我意识之下持续运作，并构成每个层面伪装建构的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Every nerve and fiber within the physical image has an inner purpose that is not seen, and that serves to connect the inner self with physical reality--in other words, that allows the inner self to create physical reality.
quotes.translation: 物质形象中的每条神经和纤维都有看不见的内在目的，这个目的将内在自体与物质实相连接——换言之，它允许内在自体创造物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It goes without saying, or should, that the inner self sends its projections of inner senses through both the physical universe and the dream universe; yet all this talk of space and placement is a mere convenience. Yet, in terms of physical construction this is what you would find, and this, if it were understood, is what is seen in the actual construction of the most minute physical particle under observation in your laboratories.
quotes.translation: 不言而喻，内在自我通过物质宇宙和梦境宇宙投射其内在感官，但所有这些关于空间和位置的讨论仅为方便起见。然而，就物质结构而言，这正是你们在实验室观察最细微粒子实际构造时所见的景象——若能理解这一点的话。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: All of this happens because the inner portions of your being operate spontaneously, joyfully, freely; all of this occurs because your inner self believes in you, often even while you do not believe in it. These unconscious portions of your being operate amazingly well, frequently despite the greatest misunderstanding on your part of their nature and function, and in the face of strong interference from you because of your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 这一切之所以发生，是因为你们存在的内在部分自发、喜悦、自由地运作；这一切之所以发生，是因为你们的内在自我信任你们，即便在你们不信任它时也常如此。你们存在的这些无意识部分运作得惊人地好，即便你们对其本质与功能存在极大误解，且常因自身信念而对其施加强烈干扰。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The emotions belong to the personality, that is to the present personality, and are strongly connected both to the conscious ego and to the inner self, which is so often ignored. This is the rather difficult part for me to explain, I'm afraid. I'm not sure how to go about making this clear.
quotes.translation: 情绪属于人格，即当前人格，并与常被忽视的内在自我及意识自我紧密相连。恐怕这部分对我而言较难解释，我不确定如何阐明这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There are other constructions, quite as valid, which make little or no impression on the outer senses, but constructions with which the inner self is fairly familiar; and these so-called immaterial constructions exert a strong influence indirectly upon the world of physical construction.
quotes.translation: 还存在其他同样真实的建构，它们对外在感官几乎或完全不产生印象，但内在自我却相当熟悉；这些所谓的非物质建构间接对物质建构世界施加着强烈影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The very idea of protection, however, as you know, implies a threat--so if you believe in threats you had better have protection. It was not necessary for Ruburt to see the form again--merely to sense the reality of that powerful energy, and realize that it worked on his behalf. In a fashion the form also represented the innocent and powerful inner self, or spontaneous self, or naturally magical self--the terms are synonymous.
quotes.translation: 然而，正如你们所知，保护的概念本身就暗示着威胁——因此若你相信威胁存在，最好寻求保护。鲁柏无需再次看见那形态，只需感知那股强大能量的实相，并意识到它在为他运作。从某种角度看，这形态也代表着纯真而强大的内在自我、自发自我或自然魔法自我——这些术语同义。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Emotions also are electrically coded, and also have an independent electrical reality. On a physical level they are both chemical and electrical. The validity and strength of emotions cannot be overestimated, for they represent in only slightly tinged form the uncamouflaged vitality of the universe as it passes through the inner self. Emotions represent, therefore, this vitality before it has been constructed into camouflage.
quotes.translation: 情绪同样以电码编码，并具有独立的电性实相。在物质层面，它们兼具化学与电性特质。情绪的真实性与力量不可低估，因为它们仅以轻微染色的形式，呈现宇宙穿过内在自我时未被伪装的活力。因此，情绪代表着这种活力在尚未被建构为伪装前的状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The dream objects, then, are so cunningly, and if I may say so, almost slyly chosen, that the simplest of them may refer to instances in this existence, to personally subconsciously desired or feared objects or instances, to desired or feared objects or instances in past lives. They, such dream objects, may be the method or means with which the inner self warns the personality of future possible disappointments or disasters.
quotes.translation: 那么，梦境中的物体被如此巧妙地——如果可以这么说的话，几乎是狡猾地——选择出来，以至于其中最简单的一个都可能指向这一世的经历、个人潜意识中渴望或恐惧的物体或事件，以及前世中渴望或恐惧的物体或事件。这些梦境物体，可能是内在自我用来警告人格未来可能出现的失望或灾难的方法或手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is much involved here that a reading of past sessions on matter will make plain. You realize of course that the atoms and molecules within the physical image continually change during existence on the physical field. Openings, so to speak, for the influx of new material into the physical form, are made possible by the inner self. When it abdicates it closes up the possibility of this repairing type of molecular action.
quotes.translation: 这里涉及很多内容，阅读以往关于物质世界的课程就会明白。你当然知道，在物质场域的存在过程中，物理形象内的原子和分子不断变化。可以说，新物质流入物理形态的通道，是由内在自我促成的。当它放弃时，它就会关闭这种修复性分子活动的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: More energy indeed can be held in the personal subconscious in such a manner than can be used in studying other areas of the inner self, for it is in the personal subconscious that energy blockage most frequently occurs. This does not mean that you should cease in that direction. A smooth and disciplined schedule will serve you well here. I would indeed suggest however that this half-hour schedule not include your weekends.
quotes.translation: 以这种方式，个人潜意识中确实可以容纳比研究内在自我其他领域所能使用的更多的能量，因为能量阻塞最常发生在个人潜意识中。这并不意味着你应该停止那个方向的研究。一个平稳且有规律的日程安排在这里会对你很有帮助。然而，我确实建议这个半小时的日程不要包括你的周末。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner self is always in the process of trying to perfect the nature of that ego which it has adopted. The ego, as you know, is never the same. It bears indeed the stresses that result from daily encounters with physical situations, but it also reaps the rewards that are involved.
quotes.translation: 内在自我始终在试图完善它所采纳的那个自我的本质。如你所知，自我从来不是一成不变的。它确实承受着日常与物质情境接触所产生的压力，但它也收获了其中所涉及的回报。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner self that knows its existence within action, has a firm foothold within reality. The ego can perform its function, fulfill its responsibilities within the physical field, and be free to know adequate joys and pleasures. But such an inner self must be renewed within action.
quotes.translation: 那个知道自己在行动中存在的内在自我，在实相中拥有稳固的立足点。自我可以在物质场域中履行其功能、完成其责任，并自由地体验足够的喜悦和快乐。但这样的内在自我必须在行动中不断更新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Without a sense of joy and inner accomplishment and development of potential, the personality will not only fail to flourish, but the inner self will refuse to maintain the physical structure adequately. This is extremely important. Superficial measures will not fool the inner self.
quotes.translation: 没有喜悦感、内在成就感以及潜能的开发，人格不仅无法茁壮成长，而且内在自我也会拒绝充分维持物理结构。这一点极其重要。表面的措施无法欺骗内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, in one sense, all selves are projections of the whole or that which is. New universes such as your own constantly come into existence. Systems and planes far different develop and in turn form other systems. Infinity has meaning only in subjective and psychic terms. The physical brain cannot contain the idea of infinity. The concept will not fit into three dimensional terms. The whole self, the inner self moves within the concept of infinity as you move within physical reality through space. Infinity contains all that will ever be known, and, of course, all that will ever be known is known within the spacious present .
quotes.translation: 从某种角度来说，所有自我都是整体或"万有"的投射。像你们这样的新宇宙不断诞生。迥然不同的系统和层面发展成形，继而形成其他系统。无限仅在主观和灵性层面具有意义。物质大脑无法容纳无限的概念，这个概念无法用三维术语来理解。整体自我、内在自我在无限的概念中运作，就像你们在物质实相中穿越空间一样。无限包含所有将被知晓的一切，当然，所有将被知晓的一切都在"广袤当下"中被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I am not saying that you should not believe the evidence of your senses; I am waiting for you to say that. We know that our so-called tables are not solid. Even your science knows this now, and yet your eyes see the table as solid. Face up to it, my dear lovelies: Your senses lie. The table is a conglomeration of quickly-moving atoms and molecules but you see it as a table, and you see it as solid. Your senses, and again this is to bring John-Philip up to date, your senses are perceptron of a camouflage physical world which is created by the inner self through the use of mental enzymes in a pattern set by the mental genes.
quotes.translation: 我并非说你们不该相信感官的证据——我是在等你们说出这句话。我们知道所谓的桌子并非固体，连你们的科学如今也明白这点，但你们的眼睛仍视桌子为固体。面对现实吧，亲爱的可爱们：你们的感官在说谎。桌子是快速运动的原子与分子的集合体，但你们却视之为桌子，视之为固体。你们的感官——这又是为了让约翰-菲利普跟上进度——是内在自我通过心智酵素，依照心智基因设定的模式所创造的伪装物质世界的感知器。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Following our analogy, you will be his guest and from his rooms look down into your own with some greater objectivity. This is possible, feasible, since you are all portions, in our analogy, of this same inner self who maintains all of the rooms. While each of you are egotistically focused within your own reality, the deeper layers of the self are aware of the quote "family" relationship. Now give me a moment. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 依循我们的类比，你将成为他的访客，从他的房间以更客观的视角俯视自己的房间。这是可能且可行的，因为在此类比中，你们都是维持所有房间的同一内在自我的部分。当你们各自以自我为中心聚焦于自己的实相时，自我的深层意识仍知晓所谓的"家族"关系。现在请稍等片刻。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is turned inward mainly in terms of the ego. There is awareness here of the inner self, but the main energy is knotted in tensions and exhaustions. At the same time the personality does not refresh its energies. If the energies of the personality were turned further inward, or on the other hand turned further outward toward the outside world, there would be an improvement in terms of additional, recharged energy.
quotes.translation: 它主要朝向内在，就自我而言。此处虽有对内在自我的觉知，但主要能量却纠结于紧张与耗竭之中。与此同时，人格未能更新其能量。若人格的能量进一步转向内在，或另一方面进一步转向外在世界，就会因获得额外补充的能量而有所改善。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The mind is always with you. The particular brain is the physical mechanism that translates the thoughts of the mind. It goes without saying then, that the brain belongs to the physical system, and here in clear terms you see the smooth cooperation that exists. Thoughts are initially psych electric patterns in pure form, productions of the inner self that must be translated in order to be used by the physical self.
quotes.translation: 心智始终与你同在。特定的头脑是将心智思想翻译出来的物质机制。不言而喻，头脑属于物质系统，在此你们能清楚看到存在的顺畅协作。思想最初是纯粹形态的心电模式，是内在自我的产物，必须经过翻译才能被物质自我使用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The experience did involve several experiments that he was making without, of course, conscious knowledge. Several lessons may also be learned from this. The inner self is well aware of its innate capabilities in certain directions, and directs its efforts along these lines.
quotes.translation: 这次经历确实涉及他无意识中进行的几个实验。从中也可学到几课。内在自我清楚知晓自身在某些方向的天赋能力，并沿着这些方向引导其努力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The overall pattern of organization in a physical sense must be maintained however, and always under the auspices of the inner self, which is not imprisoned by its construction, although like any good guardian it spends most of its time at home, in maintaining the structure.
quotes.translation: 然而，肉体层面的整体组织模式必须维持，且始终受内在自体（inner self）的监督。内在自体虽未被其构造所囚禁，但如同尽责的守护者，它大部分时间都驻守于家中维护结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In other cases where the symptom is interior itself, as in ulcers, this is a sign that the inner self has not yet come to such a point. The personality is not yet willing to face the problems even to that extent and the symptom itself is shielded from physical sight, quite rightly symbolically speaking. The relative observability of a symptom is a clue therefore as to the personality's attitude toward its problem.
quotes.translation: 在其他案例中，若症状本身是内在的（如溃疡），这表示内在自体尚未到达临界点。人格甚至不愿直面问题到那种程度，而症状本身被屏蔽于肉体视线之外——从象征意义而言这完全合理。因此，症状的相对可观察性，可作为人格对其问题态度的线索。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In the past I spoke of the innate capsule comprehension, which exists within all cells. These are also electrically coded. Whole comprehensions can thus exist within physical structure while taking up no physical space. Dreams are particularly interesting from this viewpoint, as the original dream experience is a direct electrical experience, decoded electrically, subjectively then translated for the various areas of the inner self. All seemingly purely subjective experiences which take up no physical space, but are emotionally or subjectively felt, all such experiences exist first of all electrically.
quotes.translation: 过去我曾提及存在于所有细胞中的先天胶囊理解（innate capsule comprehension），这些同样以电性编码。因此，完整理解可存在于肉体结构中却不占据物理空间。从这一视角看，梦境尤为有趣：原始梦境体验是直接的电性体验，经电性解码后，再主观翻译给内在自体的各个领域。所有看似纯粹主观、不占物理空间却能被情感或主观感知的体验，首先都以电性形式存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Privately this is when human beings find themselves aware of greater illumination, when they make sudden decisions and experience new strengths. Now such a time is in the offing socially. This may be reflected in periods of seeming unrest in which, however, new creativity is looming. There will then be great planetary changes in terms of your organizations, but these will reflect private interior illuminations that become physically materialized. (More powerfully:) You do not trust your inner selves enough, or realize the creative ferment brewing. If you did you could save yourselves much trouble.
quotes.translation: 私密层面而言，当人类觉察到更伟大的启迪、突然做出决定并体验新力量时，便是如此时刻。如今社会层面正临近这样的时机。这可能反映在看似动荡的时期——然而新创造力正在其中酝酿。届时你们的组织形态将经历巨大行星变革，但这些变革会反映私密内在启迪的物理显化。（更强烈地：）你们对内在自体信任不足，或未能觉察正在发酵的创造性酝酿。若能如此，本可省却诸多麻烦。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The psychedelic experience, or any mystical experience, is sometimes apt to put you in touch with what may seem to you to be a future self. This self of course, again, always existed. The inner self has the ability to delve beneath all your camouflage data to perceive these other reality systems. For the fullest development however these perceptions must be made conscious. Even the ego must become aware of them.
quotes.translation: 迷幻体验或任何神秘体验，有时易使你接触看似未来自体的存在。当然，这个自体始终存在。内在自体有能力穿透所有伪装数据（camouflage data），感知这些其他实相系统。但为求最充分发展，这些感知必须被意识化，甚至自我（ego）也必须觉察它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You are intuitively aware that you form your image, and that you are independent of it. You do not realize that you create your larger environment and the physical world as you know it by propelling your thoughts and emotions into matter -- a breakthrough into three-dimensional life. The inner self, therefore, individually and en masse, sends its psychic energy out, forming tentacles that coalesce into form.
quotes.translation: 你直觉知晓自己塑造了形象，且独立于形象之外。却未意识到：你通过将思想与情感推进物质——突破进入三维生命——创造了更广阔的周遭环境及你所知的物质世界。因此，内在自体无论个体或集体，皆向外发送其心灵能量，形成触须并凝聚为形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When large doses of chemicals are used, the conscious mind is confronted full blast with very potent experiences that it was not meant to handle, and by which it is purposely made to feel powerless. (Pause.) Faced with the exterior nightmares of wars and natural disasters, the conscious mind is still directed outward into that world with which it knows it was formed to cope. In periods of great physical stress it draws upon the powers of the body and inner self to perform remarkable feats of heroism -- that leave it wondering afterward at the power and energy of the self in crisis.
quotes.translation: 当大量使用化学物质时，意识心会全盘面对它本不该处理的强烈体验，并刻意被这些体验弄得无力招架。（停顿）面对战争与自然灾害的外在噩梦，意识心仍被导向它知道自己生来就该应对的外在世界。在巨大的身体压力时期，它会汲取身体与内在自我的力量，完成非凡的英雄壮举——事后连它自己都对危机中自我的力量与能量感到惊奇。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now all the richly creative, original work that is done by this inner self is not unconscious. It is purposeful, highly (underlined) discriminating, performed by the inner conscious ego, of which the exterior ego is but a shadow, and not you see the other way around.
quotes.translation: 内在自我所完成的所有丰富创意与原创性工作并非无意识。它们是有目的、高度（强调）辨别的，由内在意识自我执行，而外在自我不过是其影子，而非你所以为的相反情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is form. The very mechanism of the body however is so constructed that it can bear the brunt of many errors, and free itself from them, though this may not seem to be the case at times. Nevertheless yours is a slow motion world in many ways as far as your perceptions are concerned, while you are within it. Your body is much like a sculptor or a sculpt, never really completed, the inner self trying out various techniques of creativity on its first test piece. The results are not always of the best, but the sculptor is independent of his product and knows there will others.
quotes.translation: 存在形态。然而身体机制本身的结构，使其能承受许多错误的冲击并从中解脱，尽管有时看似并非如此。但就你的感知而言，当你身处其中时，你的世界在许多方面都是慢动作的。你的身体很像雕塑家或雕塑品，从未真正完成，内在自我在其第一件试验品上尝试各种创意技巧。结果未必总是最佳，但雕塑家独立于其作品，并知道还会有其他作品。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Your effective power of action follows the lines of your beliefs. To believe in your own weakness is to deny yourself the power of action. To accept uncritically all beliefs that come to you is to open yourself to a barrage of conflicting data at best, in which the clear lines of action and power become blurred. Contradictory demands and assessments are then sent in to the inner self, which by various methods will try to tell you that something is wrong. Beliefs of like nature attract each other, for you are bound to look for consistencies in your behavior and experience.
quotes.translation: 你有效的行动力量遵循你的信念轨迹。相信自己的软弱，就是否定自己的行动力量。不加批判地接受所有来到你面前的信念，充其量只会让你暴露在相互矛盾的数据轰炸中，使清晰的行动与力量界限变得模糊。于是矛盾的要求与评估被送入内在自我，它会通过各种方式试图告诉你出了差错。性质相似的信念会相互吸引，因为你必然会在自己的行为与经验中寻求一致性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The man as he knows himself felt hardly anything. His inner self knew, as the inner self is always aware of such endings.
quotes.translation: 那个他所认知的自己几乎毫无感觉。他的内在自我知道——正如内在自我始终知晓这类结局。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The survival personality therefore momentarily inserts his ego in its old position. It can then interpret this data in terms that can be received and understood. This reassembly however does cause some disorientation on the part of the survival personality. The ego, back in its dominant position, finds the circumstances difficult to deal with. It is being asked to manipulate in a manner unfamiliar to it. The survival personality's inner self gives this reassembled ego concepts in the same way that, often, the subconscious gives the ego concepts in physical existence.
quotes.translation: 因此，存续人格会暂时将其自我插入原先的位置。然后它就能以可被接收和理解的方式解读这些数据。然而这种重组确实会导致存续人格产生某种迷失感。回到主导位置的自我发现处境难以应对，它被要求以不熟悉的方式运作。存续人格的内在自我给予这个重组后的自我概念，方式往往如同在物质存在中潜意识给予自我概念一般。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: As I mentioned, the sixth inner sense involves something that can be likened to what you call the instincts, except that it is a property of the inner self. Consider a spider spinning a web. The web is a camouflage pattern that definitely exists on your plane. Here your simple spider is using his sixth sense, for these senses are the latent property of other living things, and not restricted to mankind.
quotes.translation: 如我所提，第六内在感官涉及某种可类比于你们所谓本能的东西，只是它是内在自体的属性。试想蜘蛛织网。网是确实存在于你们层面的伪装模式。此处你们简单的蜘蛛正在运用它的第六感，因为这些感官是其他生物的内在属性，并不限于人类。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There is nothing to be feared for Mark. His lung will remain in excellent condition for the summer. Nevertheless, I still maintain that it becomes imperative for him to live alone, or the condition will continue. He will cause the return of symptoms, if he does not seriously take steps to assure his inner self of his intention. This is by no means meant to alarm, but to help him evade such a difficulty.
quotes.translation: 马克无需恐惧。他的肺部在整个夏季都将保持良好状态。但我仍坚持认为，他必须独居，否则状况将持续。若他不认真采取行动向内在自体表明决心，他将导致症状复发。这绝非危言耸听，而是为助他避开此困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （Sam Levine knows about Seth but has never attended a session. He has been invited to. He has expressed neither belief nor disbelief, he has also listened to part of the tape recording we made of Jane when delivering the 25th session. See page 183. Someday Jane and I intend to put the pressure on Sam and make him attend a session, no matter how busy he is. [ Session 25 is in Vol. 1.]）

quotes.text: This conception is to blame for the superstitious attitudes, however, concerning the inner world as a whole, and some of mans misconceptions have been ludicrous and pathetic. I think now mainly of his giving the immaterial inner self a dwelling place formed of physical camouflage patterns. In other words, a physical heaven and hell.
quotes.translation: 这种观念导致了关于内在世界整体的迷信态度，而人类某些误解既荒谬又可悲。此刻我主要想到的是，他们将非物质的內在自体安置在由物质伪装模式构成的居所中——换言之，即物质的天堂与地狱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is the dilemma of the ego, particularly in its early states. It looks outward for answers because this is its nature: to manipulate within physical reality. It also senses, however, a deep and abiding connection that it does not understand, with other portions of the self that are not under its domain. It is also aware that this inner self possesses knowledge upon which its own existence is based.
quotes.translation: 这是自我（ego）的困境，尤其在其早期阶段。它向外寻求答案，因为其本性就是在物质实相中运作。然而它同时感知到一种深刻而持久的联结——与自身其他不受其管辖的部分之间，这种联结它无法理解。它也意识到，这内在自体拥有其自身存在所依托的知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is no particular and definite line between the ego and the personality and the inner self. They must merely be discussed in such terms. There is, believe it or not, no particular and specific and definite boundary between what is self and not self. If we isolate such portions of reality for the sake of discussion, such isolation is artificial, and in no way affects the nature of reality itself.
quotes.translation: 自我、人格与内在自体之间并无明确界限。我们只是不得不以这些术语来讨论。信不信由你，自我与非我之间并无特定、具体且明确的边界。若为讨论之便而将实相的这些部分孤立开来，这种孤立是人为的，绝不影响实相本身的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner self is obviously not only conscious, but conscious of itself, both as an individuality apart from others, and as an individuality that is a part of all other consciousness.In your terms it is continually aware, both of this apartness and unity-with.
quotes.translation: 内在自体显然不仅具有意识，而且能自觉其自身——既作为独立于他者的个体性，又作为一切其他意识的一部分。以你们的说法，它持续觉察着这种分离性与合一性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego however is not an afterthought disconnected from the whole self, and when the intellect becomes aware of data given to it by the intuitions or the inner self, it is then capable of informing the ego, which then changes its attitude accordingly. This way we are assured of the cooperation of the whole self, and avoid any possibility of splitting one self, one part of the self, against another.
quotes.translation: 然而，自我并非与整体自身割裂的后续产物，当理智觉察到直觉或内在自身所给予的数据时，它便能告知自我，自我随之相应改变态度。如此，我们确保了整体自身的合作，并避免了将自身的一部分与另一部分对立分裂的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As this point is reached the ego obviously becomes more disturbed. In very few cases however does the conflict reach this sort of proportion. A lack of communication between the ego and the inner self is obviously one of the main causes for such difficulties.
quotes.translation: 当达到这一点时，自我显然变得更加不安。然而，在极少数情况下，冲突才会达到这种程度。自我与内在自身之间缺乏沟通，显然是造成此类困难的主要原因之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, the inner self is psychologically influenced by these probable personalities, for they are all psychologically connected and represent a whole personality structure, a whole personality gestalt with which you as you know yourself are utterly unfamiliar.
quotes.translation: 现在，内在自身在心理上受到这些可能人格的影响，因为它们在心理上相互关联，代表着一个完整的人格结构、一个完整的人格完形，而你们所认识的自己对此完全陌生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: And what meaning you give it is there, and part of it, since you who project the meaning are yourselves part of it. The inner self is, therefore, that inner portion of action which forms the egos, and the selves, through the dilemmas of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 你们赋予它的任何意义都在其中，并成为它的一部分，因为投射意义的你们自己也是它的一部分。因此，内在自身是形成自我和诸自身的内在行动部分，通过我所谈到的那些困境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Obviously the cause behind illness is not always the same. In a re-incarnational sense, the personality for a while takes the role of a sick person, as an actor would, and is completely immersed in it. Obviously again, more dimensions are involved here than in an actor's role. The actor would merely try to imagine how it would be like to be in such a position. The person in the re-incarnational role is as immersed in it as possible. He decides to take the role for various reasons of his own, and the inner self knows that the role was chosen.
quotes.translation: 显然，疾病背后的原因并非总是一成不变。从转世的角度看，人格会暂时扮演病人的角色，如同演员一般，并完全沉浸其中。同样明显的是，这比演员的角色涉及更多维度。演员只是试图想象处于那种境地会是什么样子。而处于转世角色中的人则尽可能沉浸其中。他出于自己的各种原因决定扮演这个角色，而内在自身知道这个角色是被选择的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Action cannot be dammed up, for it becomes explosive. There are many balances to be maintained. The dream world of which we have spoken so often is also action, and as such it affects all other action. It is not apart from your so- called physical universe, for the dream universe, through its connection with the inner self, also helps to construct physical matter--and this is no trifling matter.
quotes.translation: 行动不能被堵塞，否则它会变得具有爆炸性。有许多平衡需要维持。我们常谈的梦境世界也是行动，因此它影响所有其他行动。它并非与你们所谓的物质宇宙分离，因为梦境宇宙通过其与内在自身的连接，也帮助构建物质——这绝非小事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Do not forget however that you are a portion of the inner self. It is not using you. You are the portion of it that experiences physical reality. Now physical illnesses that are not critical but observable, that do not involve the loss of say of a limb or of an organ, generally (underlined) represent problems that are in the process of being solved, problems that are in quotes "out in the open."
quotes.translation: 然而别忘了，你是内在自体的一部分。它并非在利用你。你是它体验物质实相的那部分。现在，那些不致命但可观察的身体疾病——比如不涉及失去肢体或器官的情况——通常（强调）代表着正在被解决的问题，也就是所谓"公开化"的问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When the outer ego, from the surface of its consciousness, reflects the outer world, it sees reflections of the inner ego which are the images within its own eye; and as the self creates matter subconsciously within its own eye, and as the self creates matter subconsciously and not consciously, and as the self creates matter in line with inner and not outer expectations, so then does the ego, in viewing the material universe, come face to face with the face of its own inner ego; and the outer ego cannot escape from this inner self.
quotes.translation: 当外在自我从意识表层映照外在世界时，它看见的是内在自我的倒影——这些影像存在于它自身的眼眸中；正如自体在无意识层面（而非有意识层面）于自身眼眸中创造物质，也正如自体依照内在而非外在的期待创造物质，那么当自我审视物质宇宙时，便与自身内在自我的面容直面相对；外在自我无法逃离这个内在自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This would seem to deny the idea of progression, since I tell you that all portions or all guises, or all aspects and all levels, of any given personality exist at once. The immediately conscious selves however do progress in their realization. It is not enough that the inner self knows. The various immediately conscious portions of personality evolve and change as they recognize these truths.
quotes.translation: 这似乎否定了进步的概念，因为我告诉过你，任何特定人格的所有部分、所有伪装、所有面向与所有层次都同时存在。然而，直接意识到的自我确实在认知中进步。仅凭内在自体知晓是不够的。人格中各种直接意识到的部分在认知这些真理时会进化与改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The personality also contains good intellectual capacities, and he should examine psychic experience in the light of his intelligence also. There are truths which the intellect cannot perceive, but the intellect knows the ego, and represents a firm and reliable pathway between the inner self and the ego; and psychic experience--I repeat, psychic experience--will not suffer from such scrutiny.
quotes.translation: 这个人格也具备良好的智力能力，他应当运用自己的智慧来检视通灵经验。有些真理是智力无法感知的，但智力了解自我，并代表着内在自体与自我之间一条坚实可靠的通道；而通灵经验——我重复一遍，通灵经验——不会因这种审视而受损。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now in the same way that consciousness originated the physical dimension, you as portions of consciousness continue to maintain and create it anew. Your source of energy is that first creation, in which consciousness focused, where before it had not. You also then know and develop yourselves through your own creations, and you automatically create and maintain your physical environment in the same manner that you breathe. Your physical image and your physical environment are both materialized extensions of your inner selves.
quotes.translation: 正如意识创造了物质维度，你们作为意识的一部分，持续维持并重新创造着它。你们的能量来源正是那最初的创造——意识在其中聚焦，而在此之前它并未聚焦。你们也通过自己的创造来认识和发展自己，并且像呼吸一样自动创造并维持着物质环境。你们的物质形象与物质环境，都是内在自体的物质化延伸。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. You must realize that within this room, and within any room, at any time there are other personalities that you do not perceive. There are ways of perceiving them if they choose to be perceived. Possibly, with some help from certain directions, we shall see what we can do in other classes. And our friend Ruburt is quite correct, you (WL) learn the nature of the inner self first.... and then we shall help you in the development of your own abilities. And before too long, we will have a message for you to take to heart.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们必须明白，在这个房间里，在任何房间里，任何时刻都存在着你们感知不到的其他人格。如果他们选择被感知，就有感知他们的方法。或许在某些方向的协助下，我们会在其他课堂上看看能做什么。我们的朋友鲁柏说得完全正确，你（WL）首先要学习内在自体的本质……然后我们会帮助你发展自身的能力。用不了多久，我们就会给你一个值得铭记的信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: One form may indeed serve, and then consciousness may project out of it into a new form that is familiar with other dimensions. In Ruburt's experience three different forms were used. He spoke, incidentally to his Father Trainor, and Lizzie Roohan together, while he was in the second form . He was then led by me into a further dimension of reality in which his third form was used. You must remember that all of these portions of the self exist at once, and that the whole inner self knows them as a part of its own identity.
quotes.translation: 一种形态确实可能暂时适用，随后意识可能从中投射进入另一种熟悉其他维度的新形态。在鲁柏的经历中，他使用了三种不同的形态。有趣的是，当他处于第二种形态时，曾同时与特雷纳神父和莉兹·鲁汉交谈。随后我引导他进入一个更深的实相维度，在那里他使用了第三种形态。你必须记住，自我的所有这些部分都同时存在，而整个内在自我将它们视为自身身份的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The blacks were to be oppressed then on the one hand, and yet treated indulgently as children on the other. There was always a great fear that the blacks as a race would escape their bounds -- given an inch they would take a yard -- simply because the whites so greatly feared the nature of the inner self, and recognized the power that they tried so desperately to strangle within themselves.
quotes.translation: 当时黑人一方面要遭受压迫，另一方面又被像孩子般纵容对待。白人始终极度恐惧黑人种族会越界——得寸进尺——仅仅因为白人如此惧怕内在自我的本质，并认出他们拼命想要扼杀在自己体内的那股力量。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: What you are pleased to call the subconscious represents merely the part of the inner senses, or of the inner self, that even your society can no longer ignore. And this is indeed only the surface. Here you find of course the repository for personal memories, and not of personal ego-bound conscious memories either, but also of psychological experiences that the ego itself prefers to forget.
quotes.translation: 你们所谓的潜意识，仅仅代表内在感官或内在自我的那一部分，即便是你们的社会也无法再忽视它。而这确实只是表面。在这里你当然会发现个人记忆的储存库，而且不仅是受限于自我意识的记忆，还包括自我本身宁愿遗忘的心理经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I would suggest however that the first recalled dream for any given evening be compared with the first recalled dream from other evenings, that the second recalled dream from any one evening be compared with the second dream from other evenings, and so forth. This should prove highly interesting, and if such experiments are carried on consistently over a period of years, then the results could lead to excellent evidence for the various layers of the subconscious and the inner self, of which I have spoken for so long.
quotes.translation: 不过我建议，将某个夜晚首次回忆起的梦境与其他夜晚首次回忆起的梦境进行比较，将同一夜晚第二次回忆起的梦境与其他夜晚第二次回忆起的梦境进行比较，以此类推。这应该会非常有趣，如果这类实验能持续进行数年，那么结果将能为我一直以来所谈论的潜意识与内在自我的各个层面提供极佳的证据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: These are my instructions. You may consider this your first lesson. We will go by easy stages, for we do not want you betwixt and between. You may induce a medium trance in whatever way you choose. On occasion this will be spontaneous, as you know. For best results in the beginning it is good to make a projection attempt when you already feel physically drowsy, but pleasantly so. When you have induced the trance state, then begin to examine your own subjective feelings until you find recognition of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这些是我的指示。你可以将此视为你的第一课。我们将循序渐进，因为我们不想让你处于模棱两可的状态。你可以选择任何方式诱导出中等出神状态。如你所知，有时这会自然发生。为了在初期获得最佳效果，最好在你已感到身体困倦但愉悦时进行投射尝试。当你诱导出出神状态后，便开始检视自己的主观感受，直到你认出内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Although this type of existence seems cold to you, it is a clear and crystal-like existence in which things are known that are beyond your comprehension... in which no time is needed in your terms for experience... in which the inner self condenses all human knowledge that has been received by you through your various existences and reincarnations... has been coded and exists indelibly.
quotes.translation: 虽然这种存在方式对你而言显得冰冷，但它是一种清澈如水晶的存在，其中知晓着超越你理解的事物……以你们的标准而言，经验无需时间……内在自我将你通过不同存在与转世所接收的所有人类知识浓缩……这些知识已被编码且永存不灭。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: So-called extrasensory perception gives you but a crude and distorted idea of the basic ways in which the inner self receives information, but the concepts built around extrasensory perception are at least nearer the truth, and as such represent an improvement over the idea that all perception is basically physical.
quotes.translation: 所谓的超感官知觉只是让你粗略且扭曲地了解内在自我接收信息的基本方式，但围绕超感官知觉建立的概念至少更接近真相，因此相较于所有感知本质上都是物质性的观点，这算是一种进步。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You will learn them here. You will learn them through reading, and through listening to your inner self. The methods have been known for centuries; not only centuries as you think of them, but for the lifetime of this earth as you know it, and even before -- when the poles were reversed and when there were other stars in the sky and when the planets were not the planets that you know.
quotes.translation: 你将在此时此地学会这些方法。你将通过阅读和倾听内在自我来学习。这些方法已被知晓数世纪之久——不仅限于你所认知的世纪，更贯穿你所知的地球生命历程，甚至更早：当两极颠倒、天空悬挂着不同的星辰、行星也非你所认知的那些行星之时。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (11:14.) I told you that the self was not limited, yet surely you think that your self stops where your skin meets space, that you are inside your skin. Period. Yet your environment is an extension of your self. It is the body of your experience, coalesced in physical form. The inner self forms the objects that you know as surely and automatically as it forms your finger or your eye.
quotes.translation: （11:14）我曾告诉你自我不受限制，但你必然认为自我止于皮肤与空间的交界处，你被困在皮肤之内。句号。然而你的环境正是自我的延伸。它是你经验凝聚成物质形态的躯体。内在自我创造你所认知的物体，其确定性与自动性正如它创造你的手指或眼睛。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: For the inner self can perceive it, and does change it. The idea of inverted time states that time flows in all directions, and that as each action affects every other action, so time constantly affects itself and continually reacts within itself. The past moment is never completed. Consciously you have simply lost sight of it, and have not followed it through in its endless depths.
quotes.translation: 因为内在自我能够感知它，也确实在改变它。倒转时间的概念表明时间向所有方向流动，每个行动影响其他所有行动，时间也不断自我影响并在自身内部持续反应。过去的瞬间从未完成。你只是有意识地遗失了它的踪迹，未能跟随它进入无尽的深渊。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: （Mark is Bill Macdonnel's entity name. See Session 68 in Volume 2.）

quotes.text: Using this third form, there would be a tendency for you not to recognize your own physical situation. It would be difficult to carry the memories of the present ego personality with you. This third form is the vehicle of the inner self. The disorientation that it feels is the disorientation, you see, that it will feel when the physical body is deserted, or at the point of death.
quotes.translation: 若使用这第三种形态，你很可能无法辨认自身的物质处境。携带当前自我人格的记忆将变得困难。这第三种形态是内在自我的载具。它所感受到的迷失方向，正是肉体被遗弃时或死亡临界点会体验到的迷失感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The ego is the only part of the self that regards physical objects as anything but symbols. It is highly difficult for other parts of the self to experience the ego for this reason. The ego, while always changing, is one of the most rigid aspects of identity. To the inner self neither house nor walls exist. They are perceived only as vague self limiting ideas on the ego's part.
quotes.translation: 自我是自我中唯一将物质对象视为非象征符号的部分。正因如此，自我的其他部分极难体验自我。自我虽不断变化，却是身份认同中最僵化的面向之一。对内在自我而言，房屋与墙壁皆不存在。它们仅被感知为自我部分模糊的自我限制观念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The personality so touched by it actually does then become, in certain terms, what he seems to be. He will emerge as an eternal hero in the external religious drama, as the inner self is the eternal hero of the interior religious drama.
quotes.translation: 被如此触及的人格，在某种程度上确实会变成他表面所是的样子。他将作为外部宗教戏剧中的永恒英雄出现，正如内在自己是内部宗教戏剧中的永恒英雄。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now the inner ego is the organizer of experience that Jung would call unconscious. The inner ego is another term for what we call the inner self. As the outer ego manipulates within the environment and physical reality, so the inner ego or self organizes and manipulates within an inner reality. The inner ego creates that physical reality with which the outer ego then deals.
quotes.translation: 内在自我是荣格称为无意识的经验组织者。内在自我是我们所称的内在自己的另一个术语。正如外在自我在环境和物质实相中运作，内在自我或内在自己也在内在实相中组织和运作。内在自我创造了外在自我随后处理的那个物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego is not aware of the manner in which dreams are created. Neither is it aware of the manner in which the inner self creates physical matter. Neither, therefore, is it aware of those distortions that cause it to construct faults within physical matter, for in all cases the physical matter of the human body will be subconsciously created in line with inner conditions.
quotes.translation: 自我并不了解梦境被创造的方式。它也不了解内在自己创造物质的方式。因此，它也不了解那些导致它在物质中构建缺陷的扭曲，因为在所有情况下，人体的物质都将根据内在条件被潜意识地创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality itself, as you know, is a gestalt of action, and as such it is necessary that the flow of action within it follow the overall directives of the entity and the inner self. When for example the ego is allowed to apply too tightly and too rigorously its inhibitory functions, then this freedom of action within the personality is seriously divided and impeded.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，人格本身是行动的整体，因此其内部的行动流必须遵循存有和内在自己的整体指令。例如，当自我被允许过于严格和严厉地应用其抑制功能时，人格内部的这种行动自由就会被严重分裂和阻碍。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: It is actually a field, that is energy field, boundary. It protects the inner self by acting as a barrier that keeps the whole self's energy controlled, and keeps it from seeping away. At the same time it protects the whole self from certain radiations which do not here concern you. No living consciousness exists on any plane without this tissue capsule enclosing it.
quotes.translation: 它实际上是一个场，即能量场边界。它通过充当屏障来保护内在自己，使整个自己的能量受到控制，并防止其泄漏。同时，它保护整个自己免受某些与你们无关的辐射。没有活着的意识存在于任何层面而不被这个组织囊所包裹。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Instead, as mentioned (in this session), it is also meant to receive and interpret important data that comes to it from the inner self. Left alone, it does this very well. It receives and interprets impressions. What has happened, however, is that man has taught it to accept [only] data coming from the outside world, and to set up barriers against inner knowledge.
quotes.translation: 相反，如（在本节中）所述，它也旨在接收和解释来自内在自己的重要数据。如果任其自然，它做得非常好。它接收并解释印象。然而，发生的情况是，人类教导它只接受来自外部世界的数据，并设置障碍来对抗内在知识。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: One more point. The ulcer for example has reality upon many levels, and must be dealt with in a like manner, for it is not enough to handle it even from the viewpoint of the present ego; for indeed causes are involved of which the present ego must necessarily be mainly ignorant. The inner self however has at its command all these reasoning's, and all these causes.
quotes.translation: 还有一点。例如溃疡在多个层面都具有真实性，必须以同样方式处理，因为仅从当前自我的角度来处理是不够的；因为确实涉及当前自我必然主要无知的原因。然而内在自我掌握着所有这些推理和原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As it grows, in your terms, it looks outward for confirmation of this inner knowledge. The inner self upholds the ego with its support. It forms its truths into physically oriented data with which the ego can deal. It then projects these outward into the area of physical reality. Seeing these truths thus materialized, the ego then finds it easier to accept them.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，随着它成长，它向外寻求对这种内在知识的确认。内在自我以其支持来支撑自我。它将自身的真理转化为自我能够处理的、以物质为导向的数据。然后它将这些投射到物质实相的区域中。看到这些真理如此物质化后，自我便更容易接受它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I can then, therefore, enter the limits of your psychic comprehension. This is a very simplified version, but I must, so to speak, therefore journey through the various areas of Ruburt's whole self, or inner self, until I reach a point where entry into your consciousness is possible. This happens to be the third undifferentiated layer of Ruburt's subconscious.
quotes.translation: 因此，我可以进入你们心灵理解的界限。这是一个非常简化的版本，但可以说，我必须穿越鲁柏整个自我或内在自我的各个区域，直到抵达一个能够进入你们意识的点。这恰好是鲁柏潜意识的第三未分化层。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Surely investigation should be done to probe into this matter. In such a case negative ions form an electrical framework in which healing is possible. Such healing dreams come most often when the inner self deeply feels a sense of desperation, and automatically opens up channels from deeper layers of the self, that have been closed for all effective purposes.
quotes.translation: 当然应该对此事进行调查。在这种情况下，负离子形成一种电性框架，在其中疗愈成为可能。这种疗愈梦境最常发生在内在自我深感绝望之时，它会自动开启自我深层中那些实际上已被关闭的通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner self is always there. You are always aware of it in the same manner that you are aware of what is happening in a trance. This is another excellent analogy, if you'll forgive me for patting myself on the back.
quotes.translation: 内在自我始终存在。你一直能意识到它，就像你意识到出神状态中发生的事一样。这是另一个绝妙的类比，请原谅我自夸。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The molecular structure indeed is fairly rigid. The inner self is not so bound to such a formal alignment, and is thus free to travel in ways which the body, because of its formal molecular structure, finds impossible.
quotes.translation: 分子结构确实相当固定。内在自我并不受制于如此形式化的排列，因此能够自由地以身体因其形式化的分子结构而无法做到的方式旅行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We are not attempting to enlighten the intuitions at the expense of the intellect. We are attempting to work in such a manner that added knowledge from the intuitional inner self is also made known to the intellect.
quotes.translation: 我们并非试图以牺牲理智为代价来启发直觉。我们试图以这样一种方式运作，使来自直觉性内在自我的额外知识也能被理智所知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The self, in this manner, looks about. The direction in which the self looks is not the self. In dreams the self looks elsewhere, and the "I" is a conscious "I", and the working ability is tremendous. The inner self perceives realities that it observes in many directions, being free from the intense focus within limited directions of camouflage existence.
quotes.translation: 自我以这种方式环顾四周。自我所注视的方向并非自我本身。在梦境中，自我转向别处，而"我"是一个有意识的"我"，运作能力极为强大。内在自我感知到它在许多方向观察到的实相，摆脱了在伪装存在的有限方向内的强烈聚焦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The dream images are indeed extensions, not only of the psychic or inner self, but a definite extension of the electromagnetic and chemical properties that operate through the physical self. It is indeed as if extensions of nerve endings reached out in self-expansion, making new connections, and this is indeed what occurs in the creation of dream images.
quotes.translation: 梦境意象确实是延伸，不仅是心灵或内在自我的延伸，更是通过物质自我运作的电磁与化学属性的明确延伸。这确实如同神经末梢的延伸在自我扩展中向外伸展，建立新的连接，而这正是梦境意象创造过程中实际发生的事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I have often said that all these divisions and separations are arbitrary. All exist one within another. Apparent boundaries are not boundaries, but only differences in the focus of attention. Even this inner ego is not the same from one given moment to another, for it is not a static thing, but is a part of continuing action. It is much more familiar with the subconscious and with the dream universe, and with the inner self, than it is with the outside ego, however.
quotes.translation: 我常言所有这些划分与分离都是武断的。一切皆彼此相融。明显的边界并非边界，只是注意力焦点的差异。即便是这个内在自我，从一刻到下一刻也不尽相同，因为它并非静态之物，而是持续行动的一部分。然而，它比外在自我更熟悉潜意识、梦境宇宙以及内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Messages from the inner self if strong enough will pass through the conscious barriers, and the conscious ego is only too happy to receive them. But such intuitions have usually first appeared in dream form, appearing to the ego later; and many such messages appear in dreams ahead of time, to be released to the conscious mind when situations demand it.
quotes.translation: 来自内在自我的讯息若足够强烈，便会穿透意识屏障，而意识自我也极乐于接收它们。但这些直觉通常先以梦境形式出现，随后才呈现给自我；许多此类讯息会提前在梦中显现，待情境需要时再释放给意识心智。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The other portions can be called the inner self. Now all of this inner self cannot become expressed even with its connection with the brain, since the brain must sift perception through the physical apparatus.
quotes.translation: 其余部分可称为内在自我。然而，这整个内在自我即便与大脑相连也无法完全表达，因为大脑必须通过物质装置筛选感知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is one of the reasons why breathing seems automatic, and why dreaming seems to confound your physical camouflage idea of time. It is perfectly within your present capabilities to understand that time, to your dreaming self, is very much like time to your waking inner self. But you must first disconnect the physical concept of time and watches.
quotes.translation: 这就是为什么呼吸看似自动发生，而梦境似乎混淆了你对时间这一物质伪装概念的原因。你完全有能力理解，对做梦的自我而言，时间非常类似于对你清醒的内在自我而言的时间。但你必须先断开时间与手表这类物质概念的联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: ... Your inner selves will digest what I have said and what I will say... (and this is more important than) 10 pages of notes and dates that you cannot check, since the lives were so long ago. There were however some records... not papers... that exist along the way, and sometime if it will ease your mind we will endeavor to give them to you.
quotes.translation: ……你们的内在自我会消化我所说及将说的一切……（这比）10页你们无法核对的笔记和日期更重要，因为那些生命发生在如此久远的年代。不过沿途确实存在一些记录……不是纸张……有时若能让你们安心，我们会尽力提供给你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The training is necessary. The results at any given stage may not appear very hopeful, and in your terms there is indeed what seems to be a cumulative effect. There is a system of checks and balances that do operate. These exist within the inner selves. The system of checks and balances will operate up to a point, and maintain some stability.
quotes.translation: 训练是必要的。任何特定阶段的结果可能看起来不太乐观，用你们的话说，确实存在一种累积效应。一套制衡系统确实在运作。这些存在于内在自我之内。制衡系统会运作到某个程度，并维持某种稳定性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Psychological time so-called belongs to the inner self, that is to the mind. It is however a connective, a portion of one of the inner senses, which we will call for convenience the second inner sense.
quotes.translation: 所谓心理时间属于内在自我，即属于心智。然而它是一种连接物，是内在感官的一部分，为方便起见我们称之为第二内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Study and practice with psychological time will show you the validity and strength of that inner self, so that you will clearly see that it is not completely bound to the so-called objective universe by any means. Matter is not an imprisoning form. It is a means by which consciousness expresses itself within the limits of the physical field.
quotes.translation: 对心理时间的研究与练习会向你展示内在自我的真实性与力量，使你清楚看到它绝非完全受制于所谓的客观宇宙。物质并非禁锢的形式。它是意识在物质场域限制内表达自身的一种手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I mentioned the chemical relationship between your universe and the dream universe. There are like relationships of one kind or another that tie together all fields and systems, from the largest to the most minute. The freedom of the inner self, then, is never determined by time as you know it. It is determined by time as you do not know it.
quotes.translation: 我提到过你们宇宙与梦境宇宙之间的化学关系。类似的各种关系将一切场域与系统——从最宏大至最微小——联结在一起。因此，内在自我的自由从不为你所知的时间所决定。它为你所不知的时间所决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Some of the basic shapes in your physical universe are, therefore, reflections of these inner psychological structures, more or less reproduced in matter. These are in one sense certainly tangible to the inner self. It is these inner psychological structure patterns to a large degree that determine the shape and form of physical structures.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们物质宇宙中的某些基本形状，正是这些内在心理结构的反映，或多或少地在物质中再现。从某种意义上说，这些结构对内在自体而言确实是可感知的。正是这些内在心理结构模式在很大程度上决定了物质结构的形态与形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Another man in an airplane above sees the whole landscape, and through radio communicates to those below about those conditions which they cannot perceive. The man in the airplane, then, can be compared to the inner self, sending messages to other areas of the subconscious, whose energies and focus are necessarily used in limited fashion.
quotes.translation: 另一人在飞机上俯瞰整个景观，并通过无线电向下方那些无法感知这些状况的人传递信息。那么，飞机上的人可以比作内在自体，向潜意识的其他区域发送讯息，而这些区域的能量与焦点必然以有限的方式运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is indeed the "I" of your dreams, having somewhat the same sort of position within the inner self as the ego itself has to the physical self. Actions however merge within the inner ego. The scope of awareness is more complex. We will at a later time discuss this inner ego in connection with the dream situation and health.
quotes.translation: 内在自我确实是你们梦境中的"我"，它在内在自体中所处的位置，与自我在物质自体中所处的位置大致相同。然而，行动在内在自我中融合。意识的范畴更为复杂。我们稍后将讨论这个内在自我与梦境情境及健康的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is obviously somewhat simplified, in that the ego constantly changes, and the above examples must be read carefully or their meaning could be misinterpreted. Actions may appear to be separate, but they are all part of other actions, this being of course the basis for all organization, including that of the ego and the inner self.
quotes.translation: 这显然有些简化，因为自我不断变化，上述例子必须仔细解读，否则其含义可能被误解。行动看似分离，但它们都是其他行动的一部分，这当然是所有组织的基础，包括自我与内在自体的组织。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Falling dreams also belong to the root dream category. They also represent direct experience, as the inner self once more reenters the physical body. No up or down really exists, you see, but the root assumptions take these directions for granted, and the fear of falling is a learned response. It is learned early, but it is learned.
quotes.translation: 坠落梦也属于根源梦的范畴。它们同样代表直接体验，因为内在自体再次重新进入物质身体。实际上并不存在上下之分，但根源假设将这些方向视为理所当然，而对坠落的恐惧是一种习得的反应。这种反应习得得很早，但确实是习得的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is not that the inner self is not aware of all of this, but that it has already chosen a framework, or a given frame of existence, that emphasizes certain kinds of experience over others.
quotes.translation: 并非内在自体不了解这一切，而是它已经选择了一个框架，或一个既定的存在框架，强调某些类型的体验而非其他。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (First, after holding session 805 we took a six-week break from sessions of any kind. We didn't plan to do this; it just developed, and we eventually realized that it did so through Jane's simple need for a change in routine. We had plenty of other things to do: I was still occupied daily with writing notes and appendixes for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality; on June 4 Jane received the page proofs for Cézanne, and began correcting them for the printer; on the 14th of the month "our" contractor began converting half of our garage into a writing room for Jane, and adding a large back porch [see the end of Note 2 for Session 801]. All of that building activity was much noisier and more disruptive than the work had been for the front porch, and forced some changes in our schedules, including more night work, as we manipulated around those distractions.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: These probable realities exist within what may be generally termed your own sphere of activity, your own plane. There are many other realities that are far divorced from your own however. Every thought, as I have told you, is an action and must seek to fulfill itself. It is a fragment, therefore. You are literally surrounded by other realities that you do not perceive consciously. Some of these are perceived by the inner self, but all are not.
quotes.translation: 这些可能性实相存在于你们通常所称的活动领域或层面之内。然而，还有许多其他实相与你们的实相大相径庭。正如我告诉过你们的，每一个念头都是一种行动，并且必须寻求实现自身。因此，它是一个片段。你们确实被其他你们并未有意识地感知到的实相所包围。其中一些被内在自体所感知，但并非全部。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Under the circumstances, to look within would have seemed foolhardy, for they had been taught that this within contained the source of their problems to begin with. Those who could not afford therapy tried the harder to inhibit any messages from the inner self, for fear they would become swallowed by the savage infantile emotions.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，向内看似乎显得鲁莽，因为他们被教导说，这个内在本身就包含了他们问题的根源。那些无法负担治疗费用的人更加努力地抑制来自内在自体的任何讯息，生怕被野蛮的婴儿期情绪所吞噬。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The one stability between self and what is not-self, and the one and only difference, is not an identity that is part and parcel of constantly changing physical framework, not the outer ego whose conception of who it is constantly changes, according to its age and environment, but the inner self behind all physical constructions.
quotes.translation: 自体与非自体之间的唯一稳定性，以及唯一且仅有的差异，并非不断变化的物质框架中固有的身份，也不是根据年龄和环境不断改变自我认知的外在自我，而是所有物质构造背后的内在自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: They were adapted to meet a specific situation in which the inner self found it must operate, and it therefore took unto itself the adoption of these specific constructions. Therefore since dreams are manifestations of inner reality, they cannot be interpreted or investigated with any success through the use of the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 它们被调整以适应内在自体发现必须运作的特定情境，因此它自行采用了这些特定的构造。因此，由于梦是内在实相的表现，它们无法通过外在感官成功地进行解读或探究。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is often bathed in dreams, and it drifts back to other lives and places as a release and a relief from the struggle that is involved in the new formation. This is the dilemma of creation. The inner self does all of this spontaneously, as both of your parts spontaneously--each of your selves spontaneously play their own role.
quotes.translation: 它常常沐浴在梦中，并漂流回其他生命和地点，作为对新形成过程中所涉挣扎的释放和缓解。这就是创造的困境。内在自体自发地完成这一切，就像你们的两部分自发地——你们各自的自我自发地扮演自己的角色一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You do have access to the inner self, therefore. You are hardly cut off from your own soul or entity. The ego prefers to consider itself the captain at the helm, so to speak, since it is the ego who most directly deals with the sometimes tumultuous seas of physical reality, and it does not want to be distracted from this task.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们确实能够接触到内在自体。你们并非与自己的灵魂或存有隔绝。可以说，自我更喜欢将自己视为掌舵的船长，因为正是自我最直接地处理物质实相有时汹涌的海洋，并且它不想从这项任务中分心。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Therefore the inner self forms, first, the "invisible" body structure which will "later" emerge in flesh. At the event of this mental seeding, the conscious mind, in your terms, is obviously not connected with the brain, which has not yet been formed in flesh. The idea of the body is held and made physical by a conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 因此，内在自体首先形成“看不见”的身体结构，这结构“后来”会以血肉之躯显现。在这次心灵播种的事件中，就你们而言，显意识心智显然尚未与大脑连接——因为大脑尚未在血肉中成形。身体的理念是由显意识心智持有并使之物质化的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The idleness, if prolonged, is not idleness. Concentration upon physical data takes the conscious mind off for a trip, and it gives the inner self greater freedom to initiate new developments and intuitional creations. These, incidentally, can help you understand the true nature of time. Now take your break. (10:17 to 10:31.)
quotes.translation: 若持续下去，这种闲散并非真正的闲散。专注于物质资料会让显意识心智去旅行，并给予内在自体更大的自由，以启动新的发展与直觉性创造。顺便一提，这些能帮助你理解时间的真实本质。现在休息一下。（10:17至10:31。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego that ignores too many of the possibilities of the inner self is soon in dire difficulty, and is forced to realize that it has been considering survival in a very limited light.
quotes.translation: 那个忽视太多内在自体可能性的自我，很快就会陷入严重困境，并被迫意识到它一直以非常狭隘的眼光看待生存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: (11:00.) It cannot be destroyed then, this inner self of yours, nor can it be diminished. It shares in those abilities that are inherent within All That Is. It must, therefore, create as it is created, for this is the great giving that is behind all dimensions of existence, the spilling-over from the fountain of All That Is.
quotes.translation: （11:00。）你的这个内在自体既不能被毁灭，也不能被削弱。它分享着一切万有内在固有的那些能力。因此，它必须像被创造那样去创造，因为这就是存在于所有存在维度背后的伟大给予，是一切万有之泉的满溢。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As you know therefore we have differentiated between an outer ego, who manipulates within physical reality, and an inner ego who directs the activities of the inner self. Now then, the next step should indeed be clear. In the main, the ego deals with secondary realities, and in the main, the inner ego deals with primaries.
quotes.translation: 因此，如你所知，我们区分了在物质实相中运作的外在自我，与指导内在自体活动的内在自我。那么，下一步确实应该很清楚了。大体上，自我处理次要实相，而大体上，内在自我处理首要实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Quite literally, the "inner self" forms the body by magically transforming thoughts and emotions into physical counterparts. You grow the body. Its condition perfectly mirrors your subjective state at any given time. Using atoms and molecules, you build your body, forming basic elements into a form that you call your own.
quotes.translation: 确切地说，“内在自体”通过神奇地将思想与情感转化为物质对应物来形成身体。你生长着身体。它的状况完美地反映了你在任何给定时刻的主观状态。你利用原子与分子构建你的身体，将基本元素塑造成你称之为自己的形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The reality of dreams themselves can only be investigated through direct contact. Their reality cannot be probed by scientific devices, for dreams in this respect are as nebulous as the spirit, or soul, or inner self. Dreams are directly experienced. They have no meaning outside of their relationship with the personality.
quotes.translation: 梦境本身的实相只能通过直接接触来探究。它们的实相无法用科学仪器探测，因为在这方面，梦境如同灵、灵魂或内在自我一样飘忽不定。梦境是直接被体验的，它们在与人格的关系之外毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Inspiration is often a more or less instantaneous translation, occurring for various reasons which I will give you later, without the benefit of the brain's intervention. It is this strangeness that is often noted. The individual seems not to know where the thought comes from, because he does not recognize the characteristic mark of his brain upon it. And indeed such a mark is lacking, for inspiration originates with the inner self.
quotes.translation: 灵感往往是一种或多或少的瞬间翻译，因各种原因发生（我稍后会告诉你），无需大脑的干预。正是这种陌生感常被注意到。个体似乎不知道想法从何而来，因为他认不出自己大脑在其上的特征印记。确实，这样的印记是缺失的，因为灵感源自内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now this is a split of the conscious mind. It does not originate within the inner self. When Augustus Two takes over he is quite conscious. He simply views physical reality through an undeviating system of beliefs. The messages sent to the body are not in the least contradictory. The body is under excellent control.
quotes.translation: 这是意识心的一种分裂，它并非源自内在自我。当奥古斯都二号接管时，他完全清醒。他只是通过一套坚定不移的信念系统来看待物质实相。发送给身体的讯息毫无矛盾之处，身体处于极佳的控制之下。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is also possible that these secondary personalities, emerging, give access to buried abilities and benign constructive abilities which had been buried beneath heavier fears that weighed them down. In any case this level represents the last division of what we may call the present personal subconscious, and still only accounts for a small dimension of the inner self, being composed of only the most easily accessible portions.
quotes.translation: 这些次要人格的出现，也可能让人接触到被更沉重的恐惧所压抑的、深埋的良性建设性能力。无论如何，这个层次代表了我们可称之为当前个人潜意识的最末一个分支，并且仍然只占内在自我的一小部分，仅由最易触及的部分构成。
