quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your emotional feelings are, as you know, the inner senses as they appear close to the physical plane. These are the directives. You form in your own personal perspective the data that exists within the inner self, but you do this on an individual basis in line with your own expectations, suggestions and attitudes.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，你的情绪感受是内在感官在接近物质层面时的显现。这些是指令。你从自己的个人视角，塑造出存在于内在自我中的资料，但这是基于你个人的期望、暗示和态度来进行的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （This "hanging before" appearance, it will be remembered, is remarkably similar to the effect I observed when the same three of us experimented with our first and only seance. See the 11th session, page 56. In this one, as Bill, Jane and I stared into a mirror, the reflection of Jane's head changed in size and shape, and finally appeared to hang in space just forward of the rest of her reflection. That appearance had taken place in much poorer light than tonight's event, however. This time I could see in detail the changes taking place, and their end. [Session 11 is in Vol. 1.]

quotes.text: The very involvement of the ego with the inner self will be of great benefit. Nothing would be gained if I told you now that the ego would allow the ulcer to vanish, for there would still be a definite need on your part to understand. And it is indeed the understanding itself which will allow you to let it vanish.
quotes.translation: 自我与内在自我的这种交融将大有裨益。如果我现在告诉你自我会让溃疡消失，那将毫无收获，因为你仍然需要明确的理解。而正是这种理解本身，才会让你允许它消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The personality is given the greatest gift of all; you get exactly what you want to get. You create from nothing the experience that is your own. If you do not like your experience, then look within yourself and change it. But realize also that you are responsible for your joys and triumphs, and that the energy to create any of these realities comes from the inner self. What you do with it is up to the individual personality.
quotes.translation: 人格被赋予了最伟大的礼物：你得到的正是你想要的。你从无中创造出属于自己的体验。若你不喜欢自己的体验，那就向内审视并改变它。但也要明白，你为自己的喜悦与成就负责，而创造这些实相的能量皆来自内在自体。你如何运用它，则取决于个体人格。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego or the inner self-conscious self directs such experiences and uses the inner senses in much the same way that you use the outer senses, except that the inner ego knows all of the mechanics involved in the use of the inner senses, and you know little of the mechanics involved with the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 内在自我或内在自意识自体引导此类体验，并以类似你运用外在感官的方式运用内在感官，区别在于内在自我通晓运用内在感官的所有机制，而你对运用外在感官的机制所知甚少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Again, this is not symbolic. Only by the use of the inner senses can you obtain a viewpoint that is to some extent free of your own system. The inner self realizes the nature of its own reality, is sure of its identity and well aware of its power in the creation of actions which it projects outward from itself.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这并非象征性说法。唯有通过运用内在感官，你才能获得某种程度脱离自身系统的视角。内在自体了悟自身实相的本质，确知自己的身份，并清楚意识到自己在向外投射的行动创造中所拥有的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: We have to a very brief extent begun to explain that phenomena in a recent session. The inner self has a vast and infinite reservoir from which to draw knowledge and gain experience. (Pause.) All kinds of choices are available, and the diversity of physical matter is a reflection of this deep source of variety.
quotes.translation: 在最近一次课中，我们已开始简要解释这种现象。内在自体拥有浩瀚无限的宝库，可从中汲取知识并获得经验。（停顿）所有种类的选择皆可获取，物质形态的多样性正是这深层源泉多样性的反映。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In some personalities they will lead to what you call a mystic experience. They will carry the personality into new realms of perception. They will momentarily break up usual patterned organizations of perception. You will see with new inner eyes. To some extent you will view some aspects of reality apart from the usual physical structures that you impose upon it as a whole. There is therefore a freedom for the inner self.
quotes.translation: 在某些人格中，这些将导向你所谓的神秘体验。它们会将人格带入全新的感知领域，暂时打破惯常的感知组织模式。你将用新的内在之眼观看，在某种程度上脱离你通常强加于整体实相的物理结构，从而瞥见实相的某些面向。因此，内在自体拥有自由。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now this sense, like all other inner senses, is being used by the inner self-conscious ego, but the outer ego is not permitted awareness along these lines. A minimum amount of information from these inner senses is given to the outer ego after it is sifted through the subconscious. But only a minimum amount.
quotes.translation: 现在，这种感官如同所有其他内在感官，正被内在自意识自我所运用，但外在自我不被允许觉察这些层面。这些内在感官的信息经潜意识筛选后，仅有最低限度的信息被传递给外在自我。但确实只有最低限度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: These then form physical objects, physical matter. Matter is the shape that basic experience takes when it intrudes into three dimensional systems. Matter is the shape of your dreams. Your dreams, emotions, feelings, thoughts, are (underlined) transformed into physical matter purposefully by this inner self.
quotes.translation: 这些便形成物质客体、物质本身。物质是基本经验侵入三维系统时所采取的形状。物质是你梦的形状。你的梦、情绪、感受、思想，都被这个内在自我有目的地转化为物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Time is one of your most obvious camouflages, and the study of time will lead you in a fairly direct manner from the camouflaged physical self to the inner self, which you ignore. Even now your psychologists speak of the difference between physical time, by which you set your clocks, and psychological time.
quotes.translation: 时间是你最明显的伪装之一，对时间的研究将引导你以相当直接的方式，从伪装性的物质自我走向你所忽视的内在自我。即使现在，你们的心理学家也在谈论物理时间（你们据此设定时钟）与心理时间之间的差异。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You can see now how a subjective experience can have an electrical reality, and through this reality directly affects the human physical structure. Dreams, also being electric actualities, depend upon an electric system of patterns to communicate their data to the various levels or areas of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 你现在可以看出，主观经验如何具有电性实相，并通过这种实相直接影响人类的身体结构。梦作为电性实相，依赖电性模式系统将其信息传递给内在自我的各个层面或区域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is constant creation. The initial creation provided the energy, the dimension, of possibility itself, but every particle of consciousness will always attempt to express itself within as many possibilities as possible. The inner self therefore creates the physical body and the land upon which it moves.
quotes.translation: 这是持续不断的创造。初始创造提供了可能性本身的能量与维度，但每个意识粒子永远试图在尽可能多的可能性中表达自己。因此，内在自我创造了物质身体及其所行走的大地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: A complete change from intense focus outward to intense focus inward is most beneficial, but this does not mean that every few minutes found available be spent in psychological time experiments. Brisk walks should be a daily part of Ruburt's schedule in any case, and walking also refreshes the inner self.
quotes.translation: 从强烈向外专注彻底转变为强烈向内专注最为有益，但这并不意味着要把每几分钟的空闲都花在心理时间实验上。无论如何，轻快的散步应成为鲁柏日常行程的一部分，散步也能使内在自我焕然一新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. You must not take too literally that which you read, but leave it to the inner self to interpret and decide, and leave it to our material also. For the material represents the very best of your knowledge as it is given to you. Do not let terms confuse you. They are by nature confusing and distorted.
quotes.translation: 现在。你不可过于字面理解所读的内容，而应让内在自我去诠释和决定，同时也交托给我们的资料。因为这份资料代表了你所知的最佳呈现。不要让术语混淆你。它们本质上是令人困惑且扭曲的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are close psychological connections in all cases--psychological webworks, and psychic recognitions that bring together the slayer and his victim, and these are known to the inner self. The stature and meaning behind the victim adds to the horrible nature of the act, and of course this is the point.
quotes.translation: 在所有案例中都存在着紧密的心理关联——心理网络与心灵认知，这些将凶手与受害者联结在一起，而内在自我对此了如指掌。受害者背后的地位与意义加剧了行为的恐怖本质，这当然正是关键所在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is therefore theoretically possible for you to see the world through a frog's eye, or a bird's or an ant's. We are speaking here of physical senses. The inner self has also latent inner senses beside the ones that it normally uses while the consciousness is tuned into a particular camouflage system.
quotes.translation: 因此理论上，你有可能透过青蛙、鸟类或蚂蚁的眼睛看世界。此处我们谈论的是物质感官。当意识调频至特定伪装系统时，内在自我除了惯常使用的感官外，还潜藏着内在感官。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Joseph, you can help yourself considerably by giving yourself suggestions, beginning tonight, as you fall off to sleep, to the effect that your head will be clear tomorrow. Suggest that while you sleep your inner self will make whatever corrections or adjustments are necessary to bring about this end.
quotes.translation: 约瑟夫，从今晚入睡时开始，你可以通过自我暗示极大帮助自己——暗示明早头脑将保持清明。建议你在睡眠中让内在自我进行必要的修正或调整，以实现这个目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The consciousness of atoms and molecules can be likened to the subconscious as you now know it, in that it is generalized to a large degree, but energy-propelled. You should perhaps realize by now that the inner self, the mind and its components, is composed or forms a unitary force field of its own.
quotes.translation: 原子与分子的意识可类比为你所知的潜意识，两者都在很大程度上具有普遍性，但前者受能量驱动。此刻你或许该明白：内在自我、心智及其组成部分，构成了一个自成一体的统一力场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. The inner self and the subconscious are not present in the physical universe, insofar as they take up no space within it. They exist within the electrical system. They affect the physical system and operate closely allied with it. Nevertheless they will not be found within the physical system.
quotes.translation: 现在。内在自我与潜意识并不存在于物质宇宙中，因为它们在其中不占据任何空间。它们存在于电性系统内，影响物质系统并与之紧密协作。然而，在物质系统中永远找不到它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Through the inner senses, therefore, some enlightenment can be received as to both the actual existence of dimensions that the physical self cannot perceive; and also through the inner senses, a sense of confidence and continuity can be achieved through the inner self's knowledge of its freedom.
quotes.translation: 因此，通过内在感官，既能获得物质自我无法感知的维度真实存在的启示；也能通过内在感官，凭借内在自我对其自由的认知，获得自信与连续性的体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are shadings and variations and that is all. The inner ego is that part of the inner self which is closely allied with the outer ego, in that it is to some degree a director of function and activity. But it is not sharply focused. It looks inward. Here we run into some language difficulty.
quotes.translation: 只有色调与变化，如此而已。内在自我是内在自性的一部分，与外在自我紧密相连，因为它在一定程度上是功能与活动的指挥者。但它并非焦点明确，而是向内观照。这里我们遇到了语言上的困难。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Electromagnetic reality belongs to the inner self. It is not a property that belongs to physical matter, although it does appear in physical terms. （Pause.） The second and third projection forms have electromagnetic realities. （Pause.） We are going slow here to get this material through clearly.
quotes.translation: 电磁实相属于内在自性。它并非物质实体的属性，尽管它以物质形式显现。（停顿）第二种和第三种投射形态具有电磁实相。（停顿）我们在此放慢速度，以便清晰传达这些资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: These forms do exist, as your physical body does. They are fused however with your inner self. They are not physical, but they do exist in the whole package of the self, perhaps like the skins of an onion, you see. They are merely the forms that your own consciousness takes in different dreams.
quotes.translation: 这些形态确实存在，如同你的肉体一般。然而它们与你的内在自性融合。它们并非物质性的，却存在于自性的整体包裹中，或许像洋葱的层层外皮，你明白吗？它们只是你的意识在不同梦境中采取的形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When he is at work he thinks "This is not me, this is not myself." The inner self has not so far recognized this other portion of the personality. When our friend Philip sells he is thinking "This is me. You can like it or not, but buy what I am selling." But he believes in what he is selling.
quotes.translation: 当他工作时，他会想："这不是我，这不是真正的我。"内在自性至今尚未认出人格的这个其他部分。当我们的朋友菲利普推销时，他想着："这就是我。你可以喜欢或不喜欢，但请买下我推销的东西。"他深信自己所推销之物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In this case also your reality colors your beliefs, and your experience is a direct result of your conscious attitudes. By such attitudes as these just mentioned you put clamps upon your inner self, purposely hamper your experience, and reinforce beliefs in the negative aspects of your being.
quotes.translation: 在此案例中，你的实相同样为你的信念着色，而你的经验是你意识态度的直接结果。通过上述这类态度，你给内在自性套上枷锁，刻意限制你的经验，并强化你存在中负面层面的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Practically speaking, three other forms are available to you in projections beside the physical, though others are theoretically available. It goes without saying that the consciousness works as hard at night as in the daytime, and always the experiences become part of the whole inner self.
quotes.translation: 实际而言，除了物质形态外，你在投射中还可获得三种其他形态，尽管理论上还有其他形态可用。不言而喻，意识在夜晚与白天同样辛勤运作，而所有经验都成为整体内在自性的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Dreams are an example of Mental activity that has its origin within the physical organism, but exists in a dimension which is not mainly physical. Dreams are an example of the inner self's basically independent nature.
quotes.translation: 梦境是心智活动的一个例子，其起源在物质有机体之内，却存在于一个主要并非物质的维度中。梦境是内在自体基本独立本质的一个例证。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Its beliefs about the nature of reality are then given to inner portions of the self. These rely mainly upon the conscious mind's interpretation of temporal reality. The conscious mind sets the goals and the inner self brings them about, using all its facilities and inexhaustible energy.
quotes.translation: 它对实相本质的信念随后被赋予自体的内在部分。这些部分主要依赖意识心对时间性实相的解释。意识心设定目标，而内在自体则运用其所有能力与无穷能量来实现这些目标。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Therefore you accept them for they make senseto the physical mechanism. The inner self has the knowledge behind these physical perceptions. The brain is responsible for these physical symbols. The mind has no need of them, but passes the information to the brain, who then interprets it.
quotes.translation: 因此你接受它们，因为它们对物质机制而言具有意义。内在自体拥有这些物质感知背后的知识。大脑负责这些物质符号。心智并不需要它们，但将信息传递给大脑，再由大脑加以诠释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Very nicely in class, she personifies the feelings that each of you have to some degree, involving your inner self.... She shows her feelings in an exaggerated fashion for you to look at, and so when she speaks it is not only for herself but for everyone in this room, including Ruburt.
quotes.translation: 在课堂上，她非常巧妙地拟人化了你们每个人在某种程度上都有的感受，涉及你们的内在自体……她以夸张的方式展现她的感受供你们审视，因此当她说话时，不仅代表她自己，也代表这个房间里的每个人，包括鲁柏。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is the self that looks outward. It is the self that you call egotistically aware. The inner self became what I refer to as the inner ego. It looks into that inner reality, that psychic dimension of awareness from which both your own consciousness and your body consciousness emerged.
quotes.translation: 它是向外看的自体。它是你们称之为自我意识的自体。内在自体变成了我所谓的内在自我。它向内审视那个内在实相、那个心灵意识的维度，你们自己的意识与你们的身体意识皆源于此。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner self could be called, then, the nucleus, the original point of action from which all the other emanations that form the whole self began. There is here you see no limitation upon the direction in which action may move, nor any limit to the dimensions which action may create.
quotes.translation: 因此，内在自体可被称为核心、行动的原始出发点，所有形成整体自体的其他辐射皆由此开始。在此，你们看，行动可能移动的方向没有限制，行动可能创造的维度也没有任何限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I will never either suggest or condone a wholesale letting go of outer personality defenses. I am attempting to build up your outer personalities in their dealings with the outside world, while at the same time teaching the inner self spontaneity and freedom. This is quite a project.
quotes.translation: 我绝不会建议或纵容完全放弃外在人格的防御机制。我试图在你们与外界打交道时强化外在人格，同时教导内在自发性与自由。这确实是一项浩大的工程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, the process does not cease at the physical boundaries of the self however. The data thus far has been seen as traveling from the inner self outward, as being translated from pure knowledge into thermal pictures, inner images and thoughts. Obviously words and action follow.
quotes.translation: 然而，这个过程并不会止于自我的物理边界。迄今为止，我们看到资料从内在自我向外流动，从纯粹知识转化为热像、内在影像与思想。显然，言语与行动随之而来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Having determined upon physical reality as a dimension in which it will project itself, the inner self therefore first of all takes care to form and maintain the physical basis upon which all else must depend--those Physical properties of earth that can be called natural ones.
quotes.translation: 内在自我既已决定将物质实相作为投射自身的维度，便首先致力于构建并维持一切事物赖以存在的物质基础——那些可称为自然属性的地球物质特性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The physical image does not immediately disappear, for a number of reasons. The personality, through the inner self, has indeed created or constructed the physical form, but the very material from which it was constructed also contains its peculiar consciousness, as you know.
quotes.translation: 物质形象不会立即消失，原因众多。人格通过内在自我确实创造或构建了物质形态，但正如你们所知，构建所用的材料本身也蕴含着独特的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This loss of contact applies only to the ego. It does not apply to those other portions of the self, and it is through the inner self, through inner consciousness, that to some degree the nature of action can make itself known. And when it is made known it will be seen then--
quotes.translation: 这种接触的丧失仅适用于自我，不适用于自我的其他部分。正是通过内在自我与内在意识，行动的本质才能在某种程度上彰显自身。当它被揭示时，人们将会看到——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your psychological life is dependent upon your ability to perceive and react to such action events. Your reaction, of course, creates new ones. Your identity, your inner self, is a main action event, forming other such events that are the various portions of your personality.
quotes.translation: 你们的心理生活取决于感知并回应此类行动事件的能力。你们的回应当然会创造新的事件。你们的身份认同、内在自我，正是构成其他事件的主要行动事件，这些事件形成了你们人格的各个部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The outer ego then remains at the end a controller and director of those strengths which it gathered about itself during its particular existence. But even this is not the end. It, that is it meaning the outer ego, can even continue growth and development after a particular existence, according to its inherent ability and according to its ability to communicate with the basic inner self.
quotes.translation: 外在自我最终成为其在特定存在期间所聚集力量的掌控者与引导者。但这并非终点。它——即外在自我——甚至能在特定存在之后，根据其固有能力和与内在基本自我沟通的能力，继续成长与发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You will in all cases attempt to construct as physical reality your inner conception of what reality is. Your physical environment and conditions are a mirror of your own basic conceptions of reality. If the environment changes it is because your inner conceptions have changed, and no smallest alteration is made within physical reality, that has not first been made within the inner self.
quotes.translation: 你始终会试图将内在对实相的概念构建为物质实相。你的物质环境与状况是你对实相基本概念的镜像。若环境改变，必是因内在概念已变——物质实相中任何细微改变，无不是先在内在自我中发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Despite all your own tendencies to avoid such contact, you are bringing it about through our sessions, and the importance of the material--the inner self placing you in a position where such contact will come about. This is for your own good, and the same is true of Ruburt.
quotes.translation: 尽管你自身有回避此类接触的倾向，但通过我们的课程，你正在促成这种接触。而资料的重要性——内在自我正将你置于必然产生此类接触的境地。这为你好，鲁柏亦然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In the same manner, other constructions are affected. It is true that what becomes matter must be dealt with as matter, and yet the inner vitality and the inner self have their own ability to heal. The trouble is, these abilities are little utilized and seldom appreciated.
quotes.translation: 同理，其他建构也会受到影响。成为物质之物确实必须以物质方式处理，但内在生命力与内在自我自有其疗愈能力。问题在于这些能力极少被运用，鲜少被珍视。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （Jane's Jan. 10/64 trance is described in Session 14, Vol. 1.）

quotes.text: You are not speaking of basic issues. You are flying paper dragons to be punctured, but these are not the real dragons. You must learn to listen to the voice of your inner self, for if you know the use you are to this man, you do not recognize the nature of his use to you.
quotes.translation: 你谈论的并非根本问题。你在戳破纸龙，但这些并非真龙。你必须学会倾听内在自我的声音——若你知晓自己对这人的用处，却尚未认清他对你的本质意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The idea that sparked the book came to him, though he may forget, in two ways. First as intuition; in other words from his inner self as he sat down to write poetry, and in a dream the following night.
quotes.translation: 激发这本书的灵感以两种方式降临于他（尽管他可能遗忘）：首先作为直觉——换言之，当他坐下写诗时来自内在自我；其次在次夜的梦境中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: They can confuse you as to the nature of your own identity. You become the role. There should be a standing back within yourself for a while. The problems which you have set yourself can be solved, or the challenges you have set yourself can be met, in several ways. You have choices. There is not one way. It is your attitude that is important, and the flexibility of your inner self.
quotes.translation: 它们可能混淆你对自己身份本质的认知。你变成了角色本身。你应当暂时从自身内部退后一步。你为自己设定的问题可以解决，或你为自己设定的挑战可以应对，方式有多种。你拥有选择权。并非只有一条路。重要的是你的态度，以及你内在自我的灵活性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Your inner self adopts the physically conscious, physically focused mind as a method of allowing it to manipulate in the world that you know. The conscious mind is particularly equipped to direct outward activity, to handle waking experience and oversee physical work.
quotes.translation: 你的内在自我采用有意识的、聚焦于物质世界的心智，作为允许它在你所知世界中运作的方法。意识心智特别擅长指导外在活动、处理清醒体验并监督物质工作。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is not to minimize the importance of the intellect that I once again repeat: Inner reality will only be known directly through the inner self, and the inner senses. The intellect must deal and interpret the realities of camouflage existence, this being its purpose.
quotes.translation: 我再次重申并非要贬低智力的重要性：内在实相只能通过内在自我和内在感官直接认知。智力必须处理并诠释伪装存在的实相，这正是其目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Psychic sympathy can be expanded in some space of the mind, of any mind, of any inner mind. All things are known, for in the depths of the inner self emotional sympathy is endless. By sympathy I refer to an inner connection, an attraction, not necessarily a pity.
quotes.translation: 心灵共鸣可以在心智的某些空间——任何心智、任何内在心智中——扩展。一切皆被知晓，因为内在自我深处的情感共鸣是无穷尽的。我所说的共鸣指的是内在连接与吸引，未必是怜悯。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The information was perceived through the inner senses, and though Ruburt is not consciously aware of the dream's importance the inner self has assimilated the knowledge. He will most likely have several other dreams of this nature within a short period of time.
quotes.translation: 这些信息是通过内在感官感知的，尽管鲁柏并未有意识地意识到这个梦境的重要性，但内在自我已吸收了这些知识。他很可能在短时间内会再做几个类似性质的梦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Once before, in the first and 18th envelope experiments, an object was used that was similar but not identical by any means. In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: This, again, is not to say that it is not real, but that it is not a primary reality that is more or less constant for the inner self. If an experience is a part of all levels of consciousness--this includes the trance state--then it is a primary experience.
quotes.translation: 这再次说明，并非说它不真实，而是它并非内在自我或多或少恒常的主要实相。如果某个体验是意识所有层次（包括出神状态）的一部分，那么它就是主要体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The outer personality must be a strong yet resilient framework, able to dispense with its boundaries and allow the inner self its freedom, and yet strong enough to spring back and maintain its control over outward experience. This is certainly a discipline.
quotes.translation: 外在人格必须是一个强韧而有弹性的架构，既能放下界限让内在自己获得自由，又足够坚韧以恢复原状并维持对外在经验的控制。这无疑是一种修行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. In projections the inner self is free to travel within its capabilities--underlined, within its capabilities.
quotes.translation: 现在。在出体状态中，内在自己可以自由地在其能力范围内旅行——强调一下，在其能力范围内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now if there is good communication between the self, that is the inner self and the outer ego, then the ego begins to understand what it is, and also to realize that it has greater capacities than it can realize by continued reincarnations, upon one plane.
quotes.translation: 如果自己（即内在自己与外在自我）之间沟通良好，那么自我就会开始理解自己的本质，并意识到它拥有比在单一层面上不断轮回所能认知的更强大的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: All of the information of the inner self is highly condensed and codified, and exists in electromagnetic purity.
quotes.translation: 内在自己的所有信息都高度浓缩且编码化，并以电磁纯净态存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. I have been helping Ruburt. The energy that I would put into sessions has gone into some private talks to him while he slept. These have resulted in necessary insights on his part that will themselves cause the release of energy from the inner self.
quotes.translation: 现在。我一直在帮助鲁柏。我本应用于课程的能量，已在他睡眠时转化为私人谈话。这些谈话使他获得了必要的洞见，这些洞见本身将促使内在自己的能量释放。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The dream world is indeed a natural by-product of the relationship of the inner self and the physical being. Not a reflection, therefore, but a by-product involving not only a chemical reaction but the transformation of energy from one state to another.
quotes.translation: 梦境世界确实是内在自己与物质存在关系的自然副产品。因此它不是一种反映，而是一种副产品，不仅涉及化学反应，还涉及能量从一种状态到另一种状态的转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This analogy is not a very good one however, since the child does eventually leave the parent, but it is a true one because the inner self does indeed leave the physical image with which the ego is so concerned, when it passes beyond the physical field.
quotes.translation: 这个比喻并不十分恰当，因为孩子最终会离开父母，但它的确真实——因为当内在自体超越物质领域时，它确实会离开自我如此关切的物质形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Nevertheless a freedom from the ego must be permitted to some extent, so that the inner self can most freely operate. I have spoken of tests and experiments that can be conducted, and which will yield physical results that will be ultimately accepted.
quotes.translation: 然而，必须允许一定程度的自我解放，使内在自体能够最自由地运作。我曾提及可进行的测试与实验，这些实验将产生最终能被接受的物质结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Again, this is an important point. The ego has accepted the goals of the inner self. Its identity has already changed, so that its main concern, underline main, is no longer primarily with physical manipulation, but with inner growth and development.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这是重要的一点。自我已接纳内在自体的目标。其身份已然改变，因此它的主要关注——请着重"主要"二字——不再首要在于物质操控，而是内在成长与发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Identity of the inner self operates very well within primary conditions. It is dependent upon primary conditions. Its manipulation of primary conditions gives it the knowledge of itself. Identity is retained within the dream state, is it not?
quotes.translation: 内在自体的身份在主要条件下运作得非常好。它依赖主要条件。它对主要条件的操控使其获得对自身的认知。身份在梦境状态中得以保留，不是吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Such a state is far from impossible, and we shall see that you achieve it. The rules that I have given you are an absolute necessity if that state is to be achieved. And it is only in that state that the inner self can utilize its abilities.
quotes.translation: 这种状态绝非不可能实现，我们将见证你达成它。若要达到这种状态，我给予你的规则是绝对必要的。唯有在这种状态下，内在自体才能运用其能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You will learn through experience many and excellent methods that can be utilized for your advantage. Through projections you will become acquainted with the mobility and stability of the inner self, as separate from the physical apparatus.
quotes.translation: 你将通过经验学到许多可为你所用的绝佳方法。通过投射，你将熟悉内在自体与物质装置分离时的流动性与稳定性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is something else I wanted to mention briefly. It is that the sixth inner sense, of which we have spoken briefly, can be likened in some respects to the instincts of the inner self. This will be discussed also at our next session.
quotes.translation: 还有一点我想简要提及。我们之前简要讨论过的第六内在感官，在某些方面可以比作内在自我的本能。这将在我们下次课中继续讨论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The painting itself, and any painting, rises out of the empty board through the force of your own emotions, and the board becomes the focal point that collects, draws together and directs the energy from your inner self, into form.
quotes.translation: 画作本身，以及任何画作，都从空白的画板中经由你自身情感的力量浮现出来，而画板成为焦点，汇聚、凝聚并引导来自你内在自我的能量，使之成形。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The dream signified your knowledge that Ruburt was being cleared of negative connotations in relationship to his father. On the other hand, the young Del was also a symbol for your own inner self, acting as a guide and companion.
quotes.translation: 这个梦表明你意识到鲁柏正在被清除与他父亲相关的负面联想。另一方面，年轻的德尔也象征着你自己的内在自我，充当着向导和同伴的角色。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Jane went to hydro as usual this morning, but wasn't too happy about the system. While she was eating a good lunch I thought of telling her the typewriter repair service had called this morning, citing a bill for $90.00 for the repair and a box of a dozen cartridges, but I forgot to mention it as we talked about other things. I'd also called our optometrist and asked his secretary to have him return my call so I could ask him a couple of technical questions about a note I'm writing for Session 901 for Dreams. Since I had to wait for his call -- which never came -- I couldn't leave the house to get Jane's typewriter. I want to try it out to make sure it's okay before I turn my own in for repair, which it needs.

quotes.text: Various gradations in color will emerge that could otherwise take years to effect. The inner self of course will take advantage of all the conscious knowledge you have at the same time, and serve it up to you in new patterns.
quotes.translation: 各种色彩的层次将浮现出来，否则可能需要多年才能实现。同时，内在自我自然会利用你拥有的所有意识知识，并以新的模式将其呈现给你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is true. But so-called hard facts, that may seem opposed to symbols and myths, are not necessarily untrue, since they may be necessary distortions without which the inner self could not survive in the material universe.
quotes.translation: 确实如此。但那些看似与符号和神话对立的所谓硬性事实，未必不真实，因为它们可能是必要的扭曲，没有这些扭曲，内在自我就无法在物质宇宙中生存。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is why there appears to be two such diverse tendencies that show themselves. The personality is indeed divided. The ego fights the inner self, which means of course that the self fights against itself.
quotes.translation: 这就是为什么会出现两种看似截然不同的倾向。人格确实分裂了。自我与内在自我对抗，这当然意味着自我与自己对抗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The disorientation is only temporary, and when the form is severed from the physical body, then all the memories and identity within the electromagnetic system become part of the inner self, of course.
quotes.translation: 这种迷失感只是暂时的，当形态与肉体分离时，电磁系统内的所有记忆与身份自然成为内在自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This gives us the creation of new inner selves, and all this is of electrical composition, and you should recall the information given you concerning the manner in which electrical fields are formed.
quotes.translation: 这便产生了新的内在自我，这一切皆由电性构成，你应回想此前关于电场形成方式的说明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. Any conceivable method of perceptions is possible to the inner self, latent within it. It can adopt any method of perception it chooses, according to the environment in which it finds itself.
quotes.translation: 现在。内在自我潜藏着一切可想象的感知方式。它能根据所处环境选择任何感知方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In the same manner, you create your physical image and your world. If anything in that physical image or world needs changing, the change must first be made in the atmosphere of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 同样地，你创造了自己的物质形象与物质世界。若该形象或世界需要改变，必须先在内在自我的氛围中完成转变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Indeed, an overhanging weight. Our studies and any true expression of the inner self, should lead to a joyous encounter with reality and the everyday moment, out of which eternity is spun.
quotes.translation: 确实，这是一种沉重的负担。我们的研究及任何内在自我的真实表达，都应导向对现实与日常时刻的喜悦相遇——永恒正是由此编织而成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: A confident ego is indeed a prerequisite for psychic venturing, for it is only the confident ego which ultimately feels secure enough to give leeway to the inner self in the long run.
quotes.translation: 自信的自我确实是灵性探索的先决条件，因为唯有自信的自我最终才能感到足够安全，从而为内在自我留出发展空间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. The inner self has a much richer and deeper heritage than the intellect or ego. Its perceptions are of a different nature, varying particularly in scope and depth. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在。内在自体拥有比智性或自我更丰富、更深远的传承。其感知本质不同，尤其在广度与深度上各有差异。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Dictation: Let us go on to discuss the relationship between the inner self, your conscious beliefs, and your most intimate physical creation -- your human image.
quotes.translation: 口授：让我们继续探讨内在自体、你的意识信念，以及你最亲密的物质创造——你的肉身形象——这三者之间的关系。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is believed that the self must shed its ego and die symbolically in order that the inner self can be free.
quotes.translation: 人们相信，自体必须舍弃自我并象征性地死亡，内在自体才能获得自由。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now. The EE units are the forms basic experience takes when directed by this inner self.
quotes.translation: 现在。EE单位是基本经验在内在自体引导下所采取的形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json
